description: A customer reports that the electric meter box on the side of their house is damaged.

title: Notify Customers of Critical Peak Pricing Event
description: Due to extreme heat and high demand, the utility is calling a Critical Peak Pricing (CPP) event for the next day, where electricity prices will be much higher for a few hours.

title: Donate to Bill Assistance Program
description: A customer wants to make a one-time donation to the utility's charitable fund that helps low-income customers pay their bills.

title: Report Water Theft
description: A citizen reports that someone has illegally connected a hose to a fire hydrant to fill a swimming pool.

title: Community Solar Billing Inquiry
description: A customer enrolled in a community solar program is calling to understand the credits on their bill.

title: Gas Pipeline Pressure Monitoring
description: A gas control room operator needs to monitor pipeline pressure to ensure it stays within safe operating limits.

title: Schedule Emergency Shutdown Valve Test
description: A compliance manager needs to schedule the annual test of an emergency shutdown (ESD) valve at a city gate station.

title: Cathodic Protection Monitoring
description: An integrity engineer checks the status of the cathodic protection system, which prevents corrosion on a steel gas pipeline.

title: Analyze Pipeline Inspection Gauge (PIG) Data
description: An integrity engineer analyzes data from a recent PIG run to check for corrosion or defects inside a natural gas pipeline.

title: Gas Emergency Response Plan Drill
description: A compliance officer is simulating a pipeline rupture to drill the company's emergency response plan.

title: Odorant Level Check
description: A technician is dispatched to check that the correct amount of odorant (mercaptan) is being injected into the natural gas stream at a gate station.

title: Plan Gas Meter Change-Out Program
description: An asset manager needs to plan a program to replace all gas meters that are approaching their end-of-life.

title: Gas Nomination and Scheduling
description: A gas scheduler needs to nominate (request) the amount of natural gas needed from an interstate pipeline for the next day to serve its customers.

title: Gas Pipeline Right-of-Way Patrol
description: A technician is patrolling a gas pipeline right-of-way and observes unauthorized construction activity near the pipeline.

title: Line Strike Emergency Response
description: A third-party construction crew has struck a natural gas distribution line. The system must manage the immediate response.

title: Launch 'Call Before You Dig' Campaign
description: The public affairs department is launching a public awareness campaign to remind people to call 811 before any digging projects.

title: Gas Compressor Station Monitoring
description: An operator monitors the health and performance of a natural gas compressor station.

title: Inline Inspection (PIG) Tool Tracking
description: A control room operator is tracking the real-time progress of a PIG as it travels through a natural gas pipeline.

title: Gas Quality Check
description: A technician checks the quality of natural gas being received from a supplier to ensure it meets the utility's tariff specifications.

title: Investigate Excavation Damage Incident
description: After a third-party digging crew damaged a gas line, a compliance officer investigates the incident.

title: Automated Feeder Fault Detection
description: A recloser on a distribution feeder operates, indicating a fault. The system must automatically analyze the fault data and locate the issue.

title: Automated Service Restoration Switching
description: Following a fault, the FLISR system must automatically create a switching plan to isolate the fault and restore power to as many customers as possible.

title: Conservation Voltage Reduction (CVR)
description: A distribution management system (DMS) needs to optimize feeder voltage levels to reduce energy consumption while keeping voltage within acceptable limits.

title: Transformer Overload Alert
description: The SCADA system detects that a distribution transformer is operating above its nameplate rating due to high summer demand.

title: Dispatch Crew for Outage Repair
description: Following an outage, the system needs to dispatch the nearest available crew to the fault location.

title: Analyze Pole Inspection Imagery
description: An asset manager uses an AI model to analyze drone imagery of thousands of utility poles to identify defects.

title: Grid Frequency Stability Monitoring
description: A system operator is monitoring grid frequency in real-time to ensure the balance between generation and load.

title: Short-Term System Load Forecast
description: A system operator needs an accurate 24-hour load forecast for the entire grid to plan for generation dispatch.

title: Automated Capacitor Bank Switching
description: The DMS automatically switches capacitor banks on a feeder to manage reactive power and improve voltage.

title: Asset Investment Planning
description: An asset strategist needs to decide which aging substation transformers to replace next year based on health and criticality.

title: Islanding Detection and Response
description: A large solar farm's connection to the main grid is lost, but it continues to energize a section of the distribution network, creating a dangerous 'island'. The system must detect this and trip the solar farm offline.

title: Power Quality Analysis
description: A large industrial customer is complaining that sensitive equipment is failing, and they suspect power quality issues. An engineer needs to analyze data to diagnose the problem.

title: Issue Generation Curtailment Order
description: Due to low demand and high solar generation, a system operator needs to curtail a large solar farm to prevent over-generation.

title: Vegetation Management Planning using LiDAR
description: A planner uses LiDAR data to identify trees that are encroaching on transmission line right-of-ways and need to be trimmed.

title: Dynamic Line Rating
description: The system uses real-time weather data to calculate the actual, dynamic thermal rating of a transmission line, allowing more power to flow than its static rating would suggest.

title: Storm Preparedness Planning
description: A major hurricane is forecast to make landfall in the service territory in 3 days. The utility needs to prepare its response.

title: Coordinate Planned Transmission Outage
description: A transmission planner needs to schedule a planned outage of a major transmission line for maintenance.

title: Economic Dispatch of Generators
description: The energy management system (EMS) needs to create a dispatch schedule for the utility's power plants for the next hour that meets the load at the lowest possible cost.

title: Substation Cybersecurity Check
description: A cybersecurity analyst is reviewing logs from a substation's intelligent electronic devices (IEDs) for signs of unauthorized access.

title: Post-Storm Damage Assessment
description: After a major storm, the utility needs to assess the extent of the damage to the electric grid.

title: State Estimator Analysis
description: The EMS runs a state estimator to create a complete and accurate model of the current state of the power grid, even with incomplete or noisy sensor data.

title: Contingency Analysis
description: The EMS continuously simulates single-point-of-failure scenarios (contingencies) to ensure the grid would remain stable if a major piece of equipment failed.

title: Microgrid Islanding Operation
description: During a wider grid outage, a community microgrid must safely disconnect from the main grid and operate independently to keep power on for its local customers.

title: DERMS Dispatch of a Virtual Power Plant (VPP)
description: A Distributed Energy Resource Management System (DERMS) needs to dispatch a VPP of residential batteries to help reduce evening peak load on a constrained feeder.

title: Plan Animal Guard Installation Program
description: After analyzing outage data, an asset manager decides to proactively install animal guards on transformers in areas with high rates of animal-caused outages.

title: Field Crew Safety Monitoring
description: A dispatcher is monitoring the safety of a crew working near energized equipment.

title: Develop Black Sky Restoration Plan
description: A system planner is developing a restoration plan for a 'black sky' event (e.g., a major cyberattack or EMP) that causes a widespread, long-duration blackout.

title: Synchrophasor Data Analysis for Oscillation Detection
description: An engineer analyzes high-speed synchrophasor (PMU) data to detect potentially harmful oscillations on the power grid.

title: Water Quality Monitoring Alert
description: A sensor at the water treatment plant shows a sudden spike in turbidity levels in the raw water intake.

title: Acoustic Leak Detection Analysis
description: The system analyzes data from acoustic sensors in a District Metered Area (DMA) to pinpoint a non-surfacing water leak.

title: Pump Station Optimization
description: An operator needs to optimize the run times for pumps in the water distribution network to minimize energy costs while maintaining required water pressure.

title: Generate Wastewater Compliance Report
description: A plant manager needs to generate a monthly Discharge Monitoring Report (DMR) for the environmental regulator.

title: Manage Water Storage Tank Levels
description: An operator monitors and controls the water levels in storage tanks across the city to ensure adequate supply and pressure.

title: Pressure Reducing Valve (PRV) Control
description: The system needs to adjust a PRV to manage pressure in a water distribution zone with changing demand.

title: Sewer Overflow Prevention
description: During a heavy rainstorm, the system monitors sewer levels to proactively prevent a sanitary sewer overflow (SSO).

title: Analyze Fire Flow Test Data
description: An engineer is analyzing data from a fire flow test to ensure the water system can provide adequate flow for firefighting at a new commercial development.

title: Annual Water Loss Audit
description: A water resource manager is conducting an annual water audit to calculate the amount of non-revenue water (NRW) in the system.

title: Chlorine Residual Monitoring
description: An operator monitors the chlorine residual levels in the water distribution system to ensure disinfection is maintained.

title: Dam Safety Inspection
description: An engineer is performing a routine safety inspection of a dam.

title: New Water Main Disinfection
description: Before a newly installed water main can be put into service, it must be flushed and disinfected.

title: Schedule Customer Water Meter Replacement
description: A water meter has reached the end of its service life and needs to be replaced.

title: Real-Time Hydraulic Modeling
description: A water utility uses a real-time hydraulic model (a 'digital twin') to simulate the effect of operational changes before they are made.

title: Wastewater Lift Station Monitoring
description: A SCADA system is monitoring a wastewater lift station for potential failures.

title: Plan Unidirectional Flushing Program
description: A water quality engineer is planning a unidirectional flushing program to clean water mains and improve water quality in a specific neighborhood.

title: Sewer Smoke Testing
description: A wastewater crew is conducting smoke testing to find sources of rainwater inflow and infiltration into the sewer system.

title: Update Real-Time Arrival Information
description: A bus is delayed due to unexpected traffic. A control center agent must update the real-time passenger information systems.

title: Plan a Bus Detour for a Parade
description: A city has announced a parade that will close several streets. A transit planner must create a detour for an affected bus route.

title: Respond to a Vehicle Breakdown
description: A bus driver reports a mechanical failure. A dispatcher must manage the situation by sending a replacement bus and maintenance crew.

title: Manage a Fare Card Issue
description: A passenger reports that their registered smart card is not working at the turnstile. A customer service agent must investigate.

title: Analyze Ridership Data
description: A transit analyst wants to analyze ridership data to identify the busiest routes and stops, to inform future service planning.

title: Provide Trip Planning Assistance
description: A tourist calls the customer service line for help planning a trip from their hotel to a museum using public transit.

title: Manage Lost and Found
description: A bus driver turns in a wallet found on their bus. An agent must log the item and attempt to contact the owner.

title: Adjust Service for a Special Event
description: A major concert is scheduled. A service planner must add extra late-night train service to accommodate the crowds.

title: Manage Headway Adherence
description: On a high-frequency bus route, two buses get too close together (bus bunching). A dispatcher must intervene to even out the spacing.

title: Handle Security Incident on a Vehicle
description: A train operator uses an emergency button to report a disruptive passenger. A controller must coordinate a response.

title: Add Value to a Smart Card
description: A passenger is at a station kiosk and wants to add $20 to their transit smart card.

title: Report a Station Maintenance Issue
description: A passenger reports that an escalator at a train station is broken. An agent must create a maintenance ticket.

title: Perform Run Cut Analysis
description: A service planner needs to group scheduled bus trips into daily work assignments (runs) for drivers, optimizing for efficiency and adherence to labor rules.

title: Analyze On-Time Performance
description: A manager wants to review the on-time performance (OTP) for a specific bus route from the previous month.

title: Handle a Fare Evasion Incident
description: A fare inspector finds a passenger on a train without a valid ticket. The inspector must issue a citation.

title: Handle a Passenger Complaint
description: A passenger submits a complaint about a bus driver's unprofessional behavior. A customer service manager must investigate.

title: Manage an Automated Passenger Counting (APC) System
description: An analyst notices that data from an APC system on a bus seems incorrect. They must investigate.

title: Manage a Paratransit Booking
description: An eligible passenger with a disability calls to book a door-to-door paratransit ride for a medical appointment.

title: Handle a Station Elevator Outage
description: An elevator at a subway station is out of service, impacting accessibility. The control center must manage the response.

title: Handle a Paratransit No-Show
description: A paratransit vehicle arrives to pick up a passenger, but the passenger is not there. The driver must report the no-show.

title: Handle a Broken Bike Rack on a Bus
description: A passenger reports that the bike rack on the front of a bus is broken and they cannot use it.

title: Generate a National Transit Database (NTD) Report
description: A transit agency must submit its monthly operating data to the federal government's National Transit Database (NTD).

title: Handle Onboard Announcement System Failure
description: A bus driver reports that their automated next-stop announcement system has failed.

title: Handle an ADA Compliance Complaint
description: A passenger in a wheelchair reports that a bus driver refused to let them board because the driver claimed they were taking too long. A manager must investigate this serious complaint.

title: Manage Operator Run Bidding
description: A new set of driver work assignments (runs) is available. Drivers must be allowed to bid on them in order of seniority.

title: Build a Train Consist
description: A yard planner needs to create a consist (a list of locomotives and railcars) for a new outbound train.

title: Authorize Train Movement
description: A train is ready to depart a siding and enter the main line. A network dispatcher must authorize the movement.

title: Manage Yard Switching
description: A yardmaster needs to create a switch list to instruct a crew on how to move railcars around the yard to build an outbound train.

title: Manage Intermodal Container Transfer
description: A container needs to be lifted from a train and mounted onto a truck chassis for final delivery.

title: Manage Crew Rest Periods
description: A crew dispatcher must ensure that a train crew does not violate federally mandated rest period rules.

title: Respond to a Track Defect Report
description: A track inspector reports a defect (e.g., a broken rail). The dispatcher must protect the area by stopping trains.

title: Manage Car Hire Charges
description: A railroad has used a railcar owned by another company. An agent must calculate and process the 'car hire' (per diem rental) payment.

title: Manage Locomotive Fueling
description: A locomotive is running low on fuel. A yard dispatcher must schedule it for fueling.

title: Manage Intermodal Gate Congestion
description: The system detects long wait times for trucks at an intermodal terminal's entry gate. A manager must take action.

title: Report on Terminal Dwell Time
description: A manager wants to analyze the average time railcars spend in a specific yard (dwell time) to identify inefficiencies.

title: Assign a Crew to a Train
description: A train is scheduled to depart. A crew dispatcher needs to assign a qualified and rested crew to operate it.

title: Handle a Hot Box Detector Alert
description: A wayside hot box detector sends an alert for an overheated wheel bearing on a specific railcar in a passing train.

title: Manage Chassis Inventory
description: An intermodal terminal manager needs to ensure there are enough available chassis (the trailer frames that hold containers) for upcoming train arrivals.

title: Handle a Derailment Incident
description: A train has derailed. A control center manager must coordinate the emergency response.

title: Manage a Track Maintenance Window
description: A maintenance crew needs a section of track to be taken out of service for 4 hours to perform repairs.

title: Trace a Missing Railcar
description: A customer is asking for the location of their railcar, but it is not showing up at its expected location. An agent must trace it.

title: Handle a Grade Crossing Malfunction
description: A citizen reports that the lights at a railroad grade crossing are flashing, but no train is coming. A dispatcher must investigate.

title: Handle Special Cargo (Wide Load)
description: A customer needs to ship an oversized piece of equipment that requires special handling and clearance checks.

title: Handle a Blocked Crossing
description: A train has stopped and is blocking a public road crossing for an extended period. The dispatcher must resolve the situation.

title: Request Track Access for Utility Work
description: A utility company needs to work near a railway track and must request permission to ensure the safety of their workers.

title: Manage Private Railcar Storage
description: A customer wants to store their private railcars in the railroad's yard. An agent must process the request and bill for storage.

title: Handle a Major Track Outage
description: A bridge washout has closed a main rail line for an extended period. A manager must re-route all affected trains.

title: Handle a Customer's Railcar Release
description: A customer has finished unloading a railcar at their facility and is releasing it back to the railroad, making it empty and available for its next load.

title: Coordinate a Track Inspection
description: A section of track is due for its mandated quarterly inspection. A manager must schedule the inspection.

title: Manage an Interchange Agreement
description: Two railroads need to formalize the process of exchanging traffic at a specific interchange point.

title: Resolve a Lost Item Request
description: A rider reports they left their phone in a driver's car. A support agent must facilitate its return.

title: Onboard a New Driver
description: A prospective driver has submitted an application. An agent must process it and activate the driver's account.

title: Handle a Trip Payment Dispute
description: A rider claims they were charged for a trip they didn't take. A support agent must investigate.

title: Manage Surge Pricing During an Event
description: After a concert ends, demand for rides skyrockets. The system must manage dynamic 'surge' pricing to attract more drivers to the area.

title: Investigate a Rider's Safety Report
description: A rider submits a report claiming their driver was driving erratically. A trust and safety agent must investigate.

title: Handle Driver Account Deactivation Appeal
description: A driver whose account was deactivated for low ratings is appealing the decision.

title: Handle Cancellation Fee Dispute
description: A rider was charged a cancellation fee but claims the driver never showed up. The support agent must investigate.

title: Handle a Vehicle Accident Report
description: A driver reports they have been in an accident during a trip. A safety agent must manage the initial response.

title: Handle Driver App Technical Issue
description: A driver calls support because their app is frozen and they cannot complete their current trip.

title: Update Driver Documents
description: A driver's vehicle insurance is expiring. They must upload their new insurance card to keep their account active.

title: Handle a Rider No-Show
description: A driver arrives at a pickup location and the rider never shows up. The driver needs to cancel the trip and receive a cancellation fee.

title: Handle a Cleaning Fee Request
description: A driver reports that a rider left a mess in their car and requests a cleaning fee.

title: Handle Rider Complaint About Route
description: A rider complains that their driver took a longer route than necessary, increasing the fare. An agent must investigate.

title: Handle a Pre-Scheduled Ride
description: A rider schedules a trip to the airport for the next day. The system must dispatch a driver at the appropriate time.

title: Verify Driver Identity with Selfie Check
description: To prevent account sharing, a driver is randomly prompted to take a selfie to verify it matches their profile picture before they can go online.

title: Handle a Driver Referral Bonus
description: A new driver signed up using a referral code from an existing driver. After the new driver completes the required number of trips, the referring driver must be paid their bonus.

title: Handle a Multi-Stop Trip Change
description: During a trip with multiple stops, a rider wants to add another stop.

title: Handle a Driver's Rating Dispute
description: A driver claims a low rating they received from a rider was unfair. They want it removed.

title: Handle Driver Deactivation for Safety Violation
description: A driver's background check re-run reveals a new, serious criminal conviction. Their account must be immediately deactivated.

title: Handle a Platform-Wide Outage
description: The ride-sharing app is experiencing a major outage, and neither riders nor drivers can use the service. The support team must manage communications.

title: Process a Toll Reimbursement
description: A driver paid for a toll during a trip. The cost of the toll must be reimbursed to the driver and charged to the rider.

title: Handle an Airport Pickup Request
description: A rider at an airport requests a ride. The system must guide them to the designated ride-share pickup area and manage the driver queue.

title: Handle Account Takeover Suspicion
description: The system detects a suspicious login to a rider's account from a new device in a different country, followed by a trip request.

title: Handle a Community Guideline Violation
description: A driver reports a rider for unprofessional behavior that violates the platform's community guidelines.

title: Handle In-App Feedback
description: A rider leaves feedback through the app suggesting a new feature. This feedback needs to be categorized and routed to the product team.

title: Assign Driver to a New Load
description: A dispatcher needs to assign a newly available load to the most suitable driver based on location, hours of service (HOS), and equipment type.

title: Schedule Preventive Maintenance
description: A truck is approaching a mileage threshold for its scheduled 'A-Service' preventive maintenance. A fleet manager must schedule the service.

title: Log a Safety Incident
description: A driver reports a minor, non-injury accident. A safety manager must log the incident and begin the investigation process.

title: Process Driver Settlement
description: An owner-operator has completed several loads. A settlement specialist needs to process their pay.

title: Handle a Vehicle Breakdown
description: A driver reports that their truck has broken down on the highway. A fleet manager must arrange for a tow and repair.

title: Handle an Hours of Service (HOS) Violation Alert
description: A driver is approaching their maximum allowed driving time. A dispatcher must instruct them to stop.

title: Handle a Roadside Inspection Report
description: A driver undergoes a DOT roadside inspection and receives a violation. The safety manager must log the report and schedule corrective action.

title: Create a Freight Invoice
description: A load has been delivered. An agent must create and send an invoice to the customer.

title: Update a Driver Qualification File
description: A driver's medical certificate is about to expire. A compliance manager must get the new certificate and update their file.

title: Re-route a Truck Due to Road Closure
description: A dispatcher receives an alert about an unexpected highway closure on a driver's route. They must re-route the driver.

title: Manage IFTA Reporting
description: A fuel tax specialist needs to prepare the quarterly International Fuel Tax Agreement (IFTA) report.

title: Handle a Lumper Fee
description: A driver has to pay a 'lumper' (third-party service) to unload their trailer at a receiving facility. The driver needs to be reimbursed.

title: Find a Backhaul Load
description: A driver is about to deliver a load, leaving them empty. A dispatcher needs to find a 'backhaul' load originating near the delivery location to avoid an empty return trip.

title: Handle a Repair Order
description: A mechanic needs to perform a repair on a truck, documenting parts used and labor hours.

title: Update Customer with Revised ETA
description: A driver is delayed by weather. The dispatcher must provide the customer with a new estimated time of arrival (ETA).

title: Manage a DOT Audit
description: A safety manager receives a notification of an upcoming DOT compliance audit and must prepare the required documentation.

title: Handle an Accessorial Charge Dispute
description: A customer is disputing a detention charge on an invoice, claiming the driver was not detained.

title: Track a Driver's Location
description: A customer is asking for a real-time update on the location of the truck carrying their shipment.

title: Manage Maintenance Parts Inventory
description: A mechanic uses a part (e.g., a filter) for a repair. The inventory system must be updated, and the part reordered if stock is low.

title: Process a Fuel Purchase
description: A driver uses a company fuel card to buy fuel. The transaction must be logged and associated with their truck.

title: Optimize a Multi-Stop Route
description: A driver has a load with three delivery stops. A dispatcher needs to sequence the stops to create the most efficient route.

title: Handle a Parts Warranty Claim
description: A part that was recently replaced on a truck has failed prematurely. The fleet manager needs to file a warranty claim with the part supplier.

title: Assign a Trailer to a Tractor
description: A driver needs to pick up a pre-loaded trailer from a yard. A dispatcher must assign the specific trailer to the driver's tractor.

title: Manage a Trailer Pool at a Customer
description: A high-volume customer has a 'trailer pool' where empty trailers are dropped for them to load at their convenience. A dispatcher must manage the pool's inventory.

title: Handle an Overage, Shortage, and Damage (OS&D) Report
description: A driver at a delivery location reports a discrepancy between the bill of lading and what is being unloaded (e.g., one pallet is over).

title: Book a Standard Hotel Room
description: A customer wants to book a standard king room for two nights.

title: Cancel a Hotel Reservation
description: A customer needs to cancel their upcoming hotel reservation.

title: Request a Late Check-out
description: An in-house guest requests a late check-out for their room.

title: Dispute a Minibar Charge on Folio
description: A guest checking out is disputing a charge for a minibar item they claim they did not consume.

title: Enroll in Guest Loyalty Program
description: A new customer wants to enroll in the hotel's loyalty program.

title: Modify Hotel Reservation Dates
description: A customer needs to change the dates of their existing hotel reservation, moving it one week later.

title: Order Room Service
description: An in-house guest calls to order a club sandwich and a soda from the room service menu.

title: Split Folio for Two Guests
description: Two guests sharing a room are checking out and want to split the bill. One will pay for the room, the other for all incidental charges.

title: Redeem Loyalty Points for Stay
description: A loyalty program member wants to book a room using their points.

title: Book Adjoining Hotel Rooms
description: A family requires two adjoining rooms for their stay.

title: Request Housekeeping Service
description: An in-house guest requests extra towels and for their trash to be emptied.

title: Process Prepayment for Stay
description: A customer wants to prepay for their entire hotel stay in advance to receive a discounted rate.

title: Update Guest Preferences
description: A returning loyalty member wants to update their profile to always request a high-floor room away from the elevator.

title: Handle a Room Noise Complaint
description: A guest calls the front desk at 11 PM to complain about a loud party in the adjacent room.

title: Process a Group Hotel Booking
description: A tour operator wants to book a block of 10 rooms for a group for a 3-night stay.

title: Handle Check-in with Mobile Key
description: A guest who has pre-checked in on their mobile app arrives at the hotel and wants to get their mobile key.

title: Post Parking Charge to Folio
description: A hotel guest has used the valet parking service and the charge needs to be added to their room bill.

title: Merge Duplicate Loyalty Profiles
description: A guest has accidentally created two loyalty profiles and wants to merge them into one.

title: Book a Hotel Conference Room
description: A company needs to book a conference room for a half-day meeting for 10 people.

title: Handle a Lost and Found Inquiry
description: A guest who checked out yesterday calls to report they may have left their tablet in their room.

title: Apply a Corporate Rate to a Booking
description: An employee of a partner company is booking a room and wants to use their corporate discount.

title: Add Comment to Guest Profile
description: A guest mentions at check-out that they have a severe feather allergy. The agent needs to add this to their profile for future stays.

title: Book an Accessible Hotel Room
description: A guest who uses a wheelchair needs to book a room with a roll-in shower.

title: Arrange Airport Shuttle Service
description: A hotel guest needs to arrange for the hotel's shuttle service to take them to the airport for their departure.

title: Handle Incorrect Room Rate Charge
description: A guest claims the rate charged on their folio is higher than the rate quoted in their confirmation email.

title: Handle Post-Stay Feedback
description: A loyalty member sends an email complaining about slow service at the hotel restaurant during their recent stay.

title: Handle Arrival on Incorrect Check-in Date
description: A guest arrives to check in, but their reservation is for the following day.

title: Troubleshoot In-Room Wi-Fi
description: A guest calls the front desk reporting that they cannot connect to the Wi-Fi in their room.

title: Process Payment for Third-Party Booking
description: A guest checking out booked through a third-party website (e.g., Expedia) and needs to pay for incidental charges.

title: Recognize a VIP Guest
description: A high-tier loyalty member is checking in. The agent needs to acknowledge their status and provide an upgrade.

title: Change Payment Method on File
description: A guest with an upcoming reservation wants to change the credit card used to guarantee the booking.

title: Book a Spa Appointment
description: A hotel guest wants to book a 60-minute deep tissue massage at the hotel spa.

title: Process a Standard Guest Check-out
description: A guest is at the front desk and wishes to check out of their room.

title: Gift Loyalty Status
description: A top-tier loyalty member wants to use their annual benefit to gift Gold status to a family member.

title: Flight Delay Causes Missed Tour
description: A customer's flight was delayed, causing them to miss a non-refundable tour they booked as part of a package. They want a refund for the tour.

title: Book Museum Tickets
description: A family of four wants to book tickets for the Metropolitan Museum of Art for a specific date.

title: Inquire About Theme Park Hours
description: A visitor wants to know the opening and closing times for Disneyland on an upcoming Saturday.

title: Create a Vacation Package
description: A customer wants to book a 3-night vacation package to Orlando, including flights, hotel, and theme park tickets.

title: Validate a Tour Voucher
description: A tourist arrives for a city bus tour and presents a pre-paid voucher to the agent at the departure point.

title: Book a Guided City Tour
description: A couple wants to book two spots on a guided walking tour of historical Rome.

title: Ask About Attraction Accessibility
description: A visitor with mobility issues wants to know if the Eiffel Tower is wheelchair accessible.

title: Book a Dinner Cruise Package
description: A customer wants to book a dinner cruise package on the Seine River in Paris.

title: Validate Theme Park Entry Ticket
description: A family arrives at a theme park entrance and presents their pre-purchased e-tickets on a smartphone.

title: Cancel a Tour Booking
description: A customer needs to cancel their booking for a wine tasting tour.

title: Get Directions to an Attraction
description: A tourist asks for the best way to get to the Louvre Museum using public transportation.

title: Customize a Private Tour
description: A client wants to create a custom full-day private tour of London, including the Tower of London, Buckingham Palace, and a specific pub for lunch.

title: Handle a Timed-Entry Pass
description: A visitor arrives at an attraction 30 minutes after their scheduled timed-entry slot.

title: Reschedule an Activity Booking
description: A customer needs to reschedule their ziplining tour from Saturday to Sunday.

title: Provide Event Schedule for a Festival
description: A visitor at a music festival wants to know the performance schedule for the main stage today.

title: Build a Family Attraction Pass
description: A family wants to buy a city pass that includes entry to the aquarium, the science museum, and a hop-on-hop-off bus tour.

title: Upgrade to a Fast Pass
description: A visitor already inside a theme park decides they want to upgrade their standard ticket to a Fast Pass to skip the lines.

title: Book a Group Tour
description: A school teacher wants to book a museum tour for a class of 25 students.

title: Inquire About Lost Item at Attraction

title: Detect Pedestrian Jaywalking Hotspot
description: An analyst reviews camera footage to identify locations where pedestrians frequently cross the street unsafely, suggesting the need for a new crosswalk.

title: Analyze Bus Schedule Adherence
description: The transit manager wants a report on which bus routes most frequently run late.

title: Analyze Parking Violation Hotspots
description: A parking enforcement manager wants to know which areas have the most parking violations to better allocate enforcement officers.

title: Detect Wrong-Way Driver on Highway
description: Sensors and cameras on a highway detect a vehicle traveling in the wrong direction. An operator must take immediate action.

title: Adjust Bus Headways Based on Real-Time Demand
description: Passenger demand on a certain route is higher than usual. An operator increases bus frequency to reduce wait times.

title: Find an Open Handicapped Parking Space
description: A user with a disability uses the city app to find the nearest available handicapped parking space.

title: Optimize Waste Collection Route
description: An operator needs to generate an optimized collection route for a waste management truck based on real-time smart bin fill levels.

title: Detect and Locate Water Main Break
description: Flow sensors in the water network indicate a significant pressure drop, suggesting a major leak or main break.

title: Balance Electrical Grid During Heatwave
description: A heatwave is causing record electricity demand. An operator must prevent a blackout by balancing the grid.

title: Investigate Noise Complaint Using Sensors
description: A citizen files a late-night noise complaint. An operator uses noise sensors to verify and identify the source.

title: Restore Power After Localized Outage
description: A transformer fails, causing a power outage in a residential neighborhood. An operator must use FLISR to restore power.

title: Check Water Quality After Contamination Alert
description: An upstream sensor detects a potential contaminant. An operator must check downstream sensors to see if it has reached the public water supply.

title: Identify Source of Illegal Dumping in Waterway
description: A water quality sensor detects an illegal chemical discharge into a river. An operator must trace the source.

title: Reroute Wastewater Flow to Prevent Overflow
description: During a heavy storm, a wastewater interceptor is nearing capacity. An operator must reroute flow to a storage basin to prevent a sanitary sewer overflow.

title: Identify Inefficient Bins for Relocation
description: An operator analyzes waste collection data to find smart bins that are consistently underutilized, suggesting they could be relocated.

title: Manage City-Wide Irrigation During Drought
description: Due to drought conditions, an operator must reduce water usage for irrigating public parks and green spaces.

title: Correlate Power Outage with Traffic Signal Failure
description: A series of traffic signals go dark. An operator must determine if this is related to a power grid failure.

title: Schedule Street Sweeping Based on Air Quality Data
description: To combat particulate matter pollution, an operator schedules street sweeping on roads with high dust levels detected by mobile sensors.

title: Identify Unusually High Water Consumption
description: A smart water meter reports unusually high, continuous water usage at a residence, suggesting a major leak.

title: Manage Landfill Methane Gas Levels
description: Sensors at the city landfill report rising methane gas levels, requiring an operator to activate the gas flare system.

title: Optimize Solar Panel Cleaning Schedule
description: An operator analyzes energy output and soiling data from solar panels on city buildings to schedule cleanings only when needed.

title: Adjust Reservoir Release for Flood Control
description: Heavy rain is forecasted, and a reservoir is already near full capacity. An operator must proactively release water to create storage capacity and prevent downstream flooding.

title: Detect Gas Leak in Utility Network
description: A methane sensor in a gas utility pipeline reports a significant leak. An operator must initiate an emergency response.

title: Forecast Energy Production from Solar Farm
description: A grid operator needs a forecast of the expected energy production from the city's main solar farm for the next day to plan other generation.

title: Investigate Cause of Widespread Air Quality Alert
description: A sudden, city-wide drop in air quality is detected. An operator must investigate the cause, suspecting a regional event like a wildfire.

title: Identify Failing Electrical Transformer
description: Sensors on a transformer show its temperature is steadily rising and its oil quality is degrading, indicating it is at high risk of failure.

description: Agent must manage a high-fidelity Smart Factory simulation with streaming telemetry.

title: Process In-Store Return with Receipt
description: A customer wants to return an item they bought last week and has the original receipt.

title: Answer Product Availability Call
description: A customer calls the store to ask if a specific item is in stock.

title: Resolve Damaged Item from Online Order
description: A customer calls to report that an item they received from an online order arrived broken.

title: Customer Resets Online Account Password
description: A customer has forgotten the password for their online account and uses the website's self-service tool to reset it.

title: Process an Online Return by Mail
description: A customer service agent processes a returned package that a customer mailed back from an online order.

title: Answer a Product Warranty Question
description: A customer calls customer service to ask about the warranty on a product they purchased six months ago.

title: Resolve Incorrect Item Shipped
description: A customer received the wrong item in their online order and contacts customer service via chat.

title: Update Customer Shipping Address
description: A customer logs into their online account to update their default shipping address.

title: Process an In-Store Exchange
description: A customer wants to exchange a shirt they bought for a different size.

title: Answer Store Hours Question
description: A customer uses the website's chatbot to ask for the store hours of a specific location.

title: Resolve a Missing Package
description: A customer calls because their online order was marked as 'Delivered' by the carrier, but they never received it.

title: Merge Duplicate Customer Accounts
description: A customer service agent discovers a customer has two online accounts (e.g., one with a typo in the email). The accounts need to be merged.

title: Process a Return Without a Receipt
description: A customer wants to return an item but does not have the receipt.

title: Inquire About Material Composition
description: A customer with a wool allergy calls to ask if a specific sweater contains any wool.

title: Resolve a Promo Code Issue
description: A customer is trying to use a promo code online, but the website says it's invalid. They contact customer support.

title: Update Email Preferences
description: A customer wants to unsubscribe from marketing emails but continue receiving order notifications.

title: Handle Return of a Gift
description: A customer wants to return a gift they received. They have a gift receipt.

title: Answer Product Comparison Question
description: A customer in the store is trying to decide between two different models of a coffee maker and asks an associate for help.

title: Resolve Double Charge Claim
description: A customer calls claiming they were charged twice for a single online order.

title: Close a Customer Account
description: A customer requests to have their online account and all associated data deleted.

title: Place an Online Order
description: A customer browses a retail website and places an order for several items.

title: Pick and Pack an Order
description: A warehouse associate needs to pick and pack a new online order.

title: Process a BOPIS Order
description: A customer has placed a 'Buy Online, Pick up In Store' (BOPIS) order. A store associate needs to prepare it.

title: Customer Cancels a Subscription
description: A customer logs into their account to cancel their monthly subscription box.

title: Apply a Promo Code at Checkout
description: A customer is at the checkout page and wants to apply a promotional code for a discount.

title: Check Order Status Online
description: A customer wants to check the status of an order they placed yesterday.

title: Customer Picks Up BOPIS Order
description: A customer arrives in-store to pick up their 'Buy Online, Pick up In Store' order.

title: Modify a Subscription Item
description: A customer wants to swap an item in their upcoming monthly subscription box for a different one.

title: Checkout as a Guest
description: A new customer wants to place an order without creating an account.

title: Handle Out-of-Stock Item in an Order
description: During picking, a warehouse associate discovers that the last unit of an item in an order is damaged and cannot be shipped.

title: Send BOPIS Pickup Reminder
description: A customer's 'Buy Online, Pick up In Store' order has been ready for pickup for three days but they have not collected it.

title: Skip a Monthly Subscription
description: A customer wants to skip their next monthly subscription delivery but not cancel the subscription entirely.

title: Use a Saved Payment Method
description: A returning customer is checking out and wants to use their credit card that is already saved to their account.

title: Provide Shipping Notification
description: An online order is picked up by the shipping carrier. The system needs to notify the customer.

title: Handle BOPIS Order Cancellation
description: A customer's 'Buy Online, Pick up In Store' order was not picked up within the 7-day window and needs to be cancelled.

title: Update Subscription Frequency
description: A customer wants to change their subscription from being delivered every month to every two months.

title: Handle Failed Payment at Checkout
description: A customer tries to place an online order, but their credit card payment is declined.

title: Split an Order for Shipping
description: An online order contains two items, but one is in a different warehouse. The order needs to be split into two separate shipments.

title: Substitute Item in a BOPIS Order
description: While picking a 'Buy Online, Pick up In Store' grocery order, an associate finds an item is out of stock and needs to substitute it.

title: Update Subscription Payment Method
description: A customer's credit card on file for their subscription has expired. They need to update it.

title: Perform a Cycle Count
description: A store associate is assigned to perform a cycle count for the 'men's denim' category to verify inventory accuracy.

title: Execute a Planogram
description: A merchandising team member needs to reset a section of the store according to a new planogram.

title: Receive a Warehouse Shipment
description: A backroom associate needs to receive a daily shipment of goods from the distribution center.

title: Activate Weekly Promotions
description: A store manager needs to activate the new set of weekly promotions in the POS system.

title: Investigate an Inventory Discrepancy
description: A cycle count has revealed a significant discrepancy for a high-value item. A manager needs to investigate the cause.

title: Set Up a Promotional Display
description: An associate needs to set up a promotional end-cap display for a new product launch.

title: Restock Shelves from Backroom
description: A sales associate notices that a popular item is running low on the sales floor and needs to restock it from the backroom overstock.

title: Perform a Price Change
description: A category manager has decided to permanently lower the price of an item. A store associate needs to update the shelf label.

title: Transfer Stock to Another Store
description: A nearby store is out of a key item, and the district manager has asked this store to transfer some of its stock to them.

title: Remove Expired Products from Shelf
description: A grocery store associate is checking for expired items in the dairy section.

title: Process a Direct Store Delivery (DSD)
description: A vendor (e.g., a soda bottler) arrives to deliver products directly to the store, bypassing the warehouse.

title: Verify Promotional Price at POS
description: A customer disputes the price of an item at checkout, saying it was on sale. The associate needs to verify the promotion.

title: Mark an Item for Clearance
description: An item is being discontinued and needs to be marked down for clearance.

title: Consolidate Product Facings
description: As stock of an item sells down, an associate needs to consolidate the remaining units to make the shelf look full (a process called 'facing').

title: Break Down Shipping Cartons
description: After restocking shelves, an associate needs to break down the empty cardboard cartons for recycling.

title: Create a Manual Promotion
description: A store manager decides to create a one-day 'manager's special' on a specific item to clear out slow-moving stock.

title: Process a Return to Vendor (RTV)
description: A shipment of items arrived damaged from the manufacturer and needs to be returned for credit.

title: Update Product Location in System
description: A product's primary location has been moved to a different aisle. The system needs to be updated.

title: Work a Restocking Report
description: A system-generated report shows items on the sales floor that have fallen below their presentation minimum. An associate needs to restock them.

title: Verify Price Accuracy
description: As part of a regular audit, an associate needs to scan a sample of items in an aisle to ensure the shelf price matches the price in the POS system.

title: Enroll Customer in Loyalty Program
description: At checkout, a store associate asks a customer if they would like to join the free loyalty program.

title: Send a Personalized Offer
description: A customer who frequently buys a specific brand of coffee has not purchased it in a while. The marketing system automatically sends them a personalized offer.

title: Launch an Email Campaign
description: A marketing manager needs to launch a weekly email campaign announcing new arrivals to all subscribed customers.

title: Respond to a Negative Product Review
description: A customer has left a 1-star review for a product on the website. A customer service agent needs to respond.

title: Customer Redeems Loyalty Reward
description: A loyalty member has enough points for a $5 discount and wants to apply it to their purchase.

title: Send an Abandoned Cart Email
description: A customer adds items to their online cart but leaves the website without checking out.

title: Track Campaign Performance
description: A marketing analyst wants to check the performance of an email campaign that was sent yesterday.

title: Send a Post-Purchase Survey
description: A day after a customer's online order is delivered, the system automatically sends them a request to review the products they purchased.

title: Look Up Loyalty Points Balance
description: A customer calls to ask how many loyalty points they have.

title: Send a Birthday Offer
description: It's the first day of the month, and the marketing system needs to send a special birthday offer to all loyalty members whose birthday is this month.

title: Create A/B Test for an Email Campaign
description: A marketing manager wants to test two different subject lines for an upcoming promotional email to see which one gets a higher open rate.

title: Moderate a Product Review
description: A new product review has been submitted and is waiting for moderation before it appears on the website.

title: Add Points Manually to Loyalty Account
description: A customer forgot to use their loyalty card during a previous purchase. A customer service agent needs to add the points manually.

title: Create a Segmented Audience
description: A marketer wants to create a special promotion for 'high-value' customers.

title: Pause a Marketing Campaign
description: A marketing manager discovers an error in a scheduled email campaign and needs to pause it before it sends.

title: Analyze Customer Feedback
description: A manager wants to understand common themes from recent customer satisfaction surveys.

title: Upgrade Customer to VIP Loyalty Tier
description: A customer's spending has reached the threshold to be upgraded to the VIP tier of the loyalty program.

title: Send 'We Miss You' Email
description: The marketing system needs to send a re-engagement email to customers who have not made a purchase in the last six months.

title: Create a Social Media Campaign
description: A social media manager is creating a campaign to promote a flash sale.

title: Reject a Product Review
description: A product review is submitted that contains profanity and is not a legitimate review of the product.

title: Process a Standard Sale
description: A store associate needs to process a standard cash purchase for a customer at the Point of Sale (POS) system.

title: Open the Store for the Day
description: A store manager needs to perform the morning opening procedures.

title: Find a Product for a Customer
description: A customer asks a store associate for help finding a specific product.

title: Assign Daily Tasks
description: A shift supervisor needs to assign restocking and cleaning tasks to associates for the current shift.

title: Process Credit Card Sale with Loyalty
description: An associate processes a sale for a customer paying with a credit card who is also a member of the loyalty program.

title: Close Store and Reconcile Cash
description: A manager needs to perform the end-of-day closing procedures, including cash reconciliation.

title: Check Stock in Another Store
description: A customer wants an item that is out of stock. An associate needs to check if it's available at a nearby store.

title: Clock In for a Shift
description: A store associate arrives for their shift and needs to clock in.

title: Process a Tax-Exempt Sale
description: A customer from a non-profit organization is making a purchase and has a tax-exempt certificate.

title: Perform a Mid-Day Cash Pickup
description: A POS terminal has accumulated too much cash, and a manager needs to perform a cash pickup to move excess funds to the safe.

title: Assist Customer at Self-Checkout
description: A customer at a self-checkout kiosk needs help because an item won't scan.

title: View Upcoming Shift Schedule
description: An associate wants to check their work schedule for the next week.

title: Suspend and Resume a Transaction
description: A customer at checkout realizes they forgot an item and needs to leave the line to get it. The associate needs to suspend the transaction to help the next customer.

title: Report a Safety Hazard
description: An associate discovers a liquid spill on the floor and needs to report it so it can be cleaned up.

title: Provide Product Warranty Information
description: A customer is asking about the warranty for an electronic item they are about to purchase.

title: Request Time Off
description: An associate needs to request a day off for a future date.

title: Sell a Gift Card
description: A customer wants to purchase a $50 gift card.

title: Conduct Daily Team Huddle
description: A manager starts the day by leading a team huddle to communicate daily sales goals and priorities.

title: Handle a Spill Cleanup
description: A customer has spilled a drink. An associate needs to clean it up and document the action.

title: Swap Shifts with a Coworker
description: An associate needs to swap their upcoming shift with a coworker.

title: Find Office Lease Space for Client
description: A tech startup needs to find a 5,000 sqft office space for lease. The agent must search for suitable properties.

title: Analyze a Commercial Investment Property
description: An investor client is considering buying a multi-tenant retail property and needs a financial analysis.

title: Negotiate a Letter of Intent (LOI)
description: A tenant client wants to lease an office space. The agent must draft and negotiate the LOI with the landlord's broker.

title: Manage Commercial Property Maintenance
description: The property manager for a retail center needs to schedule quarterly HVAC servicing for all tenant units.

title: Conduct Due Diligence for Commercial Purchase
description: A client is under contract to buy a small apartment building. The agent must manage the due diligence process.

title: Administer a Commercial Lease
description: A new tenant has signed a lease for a retail space. The property manager must set them up in the system.

title: Analyze Market Lease Rates
description: A landlord client wants to know if they should increase the asking rent for a vacant office suite. The agent must analyze current market rates.

title: Prepare Commercial Sale Marketing Package
description: An agent is listing a commercial building for sale and needs to create a comprehensive marketing package (offering memorandum).

title: Track Annual CAM Reconciliation

title: Verify Property Tax Information
description: When creating a new listing, an agent needs to verify the official property tax amount and check for any special assessments.

title: Check HOA Documents for Buyer
description: A buyer is considering a condo and the agent needs to review the HOA documents for potential red flags.

title: Coordinate a Home Inspection
description: A buyer client needs to schedule their home inspection within the contingency period.

title: Handle a Low Appraisal
description: A property's appraisal came in below the purchase price. The agent must advise the client on how to proceed.

title: Follow Up on an Old Lead
description: An agent needs to re-engage a buyer lead that went cold 6 months ago.

title: Check Zoning Regulations
description: A buyer wants to know if they can build an Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) on a property they are considering.

title: Process a Listing Cancellation
description: A seller has decided not to sell their home and wants to cancel the listing agreement.

title: Send Weekly Listing Performance Report
description: An agent needs to send a weekly performance update to a seller client.

title: Prepare for Final Walk-Through
description: The final walk-through is scheduled for tomorrow. The agent needs to prepare a checklist for their buyer client.

title: Add a New Contact to CRM
description: An agent meets a potential client at an open house and needs to add them to their CRM for follow-up.

title: Order a 'For Sale' Sign
description: For a new listing, the agent needs to order the installation of a 'For Sale' sign at the property.

title: Archive a Closed Transaction File
description: A transaction has closed and funded. The agent must ensure all documents are in the file and archive it for compliance.

title: Request Showing Feedback
description: An agent showed a listing yesterday. The listing agent needs to request feedback from them.

title: Research Property Deed History
description: A client is interested in the ownership history of a historic home. The agent needs to research the property's deed history.

title: Explain Closing Costs to a First-Time Buyer
description: A first-time homebuyer is confused about the estimated closing costs. The agent needs to explain the different fees.

title: Coordinate Home Staging
description: To maximize a home's appeal, an agent and seller decide to have it professionally staged. The agent must coordinate the process.

title: Create a Drip Campaign for New Leads
description: An agent wants to create an automated email drip campaign to nurture new buyer leads over several weeks.

title: Manage a Transaction Checklist
description: For a new property under contract, an agent needs to use a transaction checklist to ensure all tasks and deadlines are met.

title: Calculate a Seller Net Sheet
description: A seller is considering an offer and wants to know how much money they will walk away with after all costs. The agent must prepare a seller net sheet.

title: Handle an Agent-to-Agent Referral
description: An agent receives a referral for a buyer moving to their city from an out-of-state agent. They must manage the referral agreement and client handoff.

title: New Buyer Financial Qualification
description: An agent must assess a new home buyer's financial readiness and guide them to get pre-approved for a mortgage.

title: Create New Property Listing
description: An agent needs to create a compelling and accurate MLS listing for a new property.

title: Submit a Purchase Offer
description: A buyer wants to make an offer on a property. The agent must draft and submit the offer package.

title: Manage Inspection Contingency
description: After a home inspection reveals issues, the buyer's agent must negotiate repairs or credits with the seller's agent.

title: Handle a Multiple Offer Situation
description: A listing agent receives multiple offers on a property and must advise the seller on how to proceed.

title: Coordinate Professional Home Staging
description: A listing agent advises a seller to use a professional stager to improve the home's appeal and coordinates the process.

title: Handle a Lowball Offer
description: A listing agent receives a purchase offer significantly below the asking price and must advise the seller on how to respond.

title: Verify 'Clear to Close'
description: An agent must coordinate with the lender and title company to confirm that all conditions are met for the transaction to close.

title: Generate a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA)
description: A prospective seller wants to know what their home is worth. The agent must prepare a CMA to propose a listing price.

title: Manage the Appraisal Process
description: After a contract is signed, the buyer's lender orders an appraisal. The listing agent must provide information to the appraiser.

title: Follow Up on an Online Lead
description: An agent receives a new lead from Zillow who is interested in one of their listings.

title: Manage the Final Walk-Through
description: The buyer's agent coordinates and conducts the final walk-through of the property just before closing.

title: Create a Virtual Tour for a Listing
description: To enhance marketing, a listing agent arranges for a 3D virtual tour of a property.

title: Coordinate with Closing Attorney/Title Company
description: A transaction coordinator must ensure the closing attorney has all necessary documents and information to prepare for closing.

title: Handle a Backup Offer
description: A property is already under contract, but another buyer wants to submit a backup offer in case the first deal falls through.

title: Advise a Buyer Interested in a FSBO
description: A buyer represented by an agent wants to make an offer on a home being sold 'For Sale By Owner' (FSBO).

title: Request Showing Feedback
description: After a buyer's agent shows a property, the listing agent follows up to request feedback.

title: Handle a Home Sale Contingent Offer
description: A buyer makes an offer that is contingent on them selling their current home. The listing agent must advise the seller.

title: Run a 'Just Listed' Social Media Ad Campaign
description: An agent wants to run a paid ad campaign on Facebook and Instagram for a new luxury listing.

title: Terminate a Purchase Contract
description: During the inspection period, a buyer decides to terminate the purchase contract due to major structural issues found.

title: Host an Agent-Only Open House
description: For a new high-end listing, an agent hosts a catered open house specifically for other real estate agents to preview the property.

title: Qualify a Buyer Before a Showing
description: Before showing a property, a listing agent wants to ensure the potential buyer is qualified.

title: Verify HOA Documents
description: A buyer is purchasing a condo and their agent must review the Homeowners Association (HOA) documents.

title: Explain Closing Costs to a First-Time Buyer
description: A first-time home buyer is confused by the list of closing costs on their loan estimate. Their agent must explain the different fees.

title: Manage a Post-Closing Issue
description: A week after closing, a buyer discovers a latent defect (e.g., a hidden leak) that was not disclosed. They contact their agent for help.

title: Advise a Client on Renting vs. Buying
description: A potential client is unsure if they should continue renting or buy their first home. The agent must provide a balanced analysis.

title: Manage CRM and Sphere of Influence (SOI)
description: An agent wants to systematically market to their past clients and personal contacts (their SOI).

title: Handle an Offer with an Escalation Clause
description: In a competitive market, a buyer submits an offer with an escalation clause that automatically increases their offer price above other offers.

title: Prepare for a Listing Presentation
description: An agent has an appointment with a potential seller and needs to prepare a compelling presentation to win the listing.

title: Host a Weekend Open House
description: An agent is hosting an open house and must manage marketing, setup, and visitor follow-up.

title: New Purchase Agreement Intake
description: An agent submits a fully executed purchase agreement. The transaction coordinator must review it and create a new transaction file.

title: Order Title and Escrow Services
description: For a new transaction, the TC needs to open escrow and order a preliminary title report.

title: Manage Inspection Contingency
description: The buyer has completed their inspection and submitted a repair request. The TC must manage this process.

title: Coordinate Closing
description: A transaction has received the 'clear to close' from the lender. The TC must coordinate the final steps.

title: Verify Earnest Money Deposit
description: The TC must confirm that the buyer has deposited the earnest money with escrow by the contractual deadline.

title: Request HOA Documents
description: A property under contract is in a Homeowners Association (HOA). The TC needs to order the HOA resale package.

title: Manage Appraisal Process
description: The TC needs to coordinate the property appraisal for a financed transaction.

title: Create Commission Disbursement Authorization (CDA)
description: A transaction is closing tomorrow. The TC needs to create a CDA to send to the title company so the agent gets paid.

title: Process a Contract Addendum
description: The buyer and seller have agreed to change the closing date. The TC needs to process the addendum.

title: Send Weekly Transaction Status Update
description: The TC needs to send a weekly status update to the client and agent on a pending transaction.

title: Confirm Lender's Loan Commitment
description: The financing contingency deadline is approaching. The TC must confirm the buyer has secured their loan commitment from the lender.

title: Close Out a Transaction File
description: A property has successfully closed. The TC needs to perform the final steps to close the file.

title: Handle an Appraisal Shortfall
description: The property appraisal comes in below the contract price. The TC must notify the agents and manage the next steps.

title: Distribute Final Closing Documents
description: After a successful closing, the TC must create a final package of all transaction documents for the client.

title: Request Signature on Repair Addendum
description: After negotiations, both parties have agreed on repairs. The TC must get the final repair addendum signed.

title: Track Buyer's Loan Application Progress
description: Early in a transaction, the TC needs to ensure the buyer has formally applied for their loan.

title: Order a Home Warranty
description: The purchase contract specifies that the seller will provide a one-year home warranty for the buyer. The TC must order it.

title: Coordinate Utility Transfer for Closing
description: A few days before closing, the TC needs to remind the buyer and seller to arrange for the transfer of utilities.

title: Check on Title Commitment
description: The TC needs to ensure the title commitment has been issued and reviewed by the deadline.

title: Handle Removal of Contingencies
description: The buyer is satisfied with their investigations and is ready to remove their inspection and appraisal contingencies.

title: Review Preliminary Title Report
description: The TC has received the preliminary title report and must review it for any issues or exceptions.

title: Apply for Unemployment Benefits
description: A recently laid-off citizen needs to apply for unemployment insurance benefits online.

title: Renew a Driver's License Online
description: A citizen needs to renew their driver's license and wants to complete the process online.

title: Report a Pothole
description: A citizen wants to report a large pothole on a city street using the 311 service.

title: File a Property Tax Assessment Appeal
description: A homeowner believes their property tax assessment is too high and wants to file an appeal.

title: Request a Building Inspection
description: A construction contractor needs to schedule a framing inspection for a new home build.

title: Apply for SNAP Benefits
description: A low-income individual wants to apply for the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP).

title: Apply for a New Business License
description: An entrepreneur is starting a new cafe and needs to apply for a city business license.

title: Intake for Social Services
description: A family is seeking assistance and a social worker is conducting an initial intake interview.

title: Pay Property Taxes Online
description: A homeowner wants to pay their semi-annual property tax bill online.

description: A non-profit organization is applying for a grant from the city's arts council.

title: Register as a City Vendor
description: A small business wants to register with the city so they can bid on government contracts.

title: Request a Document via FOIA
description: A journalist is filing a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request for emails from the mayor's office.

title: Report a Broken Streetlight
description: A resident reports that a streetlight on their block has been out for several days.

title: Inquire About a High Water Bill
description: A resident calls because their quarterly water bill is much higher than usual.

title: Report Missed Trash Collection
description: A resident reports that their trash was not picked up on the scheduled collection day.

title: Report a Health Code Violation
description: A citizen wants to file a complaint about unsanitary conditions at a local restaurant.

title: Inquire About Becoming a Foster Parent
description: A citizen is interested in becoming a foster parent and is calling for information.

title: Set Up a Tax Payment Plan
description: A citizen owes back taxes and wants to set up a monthly payment plan.

title: Submit a Bid for a Government Contract

title: Check Restaurant Health Inspection Results
description: A citizen wants to check the latest health inspection report for a specific restaurant.

title: Request a Copy of a Birth Certificate

title: Report Suspected Child Abuse or Neglect
description: A citizen is calling a hotline to make a report of suspected child abuse.

title: Check Grant Reporting Status
description: A non-profit that received a government grant is checking to see if their quarterly report was received.

title: Inquire About a Department's Budget

title: Provide Documents for a Program Audit
description: A state auditor is conducting an audit of a public housing program and has requested specific case files.

title: Check Park Pavilion Availability
description: A citizen wants to reserve a park pavilion for a birthday party and needs to check availability.

description: A resident is asking for the timeline and scope of a road construction project happening on their street.

description: A citizen wants to report a car that has been parked on their street for several weeks and appears to be abandoned.

title: Inquire About a Tax Refund Status
description: A citizen who filed their income taxes wants to check the status of their refund.

description: A vendor who bid on a contract wants to know if a decision has been made.

title: Track Department Spending Against Budget
description: A department head wants to see a report of their department's spending year-to-date compared to their budget.

title: Search Public Property Records
description: A citizen wants to find the name of the owner of a specific property.

title: Schedule a Bulk Item Pickup
description: A resident needs to schedule a special pickup for a large item, like an old mattress.

title: Report a Lost or Stolen EBT Card

title: Check Status of Professional License
description: A nurse wants to check the status of their state nursing license online.

title: Track Asset Maintenance History

description: A building inspector has found a violation during an inspection and needs to issue a citation.

title: Check Voter Registration Status
description: A citizen wants to check if they are registered to vote at their current address.

title: Renew a Professional License
description: An engineer needs to renew their state professional engineering license.

title: Award a Contract
description: The procurement department is ready to officially award a contract to the winning bidder.

title: Publish an Agency's Annual Report
description: A public agency is ready to publish its annual financial report to its website for public access.

title: Report Graffiti
description: A citizen is reporting graffiti on a public building.

title: Check the Status of a FOIA Request
description: A journalist who filed a FOIA request two weeks ago is calling to check on its status.

title: Schedule Preventive Maintenance on Asset
description: A public works manager is scheduling annual preventive maintenance for a city-owned HVAC unit.

title: Handle a Utility Billing Dispute
description: A customer disputes their water bill, claiming the meter reading must be wrong.

title: Follow Up on an Uncorrected Violation
description: A code enforcement officer is following up on a citation for an overgrown lawn that has not been corrected by the deadline.

title: Register to Vote
description: A citizen who recently moved to the state needs to register to vote.

title: Check EBT Card Balance
description: A SNAP recipient wants to check the current balance on their EBT card.

title: Find a Public Meeting Agenda
description: A citizen wants to find the agenda for the upcoming city council meeting.

title: Submit a Grant Progress Report
description: A non-profit needs to submit its semi-annual progress report for a federal grant.

title: Inquire About Bid Status
description: A vendor wants to know if their submitted bid for a contract is still under consideration.

title: Approve a Department Purchase Request
description: A department head needs to approve a purchase request submitted by a staff member.

title: Report a Water Main Break

title: Update a Project Milestone

title: Request Public Meeting Minutes

title: Track a Corrective Action Plan

description: A benefits recipient needs to report the birth of a new child, which may affect their benefit amount.

description: A citizen with a disability needs to apply for a handicap parking placard.

title: Find Local Government Representative
description: A citizen wants to find out who their city council representative is.

title: Document a Client Interaction
description: A social worker needs to log a phone call with a client in the case management system.

title: Pay a Court Fine Online
description: A citizen needs to pay a fine for a traffic violation online.

title: Close Out a Grant
description: A non-profit has completed its grant-funded project and is submitting its final report to close out the grant.

title: Amend a Government Contract
description: A vendor and a government agency need to amend an existing contract to extend its duration.

title: Transfer Budget Funds
