title: Report a Zoning Violation
description: A citizen reports that a neighbor is running a commercial business out of their home in a residential-only zone.

title: File a Lobbyist Activity Report
description: A registered lobbyist is filing their required monthly report of their activities and expenditures.

title: Fulfill a FOIA Request
description: A records officer has the final, redacted documents and is ready to deliver them to the FOIA requestor.

title: Perform an Internal Audit
description: An internal auditor is starting an audit of a department's use of government-issued credit cards (P-cards).

title: Report a Downed Tree Blocking a Road
description: A citizen reports that a large tree has fallen and is completely blocking a public road.

title: Assess the Condition of a Public Asset
description: An engineer is performing a scheduled condition assessment of a city bridge.

title: Process a Project Change Order
description: During construction of a new building, an unexpected issue requires a change order to the original contract.

title: Set Up Autopay for a Utility Bill
description: A resident wants to set up automatic recurring payments for their water bill.

title: Report a Suspected Foodborne Illness
description: A citizen is calling the health department to report getting sick after eating at a local restaurant.

title: Apply for a Marriage License
description: A couple needs to apply for a marriage license at the county clerk's office.

title: Inquire About a Property Lien
description: A citizen is buying a property and wants to check if there are any outstanding government liens (e.g., for unpaid taxes or water bills).

title: Report a Potential Data Breach
description: An agency employee reports that they may have accidentally exposed citizen data, triggering a data breach response.

title: Invoice Shipping Line for Services
description: A vessel has departed. The finance department must generate an invoice for all services rendered.

title: Schedule Preventive Maintenance for a Crane
description: A ship-to-shore (STS) crane is due for its 500-hour preventive maintenance check. The maintenance planner must schedule it.

title: Handle a Cargo Damage Claim
description: A cargo owner submits a claim, stating their container was damaged while in the terminal's care.

title: Analyze Terminal Productivity
description: A port analyst needs to generate a weekly report on crane productivity.

title: Resolve a Customer Billing Dispute
description: A trucking company disputes a charge on their invoice, claiming they were billed for storage fees on a container that was on hold by customs.

title: Handle a Customer Inquiry about Container Status
description: A freight forwarder calls customer service to ask for the status of a specific container.

title: Respond to a Request for Quotation (RFQ)
description: A new shipping line requests a quotation for stevedoring and other port services.

title: Track Equipment Utilization
description: A manager wants to know if they have enough straddle carriers or if they need to purchase more. An analyst must assess utilization.

title: Process New Employee Access Request
description: A new operations manager has been hired. The security admin needs to set up their access credentials for the port's systems.

title: Deactivate Departing Employee's Access
description: An employee has resigned. The security admin must deactivate all their access on their last day.

title: Handle Maintenance Parts Ordering
description: A maintenance technician determines a crane needs a new gearbox. A parts supervisor must order it.

title: Generate Daily Operations Report
description: At the end of a shift, the operations supervisor needs to generate a report summarizing the day's activities.

title: Audit Maintenance Records
description: A manager needs to audit the maintenance records for a piece of equipment to ensure compliance with the manufacturer's recommendations.

title: Forecast Monthly Cargo Volume
description: A port director asks an analyst to forecast the container volume for the next month to plan for labor and equipment needs.

title: Update the Official Port Tariff
description: The port authority has approved a 3% annual increase in port charges. The finance department must update the official tariff document.

title: Resolve an IT Helpdesk Ticket
description: A user reports they cannot log in to the TOS. A helpdesk agent must resolve the issue.

title: Process a Special Service Request
description: A customer requests a service not covered by the standard tariff, such as providing a floating crane for a heavy lift. A manager must price and approve the service.

title: Manage Contractor Access
description: A third-party contractor needs temporary access to the port to perform work. The admin must issue a temporary pass.

title: Track Container Demurrage Charges
description: An import container has been sitting in the yard beyond its free time allowance. The system must track and bill the storage charges (demurrage).

title: Generate Vessel Performance Report
description: After a vessel departs, an analyst needs to create a performance report for the shipping line, detailing the productivity achieved during its port call.

title: Archive Old Operations Records
description: As per data retention policy, all operational records older than 7 years must be archived.

title: Process a Truck Arriving at the Gate
description: A truck arrives at the port gate to pick up an import container. The gate clerk must process its entry.

title: Handle a Truck Arriving with No Appointment
description: A truck arrives at the gate but does not have a Vehicle Booking System (VBS) appointment. The clerk must handle the exception.

title: Handle a Container with a Customs Hold
description: A truck arrives to pick up a container, but the system shows it has a hold placed on it by customs.

title: Coordinate Train Loading
description: A train has arrived at the intermodal yard to be loaded with containers for an inland destination.

title: Handle a Damaged Container at the Gate
description: A truck arrives to drop off an export container, but the gate inspection camera identifies significant damage.

title: Process a Container for De-stuffing at CFS
description: A container with goods for multiple owners (LCL) arrives at the Container Freight Station (CFS) to be unloaded.

title: Handle Truck Arriving for the Wrong Container
description: A truck arrives with an appointment to pick up container A, but they have physically brought container B to drop off.

title: Manage an Empty Container Depot
description: A trucking company wants to drop off an empty container at the port's empty depot. The operator must process it.

title: Manage VBS Slot Release
description: Due to increased productivity, the terminal can handle more trucks. The gate manager decides to release more appointment slots.

title: Check Rail Car Status
description: A customer calls to ask if a specific container has been loaded onto a train that departed yesterday.

title: Manage Truck Queue during Peak Hours
description: During a busy period, the truck queue outside the gate is getting long. The gate manager must take action to speed up processing.

title: Update a Trucking Company's Information
description: A trucking company calls to update their insurance information on file with the port.

title: Process a Manual Gate Entry
description: The gate's OCR camera system fails. The clerk must process a truck's entry manually.

title: Process a Reefer Container at the Gate
description: A truck arrives to drop off a reefer container with perishable goods. The gate process includes an extra step.

title: Assign a Trouble Ticket at the Gate
description: A gate kiosk's printer stops working. The clerk needs to report the issue.

title: Process a Transhipment Container
description: A container is discharged from one vessel and will be loaded onto another vessel at the same terminal without leaving the port.

title: Manage Rail Car Inspection
description: Before a train is loaded, each empty rail car must be inspected for damage or debris.

title: Process Empty Container Pickup
description: A truck arrives at the gate to pick up an empty container to take to a shipper for loading.

title: Resolve Gate Camera Failure
description: The OCR camera that reads container numbers at a gate lane fails. A technician must troubleshoot it.

title: Manage Container Seal Check at Gate
description: For a high-value cargo container, the shipper has requested a seal check upon entry to the port.

title: Report a Minor Safety Incident

title: Conduct a Port Security Drill
description: The Port Facility Security Officer (PFSO) needs to conduct a scheduled drill simulating an unauthorized access attempt.

title: Manage Hazardous Cargo Arrival
description: A container with hazardous materials (HAZMAT) is scheduled to arrive. The HSSE officer must ensure it's handled correctly.

title: Manage a Minor Hydraulic Oil Spill
description: A terminal tractor has a hydraulic line break, causing a small oil spill on the quay. An environmental officer must manage the cleanup.

title: Issue a Permit to Work for Hot Work
description: A maintenance team needs to perform welding (hot work) on a crane. A safety officer must issue a permit to work.

title: Verify Port Access Credentials
description: A security guard at a gate needs to verify the identity of a person requesting entry.

title: Manage an Emergency Response Drill (Fire)
description: The port is conducting a full-scale fire drill at a warehouse. The emergency manager must coordinate the response.

title: Monitor Port Air Quality
description: An environmental officer needs to check the port's air quality monitoring system for compliance with regulations.

title: Investigate a Security Alarm
description: A fence perimeter intrusion alarm is triggered at night. The security control room operator must investigate.

title: Handle an Unauthorized Person in a Restricted Area
description: A CCTV operator spots a person without proper PPE walking in a restricted terminal area. They must respond.

title: Manage Port Preparations for a Coming Storm
description: A hurricane is forecast to approach the port. The emergency manager must coordinate preparations to secure the facility.

title: Conduct a Pre-Shift Safety Briefing
description: A shift supervisor must conduct a daily safety briefing (toolbox talk) with their stevedoring gang before work begins.

title: Manage Environmental Compliance for Dredging
description: The port is conducting maintenance dredging of a channel. An environmental officer must monitor for compliance.

title: Manage an ISPS Security Level Change
description: The national authority raises the security level for all ports. The PFSO must implement heightened security measures.

title: Perform a PPE Audit

title: Manage a Vessel's Waste Log
description: As part of an environmental inspection, an officer must check a vessel's garbage and oil record books for compliance.

title: Respond to a Medical Emergency
description: A worker has been injured on the quay. The port's emergency response system must be activated.

title: Plan Container Yard Stacking

title: Handle a Reefer Container Temperature Alarm

title: Create a Vessel Stowage Plan
