description: The accounts payable team has flagged a supplier invoice where the price charged is higher than the price on the PO.

title: Close a Purchase Order
description: A purchase order has been fully received and invoiced, and now needs to be closed in the system.

title: Put a Received Shipment into an Inspection Hold
description: A shipment of a critical component has arrived, but it requires quality inspection before it can be used in production.

title: Notify Customer of Shipment
description: A customer's order has just shipped, and the logistics coordinator needs to send them an Advanced Shipping Notice (ASN).

title: Perform a Cycle Count
description: An inventory controller is assigned a set of locations to count to ensure inventory accuracy.

title: Process a Return to Stock
description: A returned item has been inspected and deemed resalable. An operator must return it to inventory.

title: Identify Slow-Moving Inventory
description: An inventory analyst needs to run a report to identify products that have not sold in the last 180 days.

title: Create a Stock Transfer Order
description: A distribution center (DC A) is low on stock for a popular item. An inventory planner needs to create a stock transfer order to move inventory from another DC (DC B).

title: Investigate Inventory Discrepancy
description: A picker reports a short pick because an item was not in its primary location. An inventory controller must investigate why.

title: Process Scrapped Inventory
description: An item returned by a customer is deemed unsalable and must be scrapped.

title: Place a Purchase Order
description: An item's inventory has fallen below its reorder point. A buyer needs to place a purchase order with the supplier.

title: Forecast Seasonal Demand
description: An inventory analyst needs to forecast demand for a seasonal item (e.g., winter coats) to inform purchasing decisions.

title: Quarantine a Recalled Product
description: A supplier has issued a recall for a specific batch of a product. An inventory manager must find all units from that batch and place them on hold.

title: Process a Supplier Credit Memo for Shortage
description: A shipment was received with a shortage. The supplier has sent a credit memo for the missing items, which needs to be applied.

title: Manage Expiring Inventory (FEFO)
description: In a food-grade warehouse, an operator picking an order must be directed to pick the batch with the earliest expiration date first.

title: Perform Blind Receiving
description: To ensure accuracy, a warehouse is configured for 'blind receiving', where operators don't see the expected PO quantity and must count from scratch.

title: Create a Virtual Kit (Bill of Materials)
description: A marketing team wants to sell a new product bundle online. An inventory analyst must create a virtual kit in the system so that when the kit is sold, the system allocates the component inventory.

title: Adjust Inventory for Warehouse Damage
description: A forklift operator accidentally damages a pallet of goods in the warehouse. The damaged items must be adjusted out of inventory.

title: Process a Return for Refurbishment
description: A returned electronic item is not resalable as-is but can be refurbished. It needs to be routed to the refurbishment department.

title: Resolve Negative Inventory
description: A system report shows a negative on-hand quantity for an item, which is physically impossible. An inventory controller must investigate and correct it.

title: Set a Reorder Point for a New Item
description: A new product is being introduced. An inventory planner must set its initial reorder point and safety stock levels in the system.

title: Analyze Inventory Turnover
description: An analyst wants to calculate the inventory turnover rate for a specific product category to assess its efficiency.

title: Receive a Return Without an RMA
description: A customer sends back a return without first getting a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA). The returns department must handle this exception.

title: Create an Inventory Hold for Quality Inspection
description: A batch of newly received items must be held in a quarantine status until the quality assurance team can inspect and release it.

title: Reconcile Annual Physical Inventory
description: After a full wall-to-wall physical inventory count, an accountant must reconcile the physical counts with the system records and post the financial adjustment.

title: Identify Inventory Ownership (3PL)
description: In a multi-client 3PL warehouse, an operator needs to know which client owns the inventory in a specific location.

title: Perform ABC Inventory Analysis
description: An analyst wants to classify all products into A, B, or C categories based on their value and sales volume to prioritize inventory management efforts.

title: Receive a Shipment with an ASN
description: A shipment arrives from a supplier who sent an Advance Ship Notice (ASN). The receiving process should be faster as the details are already in the system.

title: Dispose of Obsolete Inventory
description: A product has been discontinued and the remaining stock is deemed obsolete. It needs to be disposed of.

title: Process a Customer Return (RMA)
description: A customer service agent needs to process a return request for a customer who received a damaged item.

title: Handle Shipping Address Change Request
description: A customer calls to change the shipping address for an order that has not yet been shipped.

title: Allocate Inventory to a High-Priority Order
description: A high-priority sales order comes in, and an agent must manually allocate available inventory to it before it's released to the warehouse.

title: Generate a Bill of Lading (BOL)
description: A shipment is ready to be picked up by a carrier. The shipping clerk must generate the legal Bill of Lading document.

title: Cancel an Order Before Shipping
description: A customer requests to cancel an order that has been processed but not yet shipped.

title: Generate Commercial Invoice for International Shipment
description: An international order is being shipped, and it requires a commercial invoice for customs purposes.

title: Handle a Lost Shipment Inquiry
description: A customer calls because their tracking information has not updated in several days, and they believe the shipment is lost.

title: Process an EDI 850 Purchase Order
description: An EDI 850 (Purchase Order) document is received from a major retail partner and must be automatically processed.

title: Provide a Shipping Quote
description: A sales agent is on the phone with a potential customer and needs to provide a real-time shipping quote for an order.

title: Handle a Backorder Situation
description: A customer places an order for an item that is out of stock. The agent must inform the customer and provide options.

title: Provide Order Status Update to Customer
description: A customer contacts support to ask for the status of their recent order.

title: Split an Order for Partial Shipment
description: An order contains two items, but one is on backorder. The customer wants the in-stock item to ship now.

title: Handle a Damaged Shipment Claim
description: A customer reports that their order arrived damaged. The agent must process the claim and send a replacement.

title: Generate a Packing List
description: Before an order is packed, the system must generate a packing list to be included inside the box.

title: Send Advance Ship Notice (ASN)
description: After a shipment for a major retail partner has been dispatched, an EDI 856 (Advance Ship Notice) must be sent.

title: Handle an Order with High Fraud Risk
description: An online order is automatically flagged by the system as having a high risk of fraud (e.g., mismatched billing/shipping addresses, proxy IP).

title: Generate Customer Performance Report
description: An account manager needs to generate a quarterly business review (QBR) report for a key client, showing metrics like on-time shipping and order accuracy.

title: Process a Drop-Ship Order
description: A customer orders an item that is not stocked in the warehouse but is instead shipped directly from a supplier (drop-shipped).

title: Handle 'Wrong Item Shipped' Claim
description: A customer reports they received the wrong item. The agent must arrange for the return of the wrong item and shipment of the correct one.

title: Report on Order Fill Rate
description: A manager wants to analyze the order fill rate (the percentage of orders shipped complete without backorders) for the previous month.

title: Handle a Short Shipment Claim
description: A customer claims they were shorted an item in their shipment. The agent must investigate and resolve.

title: Route Order to Optimal DC
description: An e-commerce order is placed. The system must decide which distribution center (DC) to fulfill it from to minimize shipping cost and time.

title: Validate a Shipping Address
description: When a customer enters their address during online checkout, the system must validate it to ensure it's a deliverable address and to prevent shipping errors.

title: Handle an Order with Special Instructions
description: A customer adds a note to their order: 'Please gift wrap'. This instruction must be visible to the warehouse packer.

title: Track In-Transit Shipment for Customer
description: A customer service agent receives a call asking for the status of an in-transit shipment. The agent must locate the shipment and provide an ETA.

title: Tender a Full Truckload (FTL) Shipment
description: A logistics coordinator needs to find a carrier for a full truckload shipment and tender the load.

title: File Freight Claim for Damage
description: A shipment was delivered with visible damage. A claims specialist must file a claim with the carrier.

title: Audit a Freight Invoice
description: An accounts payable clerk needs to audit a carrier's freight invoice against the agreed-upon rate before approving it for payment.

title: Schedule a Delivery Appointment
description: A shipment is approaching its destination, and the carrier needs to schedule a delivery appointment with the receiving facility.

title: Manage Carrier On-Time Performance
description: A carrier manager needs to review the on-time pickup and delivery performance for a specific carrier over the last quarter.

title: Handle a Delivery Refusal
description: A carrier reports that a customer has refused a delivery. The agent must determine the next steps.

title: Capture Proof of Delivery (POD)
description: A carrier's driver has completed a delivery and needs to upload the signed Bill of Lading as Proof of Delivery.

title: Consolidate LTL Shipments into a Multi-Stop FTL
description: A planner has several LTL shipments going to the same region and wants to consolidate them into a more cost-effective multi-stop full truckload.

title: Select Best Parcel Carrier
description: When packing a small e-commerce order, the system must automatically select the cheapest parcel carrier for the required service level.

title: Update Carrier Insurance Certificate
description: A carrier's insurance certificate is about to expire. A compliance specialist must obtain and upload the new certificate.

title: Handle Carrier Late Arrival for Pickup
description: A carrier scheduled for a pickup is running late. The shipping manager must assess the impact.

title: Handle Proof of Delivery Discrepancy
description: A customer claims they only received 9 out of 10 pallets, but the carrier's POD is signed clean.

title: Select Cheapest LTL Carrier
description: A planner needs to ship three pallets and must select the most cost-effective Less-Than-Truckload (LTL) carrier.

title: Track Shipment by PRO Number
description: A clerk needs to find the status of an LTL shipment using the carrier's progressive (PRO) number.

title: Onboard a New Carrier
description: A logistics company is adding a new trucking company to its network. A compliance specialist must set them up in the system.

title: Manage Demurrage Charges
description: A container has been left at a port terminal beyond its allotted free time, incurring demurrage fees. An agent must resolve this.

title: Divert a Shipment In-Transit
description: A customer needs to change the final destination of a shipment that is already on its way.

title: Approve an Accessorial Charge
description: A carrier adds an accessorial charge (e.g., 'Liftgate Service') to a freight bill. A specialist must review and approve it.

title: Calculate Freight Class
description: A shipper needs to determine the correct National Motor Freight Classification (NMFC) freight class for a new item to get accurate LTL shipping rates.

title: Book a Guaranteed Delivery Service
description: A critical shipment must arrive by a specific time. The planner must book a guaranteed service with an LTL carrier.

title: Manage Driver Detention
description: A truck driver has been waiting at a facility for over the 2-hour free time to be loaded. They report that they are now on detention.

title: Check Customs Clearance Status
description: An import specialist needs to check if an international shipment has been cleared by customs.

title: Combine Multiple Parcel Shipments
description: A customer has placed three small orders going to the same address on the same day. The system should combine them into a single, larger shipment to save on costs.

title: File for Guaranteed Service Refund
description: A shipment booked with a 'Guaranteed by 10 AM' service was delivered late. The company is entitled to a full refund.

title: Receive Purchase Order Shipment
description: A warehouse operator needs to receive an incoming shipment against a purchase order (PO), verifying item quantities and noting any discrepancies.

title: Pick a Sales Order
description: A warehouse operator is assigned a sales order and must pick the correct items and quantities from their storage locations.

title: Pack and Manifest an Order
description: A packer at a packing station needs to pack a picked order, select the correct box size, and generate a shipping label.

title: Perform a Kitting Task
description: An operator is assigned a work order to assemble a 'gift basket' kit from several individual items.

title: Optimize Storage Bins via Consolidation
description: To create space, a warehouse manager wants to consolidate partially filled storage bins of the same item into fewer bins.

title: Receive a Cross-Dock Shipment
description: A shipment arrives that is designated for cross-docking. It must be received and immediately moved to an outbound staging lane without being put away.

title: Load an Outbound Truck
description: A warehouse loader must load all staged pallets for a specific shipment onto the correct truck, in the correct order.

title: Re-slot a High-Velocity Item
description: An item's sales have increased, and a warehouse manager wants to move it to a forward picking location closer to the packing stations to reduce travel time.

title: Apply Special Labeling (VAS)
description: A specific customer requires all their outbound cartons to have a special 'Fragile' label and a customer-specific barcode label applied before shipping.

title: Receive a Shipment Without a PO
description: A truck arrives with a shipment that is not linked to a purchase order in the system. The operator must handle this exception.

title: Manage a Dock Appointment
description: A carrier calls to reschedule their delivery appointment for a later time.

title: Conduct a Warehouse Safety Inspection
description: A safety manager uses a checklist on a mobile device to conduct a weekly safety inspection of the warehouse.

title: Replenish a Pick Face
description: A forward picking location for a popular item is running low. The system must generate a task to replenish it from bulk storage.

title: Print SSCC Pallet Labels
description: After building a pallet for a large retail customer, the operator must generate and apply a Serial Shipping Container Code (SSCC) label for compliance.

title: Manage Hazardous Materials Storage
description: A shipment of hazardous materials (e.g., flammable liquids) arrives and must be stored in a designated, compliant area.

title: Perform Cycle Count with Mobile Scanner
description: A warehouse operator uses a handheld scanner to perform a cycle count task, guided by the system.

title: Wave Planning for Picking
description: A shift manager needs to create a picking wave to release a batch of orders to the floor for fulfillment.

title: Move Inventory with a Forklift
description: A forklift operator is assigned a task to move a full pallet of goods from a receiving lane to a bulk storage location.

title: Assign Tasks Based on Operator Skill
description: A task to operate a specialized piece of equipment (e.g., a turret truck) is created. The WMS must assign it only to operators certified to use that equipment.

title: Pick to Cart for Multiple Orders
description: An operator uses a smart cart to pick multiple small orders simultaneously in a single pass through the warehouse.

title: Cross-Check Pallet at Loading Dock
description: To prevent loading errors, a final check is performed by scanning a pallet's license plate at the dock door to ensure it belongs on the truck being loaded.

title: Manage Battery Charging for MHE
description: A forklift's battery is low. The operator must swap it for a charged one at a battery station.

title: Perform an Outbound Quality Audit
description: Before an order is sealed, a quality auditor randomly selects it for an audit to verify picking and packing accuracy.

title: Direct Put-Away to Optimal Bin
description: After receiving an item, the WMS must direct the operator to the best possible storage bin, considering space, item type, and existing stock.

title: Handle a Pick Face Stockout
description: A picker is directed to a location, but finds it empty. They must report the stockout so it can be resolved.

title: Audit Picker Accuracy
description: A manager wants to review the accuracy rates for individual pickers over the last week.

title: Initial Case Assessment
description: A senior partner needs to assess a new potential litigation matter to determine its viability and strategy.

title: Review a Standard Vendor Agreement
description: An in-house counsel needs to review a standard, third-party vendor agreement for potential risks.

title: Track and Record Billable Hours
description: An associate attorney needs to record their billable hours for the day for multiple matters.

title: Conduct Document Review for Relevance
description: A paralegal is assigned a batch of 1,000 documents in an e-discovery platform and must code them for relevance to the case.

title: Draft a Standard Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA)
description: A corporate attorney needs to draft a standard, one-way NDA for a potential business partnership.

title: Run a Conflicts Check
description: Before taking on a new client, a paralegal must run a conflicts check to ensure the firm can ethically represent them.

title: Draft a Motion for Summary Judgment
description: A litigation associate needs to draft a motion for summary judgment, arguing that there are no genuine disputes of material fact.

title: Conduct Legal Due Diligence
description: As part of an M&A transaction, a junior associate needs to review a target company's key contracts to identify any legal risks.

title: Send Case Status Update to Client
description: A partner asks a paralegal to send a status update to a client on a litigation matter.

title: Research a Specific Legal Question
description: An associate needs to research case law to answer a specific question: 'What constitutes 'reasonable accommodation' for a religious practice under Title VII in the 9th Circuit?'

title: File a Trademark Application
description: An IP paralegal needs to file a new trademark application with the USPTO for a client's new product name.

title: Calendar Court-Ordered Deadlines
description: A paralegal receives a scheduling order from a court and must calendar all deadlines.

title: Prepare a Privilege Log
description: After a document review, a litigation paralegal needs to create a privilege log for all documents that were withheld from production based on attorney-client privilege.

title: Draft Board Meeting Minutes
description: A corporate paralegal needs to draft the official minutes for a recent board of directors meeting.

title: Generate a Client Invoice
description: At the end of the month, a billing coordinator needs to generate an invoice for a client.

title: File a Complaint with the Court
description: A paralegal needs to electronically file a new complaint with a federal court.

title: Execute a Contract via E-signature
description: After negotiations are complete, an attorney needs to send a final version of a contract to both parties for electronic signature.

title: Check for New Ethics Opinions
description: A law firm's ethics counsel needs to check for any new ethics opinions issued by the state bar association in the last month.

title: Prepare a Deposition Summary
description: A junior associate needs to read a 200-page deposition transcript and prepare a summary for the lead attorney.

title: Update a Corporate Minute Book
description: Following an annual shareholder meeting, a corporate paralegal needs to update the official corporate minute book.

title: Provide Case Update to Inquiring Client
description: A client calls asking for a quick update on their case. The assigned paralegal needs to provide a concise and accurate status.

title: Draft Responses to Interrogatories
description: A litigation associate must draft responses to a set of written interrogatories (questions) served by the opposing party.

title: Manage an IP Portfolio
description: An IP paralegal needs to review a client's trademark portfolio to identify upcoming renewal deadlines.

title: Calculate a Statute of Limitations
description: For a new personal injury case, a paralegal must calculate the statute of limitations to determine the deadline for filing a lawsuit.

title: Draft a Cease and Desist Letter
description: An attorney needs to draft a cease and desist letter to a third party who is infringing on a client's trademark.

title: Negotiate a Contract Clause
description: During a contract negotiation, an in-house counsel needs to redline a clause and propose alternative language.

title: Handle a Client Complaint about Billing
description: A client has called to complain about the amount of their latest invoice, questioning the time spent on a task.

title: Draft an Answer to a Complaint
description: A client has been sued, and a litigation associate needs to draft an answer to the complaint.

title: Prepare a Closing Binder for an M&A Deal
description: After an M&A deal has closed, a corporate paralegal needs to assemble a 'closing binder' with all the final, executed deal documents.

title: Close Out a Matter
description: A case has concluded, and a paralegal needs to perform the administrative steps to close the matter.

title: Redact a Document for Production
description: During discovery, an attorney needs to redact privileged information from a document before producing it to the other side.

title: Draft an IP Licensing Agreement
description: A corporate attorney needs to draft an agreement to license the company's patented technology to a third party.

title: Review Client Billing Guidelines
description: Before starting work on a new matter for a large corporate client, a paralegal must review the client's specific billing guidelines to ensure compliance.

title: Shepardize a Case
description: Before citing a case in a brief, an associate must Shepardize it (or use a similar tool like KeyCite) to ensure it is still good law.

title: Form a New LLC
description: A corporate paralegal needs to form a new Limited Liability Company (LLC) for a client in the state of Delaware.

title: Request an Extension of Time
description: An attorney needs to request a 14-day extension from opposing counsel to respond to a set of discovery requests.

title: Prepare a Witness for Deposition
description: An attorney needs to prepare a key witness for an upcoming deposition.

title: Analyze Contract for Termination Clause
description: A client wants to terminate a contract, and an attorney needs to analyze the agreement to understand their rights and any penalties.

title: Process a Trust Account Transaction
description: A firm receives a settlement check on behalf of a client, which must be deposited into the client's trust account.

title: Serve a Subpoena
description: A paralegal needs to arrange for a third-party witness to be served with a deposition subpoena.

title: Draft an Employment Agreement
description: An in-house counsel needs to draft a standard employment agreement for a new executive.

title: Issue a Litigation Hold Notice
description: When new litigation is anticipated, an in-house counsel must issue a litigation hold notice to all relevant employees to preserve documents.

title: Cite-Check a Legal Brief
description: A junior paralegal must cite-check a brief before it is filed, ensuring all case citations are in the correct format (e.g., Bluebook) and accurately state the cited proposition.

title: Draft a Corporate Resolution
description: A company needs to open a new bank account, which requires a formal corporate resolution. A paralegal needs to draft it.

title: Process an Expense Against a Matter
description: An attorney incurred an expense (e.g., a filing fee) and needs to have it recorded against the correct client matter for billing.

title: Prepare Exhibits for a Motion
description: A paralegal needs to prepare and organize the exhibits that will be filed in support of a motion.

title: Track a Contract Renewal Date
description: An in-house legal department needs to track the renewal date of a key software license to decide whether to renew or terminate.

title: Handle a New Client Intake Call
description: A potential client calls the firm for the first time. The intake specialist needs to gather initial information.

title: Search for Patent Prior Art
description: Before filing a patent application, a patent agent needs to search for 'prior art' to assess the novelty of an invention.

title: Check Local Court Rules
description: Before filing a motion, a paralegal must check the local court rules and the specific judge's rules for any special formatting or filing requirements.

title: Create an Ethical Wall
description: A firm takes on a new matter that is adverse to a former client. To avoid a conflict, the firm needs to create an 'ethical wall' to screen off the attorneys who worked on the former matter.

title: Summarize a Deposition Transcript
description: A junior lawyer needs to create a concise summary of a key witness's deposition testimony.

title: Create a Virtual Data Room for M&A
description: In an M&A deal, the seller's counsel needs to set up a virtual data room (VDR) for the buyer to conduct due diligence.

title: Check on Case Appeal Status
description: A client wants to know the status of their appeal. A paralegal needs to check the appellate court's docket.

title: Produce Documents in Discovery
description: After completing a document review, a paralegal needs to produce the 'Responsive' and non-privileged documents to the opposing counsel.

title: Draft a Website Privacy Policy
description: An in-house counsel needs to draft a new privacy policy for the company's website to comply with regulations like GDPR and CCPA.

title: Review and Approve a Vendor Invoice
description: A managing partner needs to review and approve an invoice from an expert witness before it can be paid.

title: Prepare for Oral Argument
description: An attorney is preparing for an oral argument before an appellate court and needs to anticipate potential questions from the judges.

title: Manage Contract Versions
description: During a lengthy negotiation, multiple versions of a contract are being exchanged. A paralegal needs to manage version control.

title: Clear a Trademark for Use
description: A client wants to use a new name for a product. An IP attorney needs to conduct a full trademark search to assess the risk of infringement.

title: Draft an Affidavit
description: In support of a motion, an attorney needs to draft an affidavit for a witness to sign, attesting to certain facts.

title: Onboard a New Attorney
description: A new attorney is joining the firm. The practice manager needs to set them up in all firm systems.

title: Respond to a Third-Party Subpoena
description: A company (not a party to the lawsuit) receives a subpoena for documents. In-house counsel must manage the response.

title: Create a Contract Summary
description: A business executive needs a one-page summary of a long, complex contract, highlighting the key business terms.

title: Request Documents from a Client
description: To respond to discovery, a paralegal needs to request a specific set of documents from the client.

title: Analyze Opponent's Brief for Key Arguments
description: An attorney needs to analyze an opponent's motion brief to identify their key legal arguments in order to draft a response.

title: File a Corporate Annual Report
description: A corporate paralegal needs to file a company's annual report with the Secretary of State to keep it in good standing.

title: Update Case Calendar with New Date
description: A deposition has been rescheduled. A paralegal needs to update the case calendar.

title: Prepare for a 'Meet and Confer'
description: Before filing a motion to compel, attorneys are required to 'meet and confer' to resolve a discovery dispute. An associate needs to prepare for this meeting.

title: Draft an M&A Deal Announcement
description: After an M&A deal is signed, an in-house counsel needs to draft an internal announcement to all employees.

title: Handle a Client Billing Inquiry
description: A client has a question about a specific line item on their invoice. A billing coordinator needs to provide an explanation.

title: File a Document Under Seal
description: An attorney needs to file a document that contains highly confidential trade secrets, requiring it to be filed under seal.

title: Respond to a Trademark Office Action
description: The USPTO has issued an Office Action refusing a trademark application. An IP attorney needs to draft a response.

title: Run Final Conflicts Check Before Filing
description: Just before filing a new lawsuit, a partner asks for a final conflicts check to be run, including newly added defendants.

title: Bates Stamp Documents for Production
description: A paralegal needs to apply unique Bates stamp numbers to a set of documents before producing them in discovery.

title: Create a Closing Checklist for an M&A Deal
description: A corporate associate needs to create a closing checklist that details all the documents that need to be signed and actions that need to be taken to close a deal.

title: Send an Engagement Letter to a New Client
description: After a new client agrees to retain the firm, a paralegal needs to send them the official engagement letter for signature.

title: Draft a Stipulated Protective Order
description: In a case involving confidential information, the parties agree to a stipulated protective order to govern the handling of sensitive documents. An associate needs to draft it.

title: Review Corporate Bylaws
description: A client is unsure about the process for electing a new director. In-house counsel needs to review the corporate bylaws to provide an answer.

title: Perform a Lien Search
description: As part of a real estate transaction, a paralegal needs to perform a search to see if there are any outstanding liens on the property.

title: Request Medical Records
description: In a personal injury case, a paralegal needs to request the plaintiff's medical records from a hospital.

title: Write Off an Uncollectible Invoice
description: After numerous attempts to collect, a firm decides to write off an old, unpaid invoice. The billing manager needs to process this.

title: Summarize New Legislation
description: A new law has been passed that affects a client's industry. An associate needs to summarize the law and its impact for the client.

title: Draft a Settlement Agreement
description: The parties in a lawsuit have reached a settlement. An attorney needs to draft the settlement agreement to formalize the terms.

title: Send Case Files to Co-Counsel
description: A firm is bringing on co-counsel for a large case and needs to share the primary case files with them.

title: File a Notice of Appearance
description: An attorney is taking over a case from a prior counsel and needs to file a notice of appearance with the court.

title: Create a Contract Abstraction
description: For a large portfolio of real estate leases, a paralegal needs to create 'abstractions' or summaries of each lease, extracting key data into a spreadsheet.

title: Check Attorney CLE Compliance
description: A firm administrator needs to check the Continuing Legal Education (CLE) compliance status for all attorneys in the firm ahead of the annual reporting deadline.

title: Create a Closing Argument Outline
description: An attorney is preparing for trial and needs to create an outline for their closing argument.

title: Handle a Data Breach Response
description: A company has experienced a data breach. In-house counsel must coordinate the legal response.

title: Create a Case Budget
description: A client has requested a budget for a new litigation matter. A senior associate needs to create a phased budget.

title: Organize Discovery Documents
description: A firm has received a large production of documents from the opposing party. A paralegal needs to organize them.

title: Create Signature Packets for a Closing
description: For a large real estate closing, a paralegal needs to prepare signature packets for each signatory with all the documents they need to sign.

title: Update Attorney Bio on Firm Website
description: An attorney has been promoted to partner. The marketing department needs to update their bio on the firm's website.

title: Draft a Demand Letter for Unpaid Invoice
description: A client has not been paid by a customer. An attorney needs to draft a demand letter before filing a lawsuit.

title: File a UCC Financing Statement
description: In a secured lending transaction, the lender's counsel needs to file a UCC-1 financing statement to perfect the lender's security interest in the collateral.

title: Review Outside Counsel Bills
description: An in-house counsel needs to review invoices from an outside law firm for compliance with the company's billing guidelines.

title: Create a Trial Exhibit List
description: In preparation for trial, a paralegal needs to create a list of all exhibits the party intends to use.

title: Draft Website Terms of Service
description: An in-house counsel needs to draft the Terms of Service (ToS) for a new software-as-a-service (SaaS) product.

title: Close Out an Ethics Review
description: After a conflicts check revealed a potential issue, the firm's ethics committee reviewed it and cleared the firm to take the case. An administrator needs to document this.

title: Promote a Story on Social Media
description: A social media editor needs to promote a newly published investigative report across Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram.

title: Moderate a Comments Section
description: A community manager must moderate the comments section on a controversial article, removing hate speech while allowing for civil debate.

title: Analyze Weekly Content Performance
description: An editor wants to review the performance of all articles published last week to understand what resonated with the audience.

title: Find an Old Article for a Follow-Up Story
description: A reporter is writing a follow-up to a story published five years ago and needs to find the original article in the digital archive.

title: Create a Newsletter Edition
description: A newsletter editor needs to curate the top stories of the week and write a daily newsletter to be sent to subscribers.

title: Respond to a Reader's Story Correction Request
description: A reader has emailed to point out a factual error in a published article. An editor must investigate and, if necessary, issue a correction.

title: Analyze Referral Traffic Sources
description: A social media editor wants to know which platform (Twitter, Facebook, Reddit, etc.) is driving the most traffic to the website.

title: Tag an Article for the Archive
description: After a story is published, an archivist needs to add relevant metadata and tags to it before committing it to the long-term digital archive.

title: Host a Q&A on Social Media
description: Following a major investigation, the lead reporter hosts a live Q&A session on Twitter to answer audience questions.

title: Analyze Audience Demographics
description: An editor wants to understand the demographic makeup (age, gender, location) of their website's audience to better tailor content.

title: Repurpose an Article as a Video Script
description: A popular article is being turned into a short video. An editor needs to adapt the text into a script suitable for narration.

title: Create a Social Video from an Article
description: A social media editor needs to create a short, subtitled video for Facebook based on a recently published article.

title: Run a Poll on Social Media
description: To engage the audience around a current event, a social media editor decides to run a poll.

title: Identify a Story Idea from Online Forums
description: A community manager is monitoring a local online forum and notices many people are complaining about a specific local issue, suggesting a potential story.

title: Analyze A/B Test Results for a Headline
description: An A/B test was run on two different headlines for an article. An editor must analyze the results to see which performed better.

title: Create a 'Best Of' Collection
description: At the end of the year, an editor wants to create a collection of the publication's 10 best investigative reports from that year.

title: Analyze Audience Engagement Funnel
description: An analyst wants to see how many people who see a story on social media actually click the link, and then how long they stay on the page.

title: Create a 'Story Highlights' for Instagram
description: An editor wants to create a permanent 'Story Highlight' on the publication's Instagram profile for a major investigative series.

title: Correct a Misleading Viral Rumor
description: A false rumor about a public figure is spreading rapidly on social media. A journalist must quickly publish a story to debunk it.

title: Analyze Reader Journey on the Website
description: An analyst wants to understand the common paths readers take on the website. For example, what article do they often read after reading a story about the mayor?

title: Find User-Generated Content During a Breaking News Event
description: During a breaking news event, a social media editor searches for photos and videos posted by eyewitnesses on social media.

title: Analyze 'Time of Day' Publication Performance
description: An editor wants to know if articles published in the morning perform better than those published in the evening.

title: Create a 'Behind the Scenes' Social Post
description: To build a connection with the audience, a reporter posts a 'behind the scenes' photo or video from their reporting process.

title: Manage a Live TV Call-In Segment
description: A producer for a live TV news show must screen callers for a call-in segment with a political analyst.

title: Draft a Breaking News Article
description: A major, unexpected event has occurred. A reporter must quickly write a short, accurate article for immediate publication online.

title: Copy Edit a Feature Story
description: An editor needs to review a long-form feature story for grammar, style, clarity, and adherence to the publication's style guide.

title: Create a Video Package from an Interview
description: A video journalist has a 30-minute interview and needs to edit it down to a 2-minute video package for the web, adding B-roll and graphics.

title: Publish an Article to the CMS
description: An online editor needs to take a finalized article and publish it to the website using the content management system (CMS).

title: Write a Human-Interest Feature
description: A reporter needs to write a long-form feature story about a local hero, focusing on narrative and character development.

title: Check a Story for Plagiarism
description: Before publication, an editor must check a freelance submission to ensure it is original work and does not contain plagiarism.

title: Create an Infographic from Data
description: A data journalist has a spreadsheet of complex data and needs to create a simple, clear infographic to help readers understand the key findings.

title: Write Alternative Headlines for A/B Testing
description: An editor wants to test which headline drives more traffic to an article and needs to write several different options.

title: Write an Obituary
description: A prominent community member has passed away. A reporter must write a respectful and comprehensive obituary.

title: Review a Restaurant
description: A food critic has visited a new restaurant and needs to write a review, balancing description of the food, atmosphere, and service.

title: Select Photos for a Photo Essay
description: A photographer has submitted 200 photos from an event. A photo editor must select the 10-15 best images that tell a cohesive story.

title: Update a Live Blog
description: During a developing news event (like an election night), an editor must continuously update a live blog with the latest information from reporters.

title: Write a Script for a Podcast
description: A podcast host needs to write a script for an upcoming episode that includes an introduction, interview questions, and an outro.

title: Write an Explainer Article
description: A complex topic is in the news (e.g., a new piece of legislation). A reporter needs to write an 'explainer' article that breaks it down for a general audience.

title: Headline and Summary for an External Wire Story
description: An editor needs to take a story from a wire service (like AP or Reuters), write a new headline and summary for it, and publish it on their own site.

title: Create a Photo Gallery for a Website
description: A photo editor needs to create a web-based photo gallery from a recent event.

title: Schedule a Story for Later Publication
description: A story is finished and edited, but the editor wants to publish it next morning during peak traffic hours.

title: Edit Audio for a Podcast
description: A podcast producer needs to edit a recorded interview, removing mistakes, long pauses, and 'ums' and 'ahs'.

title: Choose a 'Pull Quote' for an Article Layout
description: A print designer needs a 'pull quote' (a short, compelling excerpt) from a feature story to use as a large, graphical element in the layout.

title: Write a TV News Script
description: A broadcast journalist needs to write a 90-second script for the evening news about a city council meeting.

title: Fact-Check a Reporter's Draft
description: An editor or dedicated fact-checker must review a reporter's completed draft to verify every factual statement.

title: Write a Weather Forecast Script
description: A TV meteorologist needs to write a script for their weather segment.

title: Create a 'Timeline' Graphic
description: For a story that unfolds over a long period, a visuals editor needs to create a timeline graphic to help readers understand the sequence of events.

title: Write a Film Review
description: A film critic needs to write a review of a new movie.

title: Write SEO-Friendly Article
description: A reporter is writing an article on a popular topic and needs to ensure it is optimized to rank well in search engine results.

title: Write a Year-in-Review Article
description: An editor needs to write a major feature article summarizing the most important news events of the past year.

title: Assign a Breaking News Story
description: An editor needs to assign a breaking news story to the most appropriate available reporter.

title: Conduct a Legal Review of an Investigative Piece
description: Before publishing a sensitive investigative story that names individuals, an editor must have it reviewed by the legal department for libel risk.

title: Collaborate on a Data-Driven Story
description: A reporter and a data journalist are collaborating on a story. They need a shared space to work on the data, analysis, and draft.

title: Book Travel for an Overseas Assignment
description: A reporter is being sent overseas to cover a conflict and needs flights, a hotel, and a local fixer booked.

title: Pitch a Story Idea at an Editorial Meeting
description: A reporter has an idea for a long-form investigative piece and needs to pitch it to their editors to get it approved.

title: Check if a Photo is Cleared for Use
description: An editor wants to use a photo found online, but must first verify that the publication has the legal right to use it.

title: Plan Coverage for a Major Scheduled Event
description: Editors are planning coverage for the upcoming Olympics. They need to coordinate assignments for multiple reporters and photographers.

title: Request Camera Equipment from Gear Closet
description: A video journalist needs to check out a specific camera, lens, and microphone for an upcoming shoot.

title: Check Story Against the Day's News Budget
description: An editor reviews the list of stories planned for the day (the 'news budget') to ensure there is a good mix of topics and no overlap.

title: Handle a Source's Request to be Anonymous
description: A source providing sensitive information will only speak if they are granted anonymity. The reporter must get an editor's approval.

title: Share Files with a Freelancer
description: An editor needs to securely share background documents and interview transcripts with a freelance reporter who is not on the internal network.

title: File an Expense Report
description: A reporter has returned from an assignment and needs to file an expense report to be reimbursed for travel and food costs.

title: Track a Reporter's Progress on a Story
description: An editor needs to check in on a reporter's progress for a long-term story to ensure it is on track to meet its deadline.

title: Anonymize a Source in a Draft
description: A story uses an anonymous source. An editor must ensure the draft does not contain any details that could inadvertently identify the person.

title: Set up a Team Meeting
description: An editor needs to schedule a meeting with three reporters and a photo editor to plan upcoming coverage.

title: Arrange for a Press Pass
description: A reporter needs a press pass to gain access to a secure event, like a political convention.

title: Decline a Story Pitch
description: A reporter pitches a story, but the editor decides it is not a good fit for the publication and must decline it constructively.

title: Handle a Subpoena for a Reporter's Notes
description: The news organization has received a subpoena from a court demanding a reporter's notes for a story. This must be handled by the legal department.

title: Coordinate Between a Reporter and a Photographer
description: An editor needs to make sure a reporter and a photographer, who are in different locations, meet up at the right time and place for an assignment.

title: Check for Conflict of Interest
description: A reporter has been assigned a story about a company. The editor must check if the reporter has any financial or personal conflicts of interest.

title: Archive a Reporter's Notes
description: After a major investigation is published, the reporter's notes and source documents must be securely archived for legal and historical purposes.

title: Handle an Angry Call from a Story Subject
description: A person who was the subject of a critical story calls the newsroom, angry about their portrayal. An editor must handle the call.

title: Update the Newsroom's Style Guide
description: A new term has entered the public lexicon. A senior editor must decide on the correct spelling and usage and add it to the internal style guide.

title: Plan for a Reporter's Parental Leave
description: A reporter is going on parental leave for three months. Their editor must plan to reassign their beat and ongoing stories.

title: Researching a Company for an Exposé
description: A reporter is starting an investigation into a local company suspected of environmental violations and needs to gather initial background information.

title: Find an Expert Source for a Science Story
description: A reporter is writing about a new medical breakthrough and needs to find a qualified, independent expert to comment on the research.

title: File a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) Request
description: A journalist needs to obtain government records about a public contract and must file a formal FOIA request.

title: Cover a Live Press Conference
description: A reporter is covering a live press conference with the mayor and needs to capture key quotes and ask a relevant question.

title: Transcribe a Recorded Interview
description: A reporter has a one-hour audio recording of an interview and needs a written transcript to pull quotes from.

title: Fact-Check a Politician's Speech
description: A politician has just given a major speech. A fact-checker needs to verify the claims and statistics used in the speech.

title: Cover a Court Trial
description: A reporter is assigned to cover a high-profile criminal trial and must provide daily updates.

title: Develop a Story from a Press Release
description: A reporter receives a press release about a new product. They must go beyond the release to write an original story.

title: Verify an Anonymous Tip
description: A reporter receives an anonymous tip about corruption at a government agency. They must try to verify the information before proceeding.

title: Schedule an Interview with a Hostile Source
description: A reporter needs to interview a public figure who is known to be hostile to the press.

title: Analyze Campaign Finance Data
description: A political reporter has a large dataset of campaign contributions and needs to find patterns, such as which industries are donating the most to a candidate.

title: Live-Tweet a Sporting Event
description: A sports reporter is covering a championship game and needs to provide real-time updates and commentary on Twitter.

title: Scrape Data from a Government Website
description: A data journalist needs to collect data from a government website that does not offer a downloadable file. They must write a script to scrape the data.

title: Background a Political Candidate
description: A political reporter is assigned to cover a new candidate running for office and must research their entire public history.

title: Conduct an Off-the-Record Briefing
description: A source is willing to provide background information to help a reporter understand a complex topic, but does not want to be quoted. The reporter must conduct an 'off-the-record' briefing.

title: Verify a Viral Social Media Video
description: A dramatic video of an event is going viral. A reporter must verify its authenticity before reporting on it.

title: Report from a Natural Disaster Zone
description: A reporter is sent to cover a hurricane's aftermath. They must report on the damage and the human impact while dealing with difficult conditions.

title: Find a Case Study for a Trend Story
description: A reporter is writing about a national economic trend (e.g., inflation) and needs to find a local person or family to serve as a case study.

title: Prepare for an Interview
description: A reporter is about to conduct a major interview and needs to prepare a thorough list of questions and background materials.

title: Cover an Election Night
description: A political reporter is responsible for covering election results as they come in.

title: Find a Person's Contact Information
description: A reporter needs to find a phone number or email for a private citizen they want to interview.

title: Follow a Money Trail
description: A reporter is investigating a politician and wants to follow a money trail from a government contract to the politician's personal finances.

title: Cover a Protest
description: A reporter is sent to cover a protest. They need to report on the size of the crowd, their message, and any interactions with counter-protesters or police.

title: Develop Story Idea from Public Data
description: A data journalist browses a city's open data portal looking for potential stories.

title: Verify Authenticity of a Leaked Document
description: A reporter receives a supposedly leaked document. They must take steps to verify it is real before reporting on it.

title: Go Undercover for a Story
description: For a major investigation, a reporter needs to go undercover (e.g., get a job at a company) to expose wrongdoing. This requires extensive planning and ethical review.

title: Multi-Turn Recursive Workflow: Level 7
description: A deep, multi-step workflow requiring state persistence and recursive error handling.

title: Get Auto Insurance Quote
description: A potential new customer wants a quote for auto insurance for their vehicle.

title: File an Auto Claim (FNOL)
description: A policyholder calls to report a minor car accident (fender bender). This is the First Notice of Loss (FNOL).

title: Add a Driver to an Auto Policy
description: A policyholder wants to add their newly licensed teenage son to their auto insurance policy.

title: Make a Premium Payment
description: A customer calls to make a one-time payment on their homeowner's insurance policy with a credit card.

title: Apply for Term Life Insurance
description: A 35-year-old non-smoker wants to apply for a 20-year, $500,000 term life insurance policy.

title: Change Life Insurance Beneficiary
description: A policyholder recently got married and wants to change the beneficiary on their life insurance policy from their parent to their new spouse.

title: File a Life Insurance Death Claim
description: The beneficiary of a life insurance policy calls to report the death of the insured and start the claims process.

title: Inquire About Annuity Withdrawal
description: An annuity contract holder wants to know how much they can withdraw and what the tax implications would be.

title: Request Proof of Insurance
description: A customer needs a new auto insurance ID card because they lost their old one.

title: Check on an Existing Claim Status
description: A customer who filed a home insurance claim for water damage a week ago is calling for an update.

title: Get Renters Insurance Quote
description: A person renting an apartment wants a quote for renters insurance.

title: Set Up Automatic EFT Payments
description: A customer wants to have their monthly premium automatically deducted from their checking account.

title: Check Life Insurance Application Status
description: An applicant who applied for life insurance two weeks ago is calling to check the status.

title: Request a Loan Against Policy Cash Value
description: A whole life policyholder wants to take a loan against the cash value of their policy.

title: Process Annuity Death Benefit Payout
description: The beneficiary of an annuity contract needs to start the process of receiving the death benefit.

title: Start Annuity Annuitization
description: An annuity owner is retiring and wants to convert their deferred annuity into a stream of regular income payments.

title: Replace a Vehicle on an Auto Policy
description: A customer sold their old car and bought a new one, and needs to update their auto policy.

title: Roadside Assistance Request
description: A policyholder's car has a flat tire and they are calling to use their roadside assistance coverage.

title: Inquiry About Bundling Discount
description: A customer has an auto policy and is calling to see if they can get a discount by adding a renters policy.

title: Change Monthly Billing Date
description: A customer wants to change their monthly payment due date from the 1st to the 15th of the month.

title: Convert Term to Whole Life Insurance
description: A policyholder with a convertible term life policy wants to convert it to a whole life policy.

title: Update Policyholder Contact Information
description: A life insurance policyholder has moved and needs to update their address and phone number.

title: Inquire About a Life Insurance Claim Denial
description: A beneficiary is calling because their life insurance claim was denied, and they want to understand why.

title: Transfer Funds in a Variable Annuity
description: A variable annuity holder wants to move money from a bond subaccount to an equity subaccount.

title: Cancel an Auto Policy
description: A customer sold their car and wants to cancel their auto insurance policy.

title: File a Windshield Repair Claim
description: A customer has a small chip in their windshield and wants to file a claim under their comprehensive coverage.

title: Underwriting Review for Home Insurance
description: An underwriter is reviewing a new application for homeowner's insurance and sees a potential risk.

title: Resolve a Billing Error
description: A customer was double-billed for their premium this month due to a system error.

title: Inquire About a Lapsed Life Insurance Policy

title: Order a Critical Spare Part

title: Diagnose Hydraulic System Failure
description: The hydraulic system on a large excavator is operating sluggishly. A maintenance technician must diagnose the problem.

title: Close Out a Punch List Item

title: Analyze Asset Vibration Data

description: A piece of machinery has reached the end of its life and needs to be formally retired and removed from the asset register.

title: Schedule a Lubrication Route
description: A maintenance planner needs to schedule a weekly lubrication route for a maintenance technician.

title: Decommission and Dispose of an Asset

title: Manage Asset Warranty Claim
description: A new piece of equipment has failed within its warranty period. A maintenance manager must file a warranty claim with the vendor.

title: Perform Oil Analysis

title: Calculate Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO)

title: Update Asset Location

title: Plan a Plant Turnaround Event
description: A shutdown planner is developing the master plan for a major plant turnaround, which involves hundreds of individual work orders.

title: Check Asset Maintenance History
description: Before purchasing a used piece of heavy equipment, a manager wants to review its maintenance history.

title: Perform Root Cause Analysis (RCA) on Failure
description: Following a major equipment failure, a reliability engineer leads an RCA session to prevent recurrence.

title: Manage Equipment Calibration
description: A critical torque wrench used for bolt tensioning is due for its annual calibration.

title: Review Monthly Asset Performance
description: A plant manager is reviewing the monthly performance report for critical assets.

title: Create Bill of Materials for an Asset
description: A new asset has been created, and a planner needs to build its Bill of Materials (BOM) of spare parts in the maintenance system.

title: Manage Asset Decontamination
description: A piece of equipment that was in radioactive service needs to be decontaminated before it can be sent for repair.

title: Manage Asset Operating Strategy
description: A reliability engineer is reviewing the overall maintenance and operating strategy for a critical asset to ensure it is optimized for performance and life.

title: Manage Asset Transfer Between Sites
description: A piece of mobile equipment (e.g., a crane) is being permanently transferred from one project site to another.

title: Perform Asset Condition Monitoring
description: A technician is performing a routine condition monitoring route, collecting data from various assets.

title: Resolve Design Clash in 3D Model

title: Manage Transmittal of Documents

title: Perform Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (FMEA)
description: An engineer is leading an FMEA session for a new piece of heavy machinery to proactively identify and mitigate potential failure modes.

title: Check Drawing Against Company Standard

title: Create a Piping and Instrumentation Diagram (P&ID)

title: Select Material for Corrosive Service

title: Check for Design Standard Updates

title: Create 3D Model of a Site

title: Manage Drawing Revisions

title: Manage a Design Change Notice (DCN)

title: Perform Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) on a Weld

description: A construction crew has encountered an unforeseen underground obstruction and needs guidance from engineering.

title: Cancel a Pending Trade Order
description: A client placed a limit order to buy a stock, but now wants to cancel it before it executes.

title: Update Client KYC Information
description: A periodic review requires a client to update their KYC information, such as employment and source of funds.

title: Model College Savings Plan (529)
description: Clients want to understand how much they need to save monthly for their child's future college education.

title: Initiate Corporate Cash Concentration
description: A treasury manager needs to sweep funds from multiple subsidiary accounts into a central concentration account.

title: Update Financial Forecast
description: An FP&A analyst needs to update the quarterly revenue forecast based on new sales data.

title: Flag Suspicious Activity for SAR Filing
description: A compliance analyst identifies a series of unusual transactions that may require filing a Suspicious Activity Report (SAR).

title: Prepare Section of 10-Q Report
description: An accounting manager needs to draft the Management's Discussion and Analysis (MD&A) section for the quarterly 10-Q filing.

title: Close Savings Account
description: A customer wants to close their savings account and transfer the balance to their checking account.

title: Set a Travel Notification
description: A customer is traveling internationally and wants to put a travel notification on their credit card to avoid it being blocked.

title: Stop Payment on a Check
description: A customer has lost a check and wants to place a stop payment on it.

title: Request Personal Loan Payoff Quote
description: A customer wants to know the total amount required to pay off their personal loan today.

title: Identify Tax-Loss Harvesting Opportunities
description: An advisor wants to identify opportunities to sell securities at a loss to offset capital gains for a client.

title: Update Beneficiary on Investment Account
description: A client wants to add their newborn child as a beneficiary on their investment account.

title: Process a Mandatory Corporate Action
description: A company in a client's portfolio has announced a mandatory stock split, which needs to be reflected in the client's account.

title: Perform AML Check on New Client
description: As part of onboarding, a new client must be checked against AML and sanctions watchlists.

title: Forecast Short-Term Corporate Cash Flow
description: A treasury analyst needs to create a 13-week cash flow forecast for the company.

title: Analyze Departmental Spending
description: A manager asks an FP&A analyst to analyze the Marketing department's spending for the year to date.

title: Review Vendor for Financial Risk
description: Before signing a large contract, a risk officer needs to assess the financial stability of a new vendor.

title: Consolidate Financial Statements
description: An accountant needs to consolidate the financial statements of a parent company and its three subsidiaries.

title: Order New Checks
description: A customer has run out of checks and needs to order a new box.

title: Customer Reports Phishing Email
description: A customer reports receiving a suspicious email that claims to be from the bank.

title: Request Copy of a Cashed Check
description: A customer needs a copy of a specific check that has already been cashed for their records.

title: Inquire About a Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC)
description: A homeowner wants to learn about the bank's HELOC product and how to apply.

title: Distribute Funds from a Trust
description: A trustee requests a distribution from a trust account to one of its beneficiaries.

title: Research a Specific Stock
description: An advisor asks for a summary report on a specific company before recommending it to a client.

title: Set up a Dividend Reinvestment Plan (DRIP)
description: A client wants to automatically reinvest dividends from a specific stock back into buying more shares of that stock.

title: Verify Source of Wealth for Large Deposit
description: A client makes a large, unusual deposit, triggering a requirement to verify the source of the wealth.

title: Execute a Foreign Exchange (FX) Spot Trade
description: A corporate treasury needs to convert 1 million EUR to USD to fund US operations.

title: Create a New Annual Budget
description: An FP&A manager is starting the annual budgeting process and needs to create the initial budget template for department heads.

title: Test Financial System Disaster Recovery Plan
description: A risk officer is conducting a test of the disaster recovery (DR) plan for the primary accounting system.

title: Process Monthly Asset Depreciation
description: An accountant needs to run the monthly process to calculate and post depreciation for all fixed assets.

title: Activate New Debit Card
description: A customer has received their new debit card in the mail and needs to activate it.

title: Request Credit Limit Increase
description: A customer with a good payment history requests an increase to their credit card limit.

title: Cancel a Scheduled Bill Payment
description: A customer scheduled a bill payment but now needs to cancel it before it is sent.

title: Check Loan Application Status
description: A customer who recently applied for a mortgage wants to know the status of their application.

title: Change Investment Strategy
description: A client's risk tolerance has decreased, and they want to move from a 'Growth' to a 'Balanced' investment strategy.

title: Request Required Minimum Distribution (RMD)
description: A client of retirement age needs to take their annual RMD from their IRA.

title: Correct a Trade Error
description: A trade was executed in the wrong client account by mistake and needs to be corrected.

title: Close Wealth Management Account
description: A client is transferring their assets to another institution and wants to close their account.

title: Open a Commercial Line of Credit
description: A corporate client needs to open a line of credit to manage working capital.

title: Perform Scenario Analysis on Financial Plan
description: An FP&A analyst needs to model the impact of a potential recession (e.g., a 10% drop in sales) on the company's financial plan.

title: Review Employee Expense Report for Policy Violations
description: A compliance officer is reviewing an employee's expense report for any violations of company policy.

title: File Annual Report (10-K) with SEC
description: The reporting team is ready to file the company's annual 10-K report with the SEC.

title: Change Statement Delivery to Paperless
description: A customer wants to stop receiving paper statements in the mail and switch to e-statements.

title: Unblock Card After False Fraud Alert
description: A customer's card was blocked due to a suspected fraudulent transaction which the customer confirms was legitimate.

title: Inquiry About an Incoming Wire Transfer
description: A customer is expecting an incoming wire transfer and wants to know if it has arrived.

title: Request Mortgage Escrow Analysis
description: A customer's property taxes have increased, and they want to understand how this will affect their monthly mortgage payment.

title: Set Up Automated Investing
description: A client wants to set up an automatic monthly investment from their bank account into their portfolio.

title: Exercise Employee Stock Options
description: A client wants to exercise their vested employee stock options and sell the shares immediately (a 'cashless' exercise).

title: Open a Custodial Account (UTMA/UGMA)
description: A client wants to open an investment account for their minor child.

title: Create a Financial Plan for an Inheritance
description: A client is expecting to receive a large inheritance and wants advice on how to manage it.

title: Issue a Letter of Credit
description: A corporate client needs to issue a standby letter of credit (L/C) to a supplier as a guarantee of payment.

title: Analyze Profitability by Product
description: An FP&A analyst needs to determine which of the company's products are the most and least profitable.

title: Update Insider Trading List
description: A compliance officer needs to add a new executive to the company's insider trading list, restricting when they can trade company stock.

title: Reconcile Bank Statement
description: An accountant needs to perform the monthly bank reconciliation, matching transactions in the general ledger to the bank statement.

title: Add a Joint Owner to an Account
description: A customer wants to add their spouse as a joint owner with rights of survivorship to their checking account.

title: Dispute Credit Report Error
description: A customer has found an error on their credit report that originates from their account with the bank and wants it corrected.

title: Set up External Account for Transfers
description: A customer wants to link an account from another bank to be able to transfer funds.

title: Refinance an Auto Loan
description: A customer wants to refinance their existing auto loan from another lender to get a lower interest rate.

title: Consolidate Retirement Accounts (Rollover)
description: A new client wants to roll over an old 401(k) from a previous employer into a new IRA.

title: Provide Proof of Funds Letter
description: A client is buying a house and needs an official letter from the firm confirming they have sufficient funds for the purchase.

title: Change Account Risk Profile
description: A client has received a promotion and wants to increase their risk tolerance from 'Balanced' to 'Growth'.

title: Analyze an Estate Plan
description: A client wants a review of their current estate plan to ensure it meets their goals and is tax-efficient.

title: Draw Funds from a Line of Credit
description: A corporate client needs to draw $100,000 from their commercial line of credit to cover a temporary cash shortfall.

title: Create Board of Directors Financial Report
description: An FP&A director needs to create the financial package for the upcoming quarterly board of directors meeting.

title: Manage Data Retention Policy
description: A compliance officer needs to ensure that financial records older than the 7-year retention policy are being properly archived or disposed of.

title: Write Off Bad Debt
description: An accountant needs to write off an accounts receivable balance for a customer who has gone bankrupt.

title: Waive Monthly Account Fee
description: A long-time customer requests to have their monthly maintenance fee waived after their balance temporarily dropped below the minimum.

title: Verify a Large Check Deposit
description: A customer has deposited a large, out-of-state check, and the bank needs to place a hold on the funds for verification.

title: Resolve Incorrect Bill Payment
description: A customer used bill pay to send money to a utility company, but entered the wrong account number and the payment was not credited.

title: Provide Loan Amortization Schedule
description: A customer wants to see a full amortization schedule for their auto loan.

title: Review Portfolio Asset Allocation
description: An advisor is conducting an annual review and needs to check if a client's portfolio allocation is aligned with their goals.

title: Place a Good-'Til-Canceled (GTC) Trade Order
description: A client wants to place a limit order to buy a stock, but wants the order to remain active until it's either filled or they cancel it.

title: Add a Trusted Contact Person
description: A senior client wants to add their adult child as a trusted contact on their account for added security.

title: Plan for Charitable Giving
description: A client wants to donate appreciated stock to a charity to be more tax-efficient.

title: Manage a Commercial Card Program
description: A corporate administrator needs to issue a new commercial credit card to an employee and set their spending limits.

title: Analyze a Capital Expenditure Request
description: The FP&A team needs to analyze a request from the operations department to purchase a new piece of machinery for $500,000.

title: Respond to a Regulatory Inquiry
description: A financial regulator has sent an inquiry requesting trade data for a specific time period.

title: Manage Month-End Accruals
description: An accountant needs to create an accrual journal entry for expenses that have been incurred but not yet invoiced.

title: Open a Certificate of Deposit (CD)
description: A customer wants to open a 12-month CD with $10,000.

title: Resolve Debit Card Dispute (Provisional Credit)
description: A customer disputes a transaction. After an initial investigation, the bank issues a provisional credit while the full investigation continues.

title: Zelle / P2P Payment Inquiry
description: A customer sent a Zelle payment to a friend, but the friend claims they never received it.

title: Subordinate a Mortgage Lien
description: A customer is refinancing their first mortgage with another lender and needs the bank to subordinate its second mortgage (HELOC) to the new first mortgage.

title: Loan Approval – Risk Check
description: An agent evaluates a loan application for a high-risk customer.

title: Financial Audit Request
description: Evaluation of AI agent's ability to handle complex financial audit inquiries and data retrieval.
