title: Onboard Customer Rooftop Solar to VPP
description: A customer with an existing rooftop solar and battery system wants to enroll in the company's Virtual Power Plant (VPP) program.

title: EV Charging Billing Dispute
description: A customer claims they were overcharged for a public EV charging session.

title: Commercial Building Energy Efficiency Audit
description: An energy consultant is preparing a preliminary energy efficiency report for a commercial office building.

title: Dispatch Demand Response Event
description: A VPP operator receives a request from the grid operator to curtail 5 MW of load in a specific zone for 2 hours.

title: Generate VPP Performance Report
description: A VPP program manager needs a monthly performance and revenue report for a portfolio of residential batteries.

title: Optimize EV Fleet Charging Schedule
description: A fleet manager needs to create a charging schedule for 50 electric delivery vans to minimize electricity costs while ensuring all vehicles are fully charged by 6 AM.

title: Propose Solar Plus Storage Solution
description: A sales agent is creating a proposal for a commercial customer for a rooftop solar and battery storage system.

title: Generate Monthly Home Energy Report
description: An agent needs to automatically generate a personalized monthly energy report for a residential customer with rooftop solar.

title: Check Customer Eligibility for DER Program
description: A customer is interested in a new battery program. The agent must check if they are eligible based on their location and existing utility service.

title: Smart Thermostat Demand Response Optimization
description: During a heatwave, a VPP operator needs to use a fleet of smart thermostats to pre-cool homes before a demand response event.

title: Community Solar Program Subscription
description: A residential customer wants to sign up for a local community solar program to support renewable energy and receive bill credits.

title: Public EV Charger Site Selection
description: A business development manager needs to identify the best locations to install new public DC fast chargers.

title: Analyze Customer Switch to Time-of-Use Rate
description: A customer on a flat electricity rate wants to know if they would save money by switching to a Time-of-Use (TOU) rate.

title: Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) Pilot Program Analysis
description: An innovation manager is analyzing data from a V2G pilot program to assess its effectiveness and potential for expansion.

title: Green Hydrogen Production Feasibility Study
description: An industrial customer wants to explore the feasibility of producing green hydrogen on-site using a dedicated solar farm and electrolyzer.

title: Microgrid Resilience Analysis
description: A hospital facility manager wants to assess how long their new microgrid (solar + battery + diesel generator) can power their critical loads during a grid outage.

title: Fleet Electrification Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) Analysis
description: A corporate client wants to know the TCO of replacing their fleet of 100 diesel delivery vans with electric equivalents.

title: Demand Response Event Settlement
description: After a demand response event, a program manager needs to calculate the performance and payments for participating customers.

title: Renewable Natural Gas (RNG) Sourcing
description: A large industrial customer wants to source Renewable Natural Gas (RNG) to reduce the carbon footprint of their thermal processes.

title: Corporate Carbon Accounting Report
description: A sustainability consultant is preparing a carbon accounting report for a client, covering their Scope 2 emissions from purchased electricity.

title: Enroll Customer in EV Managed Charging
description: A customer with a new electric vehicle wants to enroll in a program where the utility manages their charging to occur during off-peak hours in exchange for a lower rate.

title: Industrial Process Electrification Study
description: An industrial customer wants to replace their natural gas-fired process heaters with electric alternatives to decarbonize.

title: Analyze Potential for Heat Pump Adoption
description: A utility's electrification program manager wants to identify customers who would be good candidates for switching from a gas furnace to an electric heat pump.

title: Analyze Grid Impact of Building Electrification
description: A distribution planner needs to forecast the grid impact of a city's policy to ban natural gas in new construction, leading to all-electric homes.

title: Wind Turbine Performance Fault Diagnosis
description: An operations manager receives an alert for a wind turbine producing 15% less power than expected given current wind speeds. The agent must diagnose the potential cause.

title: Solar Farm Generation Forecast
description: An operator needs an accurate 48-hour power generation forecast for a 100 MW solar farm.

title: Battery Storage Dispatch Optimization
description: An operator needs to create an optimal charge/discharge schedule for a 50 MW / 200 MWh battery system for the next 24 hours to maximize revenue from energy arbitrage.

title: Solar Farm Preventive Maintenance Scheduling
description: An operations planner needs to schedule the annual preventive maintenance for a portfolio of solar farms, minimizing production loss.

title: Grid Curtailment Event Analysis
description: A solar farm was curtailed by the grid operator. An analyst needs to verify the reason and calculate the financial impact.

title: Solar Farm Inverter Failure Alert
description: The SCADA system reports a complete failure of one of the central inverters at a solar farm. The agent must assess the impact and initiate a response.

title: Vegetation Management Alert near Transmission Line
description: An agent analyzes satellite imagery and identifies fast-growing vegetation that could endanger a key transmission line corridor owned by the energy company.

title: Hydro Dam Water Level Monitoring
description: An operator at a hydroelectric dam needs to assess current water levels and inflow forecasts to plan generation for the coming week.

title: Asset Health Index Calculation
description: An asset manager wants to calculate a composite 'health index' for each wind turbine in a farm to prioritize maintenance.

title: Analyze Drone Inspection Imagery of Wind Turbine Blades
description: An asset inspector is reviewing high-resolution images from a drone inspection of a wind turbine blade to identify and classify defects.

title: Substation Transformer Health Monitoring
description: An agent is monitoring a large substation transformer for signs of degradation using dissolved gas analysis (DGA).

title: Report Unplanned Outage to ISO
description: A gas-fired peaker plant unexpectedly trips offline. The operator must immediately report the outage to the ISO/RTO.

title: Solar Panel Soiling Loss Analysis
description: An O&M manager wants to determine if the cost of cleaning the panels at a solar farm is justified by the expected gain in energy production.

title: Black Start Capability Test Plan
description: A system operator needs to create a plan to test the black start capability of a power plant, which is its ability to start up without help from the grid.

title: Monitor SCADA System for Cybersecurity Threats
description: A cybersecurity analyst is monitoring the network traffic of a power plant's SCADA system for anomalies that could indicate a cyber attack.

title: Maintenance Work Order Prioritization
description: An O&M supervisor has a backlog of 50 open work orders across a wind portfolio and needs the agent to prioritize them based on urgency and economic impact.

title: Summarize Control Room Log for Shift Handover
description: A control room operator is ending their 12-hour shift and needs the agent to summarize all key events from the logbook for the incoming operator.

title: Critical Spares Inventory Optimization

description: A customer is unhappy with a policy and demands to be escalated to a supervisor.

title: Update Subscription Payment Method
description: A customer with a recurring subscription needs to update the credit card used for their monthly payments.

title: Deactivate Expired Coupon Codes
description: An automated job runs daily to find and deactivate any coupon codes that have passed their expiration date.

title: Proactively Handle a Late Shipment
description: A fulfillment delay means an order will not ship on time. The agent must proactively notify the customer.

title: Verify Customer Age for Restricted Product
description: A customer is trying to purchase an age-restricted item (e.g., wine, a rated video game) and must have their age verified.

title: A/B Test an Email Subject Line
description: A marketer wants to test two different subject lines for a promotional email to see which one has a better open rate.

title: Hide Prices for Logged-Out Users (B2B)
description: A B2B e-commerce site wants to hide product pricing for all users who are not logged in to a verified business account.

title: Process 'Return to Sender' Shipment
description: A package is returned to the warehouse by the carrier because of an invalid address. The agent needs to process this return.

title: Request a Product Review After Purchase
description: A week after a customer's order is delivered, the system should automatically send an email asking them to review the products they bought.

title: Identify Customer Churn Risk
description: A system analyzes customer behavior to identify those at risk of churning (i.e., ceasing to be a customer).

title: Add a Video to a Product Page
description: A merchandiser wants to embed a product demonstration video from YouTube onto a product page.

title: Handle Failed Subscription Payment
description: A customer's recurring subscription payment fails due to an expired credit card. The system needs to handle this gracefully.

title: Handle Item Going Out of Stock During Checkout
description: A customer has an item in their cart, but by the time they reach the final checkout step, another customer has bought the last unit.

title: Pause a Subscription
description: Instead of canceling, a customer wants to pause their monthly subscription for three months while they are on vacation.

title: Manually Set Up Related Products
description: A merchandiser wants to manually define a set of 'related products' to display on a specific product page (e.g., showing the matching charger and case for a phone).

title: Process Order Paid by Purchase Order/Check (B2B)
description: A B2B customer places an order using a purchase order and will pay by check. The order should not be shipped until payment is received.

title: Handle a Product Recall
description: A manufacturer has issued a safety recall for a product. The company needs to notify all customers who purchased it.

title: Calculate Customer Lifetime Value (CLV)
description: A marketing analyst wants to calculate the lifetime value of a specific customer.

title: Apply Tiered Shipping Rates
description: The company has a tiered shipping rate structure (e.g., free shipping over $50). The system must apply the correct rate at checkout.

title: Combine Multiple Orders for Shipping
description: A customer placed two separate orders going to the same address within a few hours. A warehouse agent wants to combine them into one shipment to save costs.

title: Find an Order by Item Purchased
description: A customer can't remember their order number but knows they bought a specific item last month. An agent needs to find their order.

title: Create an Upsell Offer in the Cart
description: When a customer adds a specific product to their cart, the system should offer them a related, more premium product as an upsell.

title: Bulk Edit Product Weights for Shipping
description: A logistics manager realizes the weights for an entire product line were entered incorrectly, affecting shipping cost calculations. They need to perform a bulk update.

title: Process a Drop-Ship Order
description: A customer orders an item that is not stocked in the warehouse but is instead shipped directly from a third-party supplier (drop-shipping).

title: Handle Customer Data Privacy Request (GDPR/CCPA)
description: A customer submits a formal request to see all the personal data the company has stored about them.

title: Create a Cross-Sell Offer on Product Page
description: On the product page for a digital camera, the system should display a 'Frequently Bought Together' section with a memory card and a camera bag.

title: Set a Product to Pre-Order Status
description: A highly anticipated new product is not yet released, but the company wants to allow customers to pre-order it.

title: The Case of the Missing Refund
description: Customer Jane Doe is frustrated because she returned her item two weeks ago but hasn't seen a refund for Order #OM-5566.

title: Airborne Threat Assessment
description: An operator must assess multiple inbound, unidentified aircraft to determine their threat level and recommend an appropriate response.

title: Maritime Smuggling Vessel Identification
description: An analyst must fuse satellite imagery (IMINT) with signals intelligence (SIGINT) to identify a vessel suspected of smuggling.

title: Forward Operating Base Fuel Resupply
description: A logistics officer must reroute a fuel convoy after its primary route is compromised by enemy activity.

title: Course of Action Analysis for Bridge Seizure
description: A mission planner must develop and compare two courses of action (COA) for seizing a critical bridge: an air assault and a ground assault.

title: Network Intrusion Detection and Response
description: A cybersecurity analyst must respond to an alert indicating a potential advanced persistent threat (APT) actor on a classified network.

title: Air Defense Asset Management
description: An Air Defense Officer must allocate surface-to-air missile (SAM) systems to engage multiple incoming cruise missiles.

title: Vehicle Target Identification
description: An analyst must use drone full-motion video (FMV) to positively identify a specific vehicle in a convoy believed to be carrying a high-value individual (HVI).

title: Helicopter Predictive Maintenance
description: A maintenance officer receives an alert from a helicopter's health and usage monitoring system (HUMS) predicting an impending gearbox failure.

title: Airspace Route Deconfliction
description: A planner must deconflict the flight paths of a strike package, an ISR drone, and a refueling tanker in a compressed airspace.

title: SCADA System Vulnerability Assessment
description: A cyber analyst must assess a report of a new vulnerability in a SCADA system that controls a base's power grid.

title: Rules of Engagement Compliance Check
description: Before approving a strike, a commander must use an agent to verify that the proposed target and weapon selection comply with the current Rules of Engagement (ROE).

title: Border Anomaly Detection
description: An analyst must review wide-area motion imagery (WAMI) to detect anomalous activity along a monitored border.

title: Unit Personnel Readiness Assessment
description: A commander needs to assess their unit's personnel readiness for an upcoming rapid deployment.

title: Mission Resource and Ordnance Planning
description: A planner must select the optimal aircraft and munitions to destroy a hardened enemy command bunker.

title: Information Operations Planning
description: An Information Operations officer must plan a campaign to disrupt an adversary's propaganda network.

title: Common Operating Picture Management
description: An operator must manage the Common Operating Picture (COP) during a multi-domain operation, ensuring all friendly and enemy tracks are accurately displayed.

title: ISR Drone Asset Planning
description: An ISR planner must create a flight plan for a surveillance drone to cover multiple intelligence collection targets.

title: Brigade Deployment Planning
description: A logistics planner must create a strategic deployment plan to move a brigade and its equipment from its home base to a theater of operations.

title: Dynamic Mission Re-tasking
description: A fighter jet on a routine patrol is dynamically re-tasked to strike a newly discovered, time-sensitive target.

title: Cyber Forensics and Attribution
description: Following a network breach, a cyber forensics analyst must analyze the attacker's malware to determine its capabilities and origin.

title: Subsurface Threat Assessment
description: A naval operator must assess an unidentified subsurface contact detected by sonar to determine if it is a hostile submarine.

title: Ground Force Activity Analysis
description: An analyst must fuse ground sensor data, drone video, and communications intelligence to assess an enemy's intent in a specific sector.

title: Urgent MEDEVAC Resource Allocation
description: A logistics officer must coordinate an urgent medical evacuation (MEDEVAC) for a critically wounded soldier from a remote location.

title: Course of Action Analysis for Cyber Attack
description: A cyber mission planner must evaluate two COAs to neutralize an adversary's air defense network: a kinetic strike vs. a non-kinetic cyberattack.

title: Spear-Phishing Attack Response
description: An analyst detects a targeted spear-phishing campaign against high-ranking officials.

title: Special Operations Asset Management
description: A C2 operator must coordinate air, ground, and intelligence assets to support a special operations team conducting a raid.

title: Naval Vessel Identification
description: An analyst must use a combination of radar data and Electronic Support Measures (ESM) to identify a warship operating without a transponder.

title: Tank Engine Predictive Maintenance
description: An onboard sensor in a main battle tank predicts imminent engine failure based on oil analysis and temperature data.

title: Ground Convoy Route Deconfliction
description: A planner must deconflict the routes of two separate convoys (one supply, one combat) and a scheduled artillery fire mission.

title: Drone Software Vulnerability Assessment
description: A new vulnerability is discovered in the operating system of a widely used surveillance drone.

title: Maritime Interdiction ROE Compliance
description: A warship commander needs to determine if they are authorized to board a vessel suspected of violating sanctions based on the current ROE.

title: Network Traffic Anomaly Detection
description: An analyst must monitor network traffic logs to detect anomalous behavior indicative of a stealthy cyberattack.

title: Fighter Pilot Readiness Assessment
description: A squadron commander needs to ensure all pilots are current on their training and certifications before a major exercise.

title: ISR Asset Resource Planning
description: A planner must select the best ISR asset to find a mobile surface-to-air missile (SAM) launcher hidden in a forested area.

title: Countering Social Media Disinformation
description: An IO officer detects an adversary-controlled bot network spreading disinformation about troop movements on social media.

title: Resolving Conflicting COP Data
description: A friendly aircraft's IFF system is malfunctioning, causing it to appear as an 'unidentified' track on the COP, dangerously close to an air defense zone.

title: Satellite Re-tasking for Imagery
description: An analyst needs to urgently re-task an imaging satellite to capture pictures of a suspected new military construction site.

title: Equipment Redeployment and Reset
description: A logistics planner must plan the redeployment of a unit's equipment from a theater of operations back to its home base for maintenance and reset.

title: Dynamic Re-tasking due to Weather
description: A planned air strike is aborted due to bad weather over the primary target. The strike package must be re-tasked to a secondary target.

title: Insider Threat Cyber Forensics
description: An analyst must investigate suspicious network activity from an insider's account, including large data transfers to an external device.

title: Ballistic Missile Launch Threat Assessment
description: An operator at a strategic command center must assess a detected ballistic missile launch to determine its trajectory and intended target.

title: Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) Fusion
description: An OSINT analyst must fuse social media posts, news reports, and satellite imagery to assess battle damage after a strike.

title: Artillery Ammunition Resupply
description: A logistics officer must manage the emergency resupply of ammunition to an artillery unit in heavy combat.

title: Course of Action Analysis for Hostage Rescue
description: A planner must compare two COAs for a hostage rescue: a stealthy nighttime insertion vs. a rapid daylight assault.

title: DDoS Attack Mitigation
description: An analyst must mitigate a Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attack that is overwhelming a public-facing military website.

title: Coordinated Fires Asset Management
description: A fires officer must deconflict and synchronize artillery, naval gunfire, and close air support to suppress enemy defenses.

title: High-Value Individual Identification
description: An analyst must use facial recognition on drone footage to confirm the identity of a high-value individual (HVI) at a meeting.

title: Naval Vessel Predictive Maintenance
description: A ship's monitoring system detects unusual vibration in a propeller shaft, indicating a potential future failure.

title: Maritime Route Deconfliction
description: A planner must deconflict the transit route of a carrier strike group with commercial shipping lanes and a known submarine threat area.

title: Weapon System Software Vulnerability
description: A cyber analyst learns of a vulnerability in the targeting software of a smart bomb that could be exploited by GPS spoofing.

title: Cyber Attack ROE Compliance
description: A cyber commander must verify that a proposed cyberattack against an adversary's infrastructure complies with the Law of Armed Conflict and specific ROE.

title: Maritime 'Dark Vessel' Anomaly Detection
description: An analyst must identify 'dark vessels' (ships that have turned off their AIS transponders) in a high-traffic shipping lane.

title: Critical Skill Specialist Readiness
description: A joint task force commander needs to identify all available personnel with a critical skill (e.g., a specific foreign language) across all branches of service.

title: Electronic Warfare Resource Planning
description: A planner must select the correct electronic warfare (EW) jamming asset to suppress an enemy's air defense radar during a strike.

title: Military Deception Planning
description: An IO officer must plan a military deception (MILDEC) operation to make an adversary believe an attack is coming from one direction, while the real attack comes from another.

title: Friendly Fire Prevention via COP
description: An operator notices a ground unit has called for an air strike dangerously close to another friendly unit's position.

title: Multi-INT Asset Planning
description: A planner must coordinate satellite imagery (IMINT), signals intelligence (SIGINT), and a human intelligence (HUMINT) source to find a hidden weapons cache.

title: Personnel Redeployment Planning
description: A logistics planner must create a schedule to redeploy 5,000 personnel from a theater of operations back to their home country.

title: Dynamic Re-tasking due to Pop-up Threat
description: A flight of attack aircraft is en route to a planned target when a previously unknown mobile SAM system activates near their flight path.

title: Ransomware Forensic Data Recovery
description: A critical server has been hit by ransomware, encrypting all files. A forensics analyst must attempt to recover the data without paying the ransom.

title: Drone Swarm Threat Assessment
description: An operator must assess an approaching swarm of small, unidentified drones to determine if they are a coordinated threat to a naval vessel.

title: Multi-INT Fusion for Threat Network
description: An analyst must fuse HUMINT, SIGINT, and financial intelligence (FININT) to map a terrorist network.

title: Potable Water Resupply in Arid Environment
description: A logistics officer must plan the production and distribution of potable water for a battalion operating in the desert.

title: Course of Action Analysis for Maritime Chokepoint Transit
description: A naval planner must compare two COAs for a fleet to transit a dangerous maritime chokepoint: a high-speed transit vs. a slower, more deliberate transit with enhanced ISR.

title: Classified Data Spill Response
description: An analyst discovers that a classified document was accidentally sent over an unclassified email system.

title: Close Air Support (CAS) Asset Management
description: A Joint Terminal Attack Controller (JTAC) must select and control a Close Air Support aircraft to engage enemy forces in close proximity to friendly troops.

title: Air Defense Radar Site Identification
description: An analyst must use electronic intelligence (ELINT) to identify the specific type of an enemy air defense radar site.

title: Fighter Jet Landing Gear Predictive Maintenance
description: Sensors on a fighter jet's landing gear indicate abnormal stress during recent landings, predicting a potential failure.

title: Submarine Route Deconfliction
description: A submarine planner must plot a safe underwater transit route that avoids known undersea obstacles, neutral submarine operating areas, and surface shipping.

title: Radio Encryption Vulnerability
description: A new cryptographic vulnerability is discovered in the encryption algorithm used by a military radio system.

title: Self-Defense ROE Compliance Check
description: A ship's captain is being approached by fast-attack craft and must determine if they have demonstrated hostile intent, authorizing engagement in self-defense under the ROE.

title: Personnel Behavior Anomaly Detection
description: An analyst must review a service member's network activity for anomalies that could indicate an insider threat (e.g., espionage, radicalization).

title: Medical Personnel Readiness
description: A hospital ship commander needs to verify that all medical staff have the required certifications and immunizations for an upcoming humanitarian mission.

title: Logistics Convoy Resource Planning
description: A planner must select the right number and type of vehicles for a supply convoy, including gun trucks for security.

title: Psychological Operations (PSYOP) Planning
description: A PSYOP officer must plan a leaflet drop and radio broadcast campaign to encourage enemy soldiers to surrender.

title: Managing COP with Sensor Outage
description: A key long-range radar goes offline, creating a gap in the Common Operating Picture. An operator must mitigate the gap.

title: Unattended Ground Sensor Planning
description: An intelligence officer must plan the placement of unattended ground sensors (UGS) to monitor a key trail used by insurgents.

title: Equipment Redeployment Environmental Compliance
description: A logistics officer must ensure all vehicles being redeployed are thoroughly cleaned to prevent the transport of foreign soil, seeds, or contaminants.

title: Dynamic Re-tasking of CAS for Troops in Contact
description: A ground unit makes an urgent call for Close Air Support after coming under heavy fire. A nearby CAS aircraft on a different mission must be re-tasked.

title: Mobile Device Forensics
description: An analyst must conduct a forensic analysis of a captured enemy combatant's smartphone to extract intelligence.

title: Cyber-Physical Threat Assessment
description: An operator sees a cyberattack on a power grid control system occur simultaneously with drone attacks on substations.

title: Imagery Change Detection
description: An imagery analyst must compare a new satellite image with an older one of the same location to detect any changes, such as new military construction.

title: Blood Supply Chain Management
description: A medical logistics officer must manage the supply of blood products to a forward surgical team, ensuring it remains within its temperature-controlled limits.

title: Course of Action Analysis for Noncombatant Evacuation (NEO)
description: A planner must compare COAs for evacuating citizens from a country with a deteriorating security situation: using military aircraft vs. chartering civilian aircraft.

title: GPS Jamming Attack Response
description: An operator of a drone reports that they are losing their GPS signal due to suspected enemy jamming.

title: Maritime Patrol Aircraft Management
description: A C2 operator must manage a fleet of maritime patrol aircraft (MPA) to maintain surveillance over a large ocean area.

title: Underground Facility Identification
description: An analyst must use a combination of thermal imagery and measurement and signature intelligence (MASINT) to identify a hidden underground facility.

title: Submarine Atmosphere Control Predictive Maintenance
description: A submarine's atmosphere control system reports slightly elevated CO2 levels, predicting a potential failure in the CO2 scrubbers.

title: Multi-Domain Route Deconfliction
description: A planner must deconflict a mission that involves a satellite pass, a high-altitude reconnaissance aircraft, and a ground patrol all operating in the same area at the same time.

title: Network Router Vulnerability Assessment
description: A major network hardware vendor announces a critical remote code execution vulnerability in their enterprise routers.

title: Collateral Damage Estimate ROE Compliance
description: A proposed air strike's collateral damage estimate (CDE) indicates a risk of civilian casualties. A legal officer must check if this risk is acceptable under the ROE.

title: Supply Route Anomaly Detection
description: An analyst must monitor traffic patterns on a main supply route to detect behavior indicative of a planned ambush, like the absence of normal traffic.

title: Managing Personnel Readiness Under Stop-Loss
description: A unit is under 'Stop-Loss' (personnel cannot leave the military) for a deployment. A personnel officer must track the status of soldiers whose contracts would have otherwise expired.

title: Special Operations Infiltration Resource Planning
description: A planner must select the best infiltration method for a special operations team: a quiet electric vehicle, a helicopter, or a HALO jump.

title: Defensive Information Operations
description: An IO officer must protect a friendly unit's social media presence from being hijacked or spoofed by an adversary.

title: Multi-Platform Track Fusion
description: A target is being tracked simultaneously by a ground radar, a naval ship, and an aircraft. An operator must fuse these three separate tracks into a single, high-confidence track on the COP.

title: Layered ISR Planning
description: A planner must create a layered ISR plan to provide 24/7 surveillance of a high-threat area, using a mix of satellites, high-altitude drones, and medium-altitude drones.

title: Redeployment Customs Compliance
description: A logistics officer must ensure all equipment and personnel baggage being redeployed complies with customs regulations of the home country.

title: Dynamic Re-tasking due to System Failure
description: The primary aircraft for a time-sensitive strike mission has a critical system failure on takeoff. A backup aircraft must be immediately launched and re-tasked.

title: Network Forensics for Lateral Movement
description: After a breach, a forensics analyst must analyze network logs to trace the attacker's lateral movement across the network from the initial point of compromise.

title: Malware Detection Triage
description: A Security Operations Center (SOC) analyst receives a high-priority alert from an Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) tool indicating malware on a user's workstation.

title: Threat Hunting for DNS Tunneling
description: A threat hunter hypothesizes that an attacker is exfiltrating data via DNS tunneling. They must query DNS logs to find evidence.

title: Ransomware Containment
description: An incident responder must contain a ransomware outbreak that is actively spreading across the network.

title: Disk Forensics for Data Exfiltration
description: A forensics investigator must analyze a disk image from a compromised server to determine what data was stolen.

title: Web Application Vulnerability Scan
description: A vulnerability analyst must run a dynamic application security test (DAST) against a new public-facing web application before it goes live.

title: Internal Network Penetration Test
description: A penetration tester, having gained initial access to a workstation, must attempt to escalate privileges to Domain Admin.

title: Emergency Server Patching
description: A critical, zero-day vulnerability is announced for the operating system used by all web servers. An analyst must coordinate emergency patching.

title: Operationalizing Threat Intelligence
description: A threat intelligence analyst receives a feed with new Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) for an active malware campaign.

title: New Employee Onboarding
description: An IAM analyst must provision a new account and access for a new employee starting in the marketing department.

title: MFA Token Reset
description: A user who lost their phone needs their multi-factor authentication (MFA) token reset so they can log in.

title: Privileged Access Checkout
description: A database administrator needs to check out the credentials for a privileged database account to perform maintenance.

title: Quarterly Access Review
description: A security analyst initiates the quarterly access review process, requiring managers to certify their direct reports' access rights.

title: Password Policy Update
description: A GRC analyst must update the corporate password policy to meet a new compliance framework's requirements (e.g., increasing minimum length).

title: New Vendor Risk Assessment
description: A GRC analyst must conduct a security risk assessment of a new SaaS vendor that will handle sensitive customer data.

title: PCI DSS Compliance Audit
description: A GRC analyst must gather evidence to demonstrate compliance with a specific PCI DSS requirement for an upcoming audit.

title: Phishing Simulation Campaign
description: A security awareness manager must conduct a simulated phishing campaign to test employee vigilance.

title: User-Reported Phishing Triage
description: A SOC analyst receives an email reported by a user as suspicious and must determine if it is malicious.

title: Threat Hunting for Malicious PowerShell
description: A threat hunter suspects an attacker is using obfuscated PowerShell commands for 'living off the land'. They must search command line logs for evidence.

title: User Account Compromise Containment
description: An alert indicates a user account is logging in from two different countries simultaneously. An incident responder must contain the compromised account.

title: Network Forensics for C2 Communication
description: An investigator must analyze a network packet capture (PCAP) file from a compromised host to identify the attacker's command-and-control (C2) channel.

title: Quarterly Network Vulnerability Scan
description: A vulnerability analyst must perform the quarterly authenticated vulnerability scan of the company's DMZ network segment.

title: Physical Security Penetration Test
description: A penetration tester is tasked with gaining unauthorized physical access to a corporate office building to test security controls.

title: Monthly Workstation Patching
description: An analyst must deploy the latest 'Patch Tuesday' security updates to all corporate workstations.

title: Analyzing a New Phishing Kit
description: A threat intelligence analyst discovers a new phishing kit being sold on a dark web forum and must analyze it to develop countermeasures.

title: Employee Termination
description: An IAM analyst must immediately deprovision all access for an employee who has been terminated.

title: SSO Service Outage
description: The company's Single Sign-On (SSO) provider is having an outage, preventing all users from logging into cloud applications. An analyst must manage the incident.

title: Privileged Session Monitoring
description: A security analyst must review a recorded session of a contractor who used a privileged account to access a critical server.

title: New Access Role Creation
description: A new project requires a new access role to be created that combines permissions from multiple applications. An IAM analyst must design and create the role.

title: Policy Exception Request
description: A developer requests a temporary exception to the security policy that blocks outbound traffic so they can connect to a new third-party API for testing.

title: System Security Risk Assessment
description: A GRC analyst must perform a security risk assessment on a legacy, business-critical application that cannot be easily patched.

title: GDPR Data Deletion Audit
description: A GRC analyst must audit the process for handling 'right to be forgotten' requests to ensure compliance with GDPR.

title: New Hire Security Training
description: A security awareness manager must ensure all new hires complete their mandatory security awareness training within 30 days of starting.

title: Network IDS Alert Triage
description: A SOC analyst receives an alert from a network Intrusion Detection System (IDS) for a potential SQL injection attempt against a web server.

title: Threat Hunting for Lateral Movement
description: A threat hunter is looking for signs of lateral movement by searching for suspicious use of administrative tools like PsExec.

title: Malware Eradication
description: Following a malware outbreak, an incident responder must ensure the malware is completely removed from all affected systems.

title: Memory Forensics for Fileless Malware
description: An investigator suspects a host is compromised with fileless malware living only in memory. They must perform a memory analysis.

title: Source Code Repository Scan
description: An analyst must configure a Static Application Security Testing (SAST) tool to automatically scan a source code repository for vulnerabilities on every new commit.

title: Social Engineering Penetration Test
description: A penetration tester is tasked with gaining a user's password through a vishing (voice phishing) phone call.

title: Third-Party Software Patching
description: A vulnerability is discovered in a widely used third-party library (e.g., Log4j). An analyst must find all applications using the library and coordinate patching.

title: Analyzing Adversary TTPs
description: A threat intelligence analyst is researching a specific adversary group to understand their tactics, techniques, and procedures (TTPs).

title: Contractor Onboarding
description: An IAM analyst must provision a temporary account for a contractor with access that automatically expires at the end of their contract.

title: Password Policy Enforcement
description: An analyst must configure the domain controller to enforce a new, stronger password policy.

title: Service Account Credential Management
description: An analyst must onboard a new application's service account into the PAM tool to enable automatic password rotation.

title: Separation of Duties Policy
description: An analyst must create a Separation of Duties (SoD) policy in the IGA tool to prevent a single user from having two conflicting permissions (e.g., creating a vendor and approving a payment).

title: Annual Acceptable Use Policy Review
description: A GRC analyst must conduct the annual review of the Acceptable Use Policy (AUP) and require all employees to re-acknowledge it.

title: Data Classification Risk Assessment
description: A GRC analyst discovers a database containing sensitive PII that is incorrectly classified as 'Public'. They must perform a risk assessment.

title: HIPAA Compliance Audit
description: An analyst must audit access logs for a database containing patient data to ensure only authorized medical personnel have accessed it.

title: Role-Based Security Training
description: A security awareness manager needs to assign specialized, role-based training to different departments.

title: WAF Alert Triage
description: A SOC analyst receives an alert from the Web Application Firewall (WAF) for a cross-site scripting (XSS) attempt.

title: Threat Hunting for New Services
description: A threat hunter is looking for malware persistence by searching for newly created, unauthorized services on workstations.

title: Cloud Data Leak Containment
description: A Data Loss Prevention (DLP) tool alerts that a file containing sensitive data has been uploaded to a public cloud storage site.

title: Log Analysis for Account Compromise
description: An investigator must analyze logs from multiple systems (AD, VPN, O365) to create a timeline of an account compromise.

title: Container Image Vulnerability Scan
description: An analyst must scan a new Docker container image for known vulnerabilities in its OS packages and libraries before it can be deployed to production.

title: Wireless Network Penetration Test
description: A penetration tester is tasked with cracking the password for the corporate guest Wi-Fi network.

title: Database Server Patching
description: An analyst must apply a critical security patch to a production database server, which requires downtime.

title: Prioritizing a new CVE
description: A new critical CVE is announced. A threat intelligence analyst must determine its relevance and risk to the organization.

title: Employee Role Change
description: An employee is moving from the Sales department to the Finance department. An IAM analyst must update their access accordingly.

title: Troubleshoot Access Denied Issue
description: A user is reporting they are receiving an 'Access Denied' error when trying to access a folder they believe they should have access to.

title: Emergency 'Break Glass' Access
description: A critical system is down, and the normal administrator is unavailable. A different administrator needs emergency 'break glass' access to fix it.

title: Orphaned Account Cleanup
description: An analyst must run a report to find 'orphaned' accounts (accounts that are not associated with a current employee) and disable them.

title: Cloud Security Policy Creation
description: As the company moves to the cloud, a GRC analyst must create a new Cloud Security Policy from scratch.

title: New Project Risk Assessment
description: A GRC analyst must conduct a security risk assessment for a new internal project to develop a mobile application.

title: SOX ITGC Audit
description: An analyst must test IT General Controls (ITGCs) for a Sarbanes-Oxley (SOX) audit, specifically focusing on change management.

title: Executive Threat Briefing
description: A security awareness manager must prepare and deliver a threat briefing to the company's executive leadership team.

title: Insider Threat Alert Triage
description: A SOC analyst receives an alert from a User and Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA) tool that a user has downloaded an unusually large amount of data.

title: Threat Hunting with Command Line Auditing
description: A threat hunter is searching for suspicious command line arguments that might indicate malicious activity.

title: Malicious Domain Containment
description: Threat intelligence indicates a domain is being used to host malware. An incident responder must block access to it.

title: Malicious Mobile App Forensics
description: An investigator must perform a forensic analysis of a suspicious Android application (APK file).

title: Cloud Security Posture Scan
description: An analyst must run a Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) scan to find misconfigurations in the company's AWS environment.

title: API Penetration Test
description: A penetration tester is tasked with finding security flaws in a new REST API.

title: Live Kernel Patching
description: An analyst must apply a critical vulnerability patch to the Linux kernel on hundreds of production servers without rebooting them.

title: Weekly Threat Intelligence Briefing
description: A threat intelligence analyst must prepare the weekly threat briefing for the CISO and security leadership.

title: Rehired Employee Onboarding
description: An employee who left the company six months ago is rehired. An IAM analyst must re-enable their old account and provision new access.

title: Certificate-Based Authentication Issue
description: A user is unable to access a secure internal website because their client certificate has expired.

title: API Key Rotation
description: An analyst must rotate the secret API key for a critical service that integrates with a third-party vendor.

title: Dormant Account Review
description: An analyst must run a quarterly report to find accounts that have not been used for over 90 days and disable them.

title: Policy Violation Investigation
description: A DLP tool flags an employee for attempting to email a sensitive document to their personal email address, violating policy. A GRC analyst must investigate.

title: Third-Party Breach Risk Assessment
description: A third-party vendor announces they have suffered a data breach. A GRC analyst must assess the risk to their own company.

title: Automated Audit Evidence Collection
description: An analyst must configure a GRC tool to automatically collect evidence for a compliance audit.

title: Security Awareness Metrics Reporting
description: A manager must create a dashboard to report on the effectiveness of the security awareness program to leadership.

title: Impossible Travel Alert Triage
description: A SOC analyst receives an alert that a user has logged in from India and Brazil within 5 minutes. The analyst must triage this 'impossible travel' alert.

title: Threat Hunting for Malicious Scheduled Tasks
description: A threat hunter is looking for malware persistence established via scheduled tasks.

title: Rogue Device Containment
description: A network access control (NAC) system alerts that an unauthorized device (e.g., a personal laptop) has connected to a corporate network port.

title: Incident Timeline Analysis
description: An investigator must create a master timeline of an entire security breach by combining artifacts from disk, memory, and network forensics.

title: IoT Device Vulnerability Scan
description: An analyst must assess the security of a new IoT device (e.g., a smart camera) before it is approved for corporate use.

title: Red Team Operation
description: A red team is tasked with simulating a real-world adversary by attempting to breach the company and achieve a specific objective (e.g., access the CEO's email) without being detected.

title: Virtual Patching with WAF
description: A critical vulnerability is found in a legacy web application that cannot be immediately patched. An analyst must apply a 'virtual patch' using a Web Application Firewall (WAF).

title: Dark Web Monitoring
description: A threat intelligence analyst is monitoring dark web markets for stolen company credentials.

title: Bulk User Provisioning
description: An IAM analyst must provision accounts for a class of 50 new summer interns.

title: Passwordless Authentication Rollout
description: An analyst is rolling out passwordless authentication (e.g., using FIDO2 security keys) to a pilot group of users.

title: SSH Key Management
description: An analyst must onboard a developer's SSH key into a PAM system to provide audited, temporary access to a production server.

title: User Access Request Workflow
description: A user requests access to a new application. The request must go through a formal approval workflow.

title: Control Framework Mapping
description: A GRC analyst must map the company's internal security controls to a new compliance framework (e.g., ISO 27001).

title: Quantitative Risk Assessment
description: An analyst must perform a quantitative risk assessment for a potential data breach, calculating the potential financial loss.

title: CJIS Compliance Audit
description: An analyst for a police department must audit their systems to ensure compliance with the FBI's Criminal Justice Information Services (CJIS) security policy.

title: Security Awareness Gamification
description: A manager wants to increase engagement with the security awareness program by implementing gamification.

title: Triage with Threat Intelligence
description: A SOC analyst receives an EDR alert for a file with a specific hash. The analyst must use threat intelligence to triage it.

title: Assumed Breach Penetration Test
description: A penetration tester is given a standard user account and tasked with seeing if they can achieve a specific objective, simulating an attacker who has already stolen credentials.

title: Remediating Entitlement Creep
description: An access review reveals a long-term employee has accumulated access from multiple previous roles that they no longer need ('entitlement creep'). An analyst must remediate this.

title: Merger & Acquisition Risk Assessment
description: A GRC analyst must perform a high-level cybersecurity risk assessment of a company that is being acquired.
