description: An audit team performs an integrated audit that covers both the financial and IT controls of the revenue cycle.

title: Review Board Meeting Minutes
description: As part of planning, an auditor reviews the minutes of Board of Directors meetings to identify strategic risks.

title: Audit the Ethics Hotline Process
description: An auditor reviews the process for handling reports made to the company's ethics hotline.

title: Review New User Access Provisioning
description: An IT auditor is reviewing the process for granting new employees access to systems.

title: Test Application Input Validation Controls
description: An IT auditor tests the input validation controls of a custom web application.

title: Audit the Cybersecurity Incident Response Plan
description: An IT auditor assesses the company's cybersecurity incident response (IR) plan.

title: Review a Major ERP Implementation Project
description: An auditor is reviewing a large, in-progress ERP implementation project to assess its risks.

title: Review IT Change Management Process
description: An IT auditor reviews the process for making changes to production systems.

title: Review User Access Termination Process
description: An IT auditor checks if employee access is promptly removed upon termination.

title: Test Application Data Processing Controls
description: An IT auditor tests a financial application to ensure it correctly calculates sales commissions.

title: Audit Cloud Environment Configuration
description: An IT auditor reviews the configuration of the company's AWS environment.

title: Review Privileged Access to Servers
description: An IT auditor reviews who has administrator-level access to critical production servers.

title: Audit GDPR Data Privacy Controls
description: An auditor tests the company's compliance with GDPR requirements, specifically the 'right to be forgotten'.

title: Test the IT Disaster Recovery Plan
description: An IT auditor reviews the results of the latest disaster recovery (DR) test.

title: Review Software License Compliance
description: An IT auditor checks if the company is compliant with its software licensing agreements.

title: Review Pre-Implementation Controls for a New System
description: An IT auditor reviews a new software system before it goes live to ensure adequate controls are built in.

title: Test Application Segregation of Duties
description: An IT auditor tests for toxic access combinations within a financial application.

title: Audit the Vulnerability Management Program
description: An IT auditor reviews the company's process for identifying and patching system vulnerabilities.

title: Review Data Classification Policy Compliance
description: An IT auditor checks if sensitive data is being handled according to the company's data classification policy.

title: Audit SaaS Application Access
description: An IT auditor reviews user access to a critical SaaS application like Salesforce or Workday.

title: Test Application Error Handling
description: An IT auditor tests how an application handles errors to ensure data integrity.

title: Audit Data Backup and Recovery
description: An IT auditor tests the company's data backup and recovery process.

title: Review Mobile Device Management (MDM) Policy
description: An IT auditor reviews the controls over mobile devices that connect to the corporate network.

title: Review Data Center Physical Security
description: An IT auditor performs a review of the physical security controls at the company's primary data center.

title: Audit API Security
description: An IT auditor reviews the security controls for the company's public-facing APIs.

title: Review a Third-Party SOC 1 Report
description: An IT auditor reviews the SOC 1 report for the company's payroll provider.

title: Audit the Data Governance Program
description: An auditor reviews the company's newly established data governance program.

title: Audit Identity and Access Management (IAM) Program
description: An IT auditor performs a high-level review of the entire IAM program.

title: Audit Database Security
description: An IT auditor reviews the security configuration of a critical financial database.

title: Review IT Asset Management
description: An IT auditor reviews the process for tracking IT assets like laptops and servers.

title: Test Audit Trail Integrity
description: An IT auditor tests to ensure that application audit trails cannot be altered.

title: Audit the DevOps CI/CD Pipeline
description: An IT auditor reviews the security and controls of the automated CI/CD pipeline.

title: Audit Cloud Cost Management (FinOps)
description: An IT auditor reviews the company's management of its cloud computing costs.

title: Audit AI Model Governance
description: An IT auditor reviews the governance process for developing and deploying artificial intelligence (AI) models.

title: Audit for 'Shadow IT'
description: An IT auditor tries to identify instances of 'Shadow IT' - software or services used by departments without official IT approval.

title: Review Sales Discounting Process
description: An operational auditor analyzes the process for applying discounts to sales orders to identify potential revenue leakage.

title: Audit a Key Software Vendor
description: An auditor assesses the risks associated with a critical third-party software-as-a-service (SaaS) vendor.

title: Audit a New Product Launch
description: An auditor reviews a recently completed new product launch to determine if the project met its objectives.

title: Audit Fleet Vehicle Usage
description: An operational auditor reviews the usage of the company's fleet of service vehicles to identify potential misuse or inefficiency.

title: Review Customer Onboarding Process
description: An operational auditor maps the customer onboarding process to identify delays and improve customer satisfaction.

title: Audit a Third-Party Logistics (3PL) Provider
description: An operational auditor reviews the performance of the company's primary 3PL provider.

title: Audit Marketing Campaign ROI
description: An operational auditor reviews a major marketing campaign to determine if it delivered a positive return on investment (ROI).

title: Review Call Center Efficiency
description: An operational auditor analyzes call center data to identify opportunities for improvement.

title: Audit Construction Project Change Orders
description: An auditor reviews the change order process for a major construction project to ensure changes are valid and properly approved.

title: Audit the Contract Management Process
description: An auditor reviews the process for managing contracts to identify risks like automatic renewals of unwanted services.

title: Review Inventory Obsolescence Reserve
description: An operational auditor reviews the process for identifying slow-moving inventory and calculating the necessary reserve.

title: Audit the Capital Expenditure (CapEx) Process
description: An auditor reviews the process for approving large capital expenditures.

title: Audit the New Hire Onboarding Program
description: An operational auditor reviews the HR onboarding program to assess its effectiveness and efficiency.

title: Audit the Corporate Travel Program
description: An operational auditor reviews the corporate travel program to identify cost-saving opportunities.

title: Audit Corporate Credit Card Usage
description: An auditor analyzes corporate credit card data to identify potential policy violations or fraudulent use.

title: Review Sales Commission Payment Accuracy
description: An auditor reviews sales commission payments to ensure they were calculated correctly.

title: Audit Real Estate Lease Administration
description: An auditor reviews the administration of the company's real estate leases.

title: Audit the Return-to-Office Program
description: An auditor reviews the company's return-to-office program to assess its effectiveness and impact on employees.

title: Audit Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Reporting
description: An auditor reviews the data and processes used to create the company's annual ESG report.

title: Audit a Company Reorganization
description: Following a major corporate reorganization, an auditor reviews the project to see if it achieved its goals.

title: Audit Employee Turnover Data and Trends
description: An operational auditor analyzes employee turnover data to identify potential systemic issues.

title: Check-in a Passenger with Baggage
description: A passenger arrives at the airport check-in counter for their international flight and needs to check in and drop off one bag.

title: Manage the Boarding Process
description: A gate agent needs to manage the boarding process for a full flight.

title: Handle a Lost Baggage Claim
description: A passenger has arrived at their destination, but their checked bag did not. An agent at the baggage service office must create a claim.

title: Manage an Aircraft Turnaround
description: A ramp supervisor must coordinate all ground activities to ensure an aircraft departs on time.

title: Handle Oversized Baggage
description: A passenger wants to check in a large item (e.g., a surfboard) that is considered oversized baggage.

title: Manage a Last-Minute Gate Change
description: Due to an operational issue, a flight's departure gate has been changed 45 minutes before departure. A gate agent must manage the change.

title: Handle a Damaged Baggage Claim
description: A passenger's checked bag has arrived on the carousel with significant damage (e.g., a broken wheel, a large tear).

title: Handle a Standby Passenger
description: A flight is full, but an employee is listed for standby travel. The gate agent must clear the standby list if seats become available.

title: Handle an Unaccompanied Minor (UM)
description: A parent is checking in their child to fly as an unaccompanied minor. A ground agent must handle the process.

title: Load Cargo onto a Passenger Flight
description: A ramp agent is responsible for loading cargo into the belly hold of a passenger aircraft.

title: Track a Delayed Bag
description: A passenger whose bag was delayed is calling for a status update. An agent must check the tracking system.

title: Handle an Overweight Bag
description: A passenger's checked bag is over the standard weight limit. The agent must handle the situation.

title: Handle a Passenger Re-route at the Airport
description: A passenger has missed their connecting flight due to a delay on their first flight. A gate agent must rebook them.

title: De-ice an Aircraft
description: During winter operations, an aircraft has accumulated snow and ice on its wings and must be de-iced before departure.

title: Assist a Passenger with Reduced Mobility (PRM)
description: A passenger who requested wheelchair assistance has arrived at the check-in desk. The agent must ensure they are assisted to the gate.

title: Handle Denied Boarding (Involuntary)
description: A flight is oversold, and not enough passengers have volunteered to give up their seats. A gate agent must involuntarily deny boarding to a passenger.

title: Handle Late Arriving Crew
description: The flight crew for a departing flight is late arriving from their inbound flight. A ground operations agent must manage the delay.

title: Handle a Gate Security Breach
description: A person has run past the gate agent without a valid boarding pass. The agent must initiate a security response.

title: Handle a Baggage Carousel Breakdown
description: The baggage carousel for an arriving flight has broken down. A ground operations agent must manage the situation.

title: Handle Aircraft Fueling
description: A ramp agent must oversee the fueling of an aircraft to ensure the correct amount of fuel is loaded.

title: Handle a Prohibited Item in Checked Baggage
description: During security screening, a prohibited item (e.g., a lithium battery) is found in a passenger's checked bag. The bag is brought to the check-in agent.

title: Handle a Lost Boarding Pass
description: A passenger has lost their boarding pass after checking in. A gate agent needs to re-issue it.

title: Handle a Final Boarding Call
description: A flight is about to close, but a few passengers have not yet appeared at the gate. The agent must make a final call.

title: Check in a Pet Traveling in the Hold
description: A passenger is traveling with a large dog that must travel as checked baggage in the temperature-controlled cargo hold.

title: Load Aircraft with Unit Load Devices (ULDs)
description: Ramp agents must load several ULDs (standardized cargo containers) into the hold of a wide-body aircraft.

title: Handle a VIP Passenger
description: A VIP (e.g., a celebrity or high-profile government official) is traveling. Ground staff must provide special handling.

title: Handle Aircraft Towing
description: An aircraft needs to be towed from a maintenance hangar to a departure gate. A ground crew member must manage the operation.

title: Create a Flight Plan
description: A flight dispatcher needs to create the operational flight plan for a flight from London (LHR) to Dubai (DXB).

title: Manage a Crew Scheduling Change
description: A pilot has called in sick for a flight departing in 3 hours. A crew scheduler must find a replacement.

title: Manage a Weather Diversion
description: A flight en route to Boston (BOS) cannot land due to a thunderstorm. The flight operations controller must divert the flight to an alternate airport.

title: Handle an In-Flight Medical Emergency
description: A passenger is experiencing a medical emergency in-flight. The cabin crew must respond and coordinate with the flight crew and ground support.

title: Calculate Weight and Balance
description: A loadmaster must calculate the final weight and balance for a flight before departure to ensure it is within safe limits.

title: Manage Crew Rest Requirements
description: A flight has been delayed, and a crew scheduler must check if the delay will cause the flight crew to exceed their maximum duty day limits.

title: Handle In-Flight Turbulence
description: A flight encounters unexpected severe turbulence. The flight and cabin crew must respond to ensure safety.

title: Manage an Airport Curfew
description: A flight is delayed and now risks arriving at its destination after the airport's nightly noise curfew. An OCC controller must decide what to do.

title: Assign Crew for a New Flight
description: A new flight has been added to the schedule. A crew scheduler must assign a full crew (pilots and cabin crew) to it.

title: Handle a Pilot Fatigue Report
description: A pilot reports they are too fatigued to safely operate their next scheduled flight. A crew scheduler must handle the situation.

title: Monitor Flight Progress
description: An OCC controller is monitoring a trans-oceanic flight to ensure it remains on its planned route and schedule.

title: Handle a Last-Minute Maintenance Issue
description: Just before pushback, a pilot reports a minor maintenance issue. The OCC controller must coordinate a resolution.

title: Perform a Pre-Flight Walk-around Inspection
description: Before every flight, a pilot must perform a walk-around inspection of the aircraft to check for any obvious issues.

title: Handle an In-Flight Passenger Dispute
description: Two passengers are arguing over a reclined seat. The cabin crew must intervene to de-escalate the situation.

title: Declare an Emergency
description: A flight crew detects smoke in the cockpit and must declare an emergency and divert immediately.

title: Conduct a Pre-Flight Safety Briefing
description: Before every flight, the cabin crew must conduct a safety briefing for passengers.

title: Respond to a TCAS Alert
description: While in-flight, the Traffic Collision Avoidance System (TCAS) issues a 'Climb, Climb' resolution advisory (RA) to the flight crew.

title: Manage a Minimum Equipment List (MEL) Item
description: A pilot discovers a non-critical system is inoperative before a flight (e.g., a coffee maker). They must consult the MEL to see if the flight can legally depart.

title: Request Direct Routing from ATC
description: During a flight, a pilot notices favorable conditions and wants to request a more direct routing from Air Traffic Control to save time and fuel.

title: Update Company Operations Manual
description: Following a change in regulations, an airline must update its company operations manual and notify all pilots.

title: Dispatch Flight with an MEL Item
description: A flight is departing with an inoperative system under the MEL. The dispatcher must ensure all operational restrictions are followed.

title: Manage De-icing Holdover Time
description: After being de-iced, a flight is delayed on the ground. The pilot must track the holdover time to ensure the de-icing fluid remains effective.

title: Manage a Fueling Discrepancy
description: After fueling, the pilot notices the fuel quantity indicated in the cockpit does not match the amount on the fueler's receipt.

title: Handle a Cabin Pressurization Issue
description: In-flight, a warning light indicates an issue with the cabin pressurization system. The flight crew must take immediate action.

title: Handle a Bird Strike on Takeoff
description: Shortly after takeoff, a flight experiences a bird strike on one of its engines. The crew must assess the situation and take appropriate action.

title: Request Updated Weather Information
description: En route, a pilot wants to get the latest weather report (METAR) for their destination airport to prepare for the approach and landing.

title: Redeem Miles for a Cabin Upgrade
description: A frequent flyer member wants to use their miles to upgrade from Economy to Business Class on an existing booking.

title: Sell Excess Baggage
description: A passenger at the check-in counter has a second bag to check, which is not included in their fare. The agent must sell them an excess baggage allowance.

title: Credit Missing Miles from a Partner Flight
description: A frequent flyer member took a flight on a partner airline, but the miles were not credited to their account. They are requesting a manual credit.

title: Handle a Codeshare Booking Issue
description: A customer booked a flight on Airline A's website, but one leg is operated by a partner, Airline B. The customer cannot select a seat for the partner flight.

title: Purchase Lounge Access
description: A passenger without elite status wants to purchase a one-time pass to the airline's airport lounge.

title: Enroll a New Member in the Frequent Flyer Program
description: A customer wants to sign up for the airline's loyalty program.

title: Handle a Corporate Travel Booking
description: A corporate travel manager is booking a flight for an employee and needs to ensure it's billed to the company account.

title: Book an Award Flight with Miles
description: A frequent flyer member wants to book a round-trip flight using their miles.

title: Sell a Preferred Seat
description: A customer is booking a flight and wants to select a preferred seat (e.g., exit row) that has an extra fee.

title: Manage a Group Booking
description: The leader of a group booking needs to submit the final list of passenger names.

title: Claim Missing Miles from a Hotel Partner
description: A frequent flyer member stayed at a partner hotel but did not receive miles for it. They are requesting a manual credit.

title: Manage a Group Seat Block
description: A tour group has a booking and wants to be seated together. A reservations agent must block a group of seats for them.

title: Upgrade with a Certificate
description: A top-tier frequent flyer wants to use a systemwide upgrade certificate to confirm an upgrade at the time of booking.

title: Purchase In-Flight Wi-Fi
description: A passenger on board a flight wants to purchase Wi-Fi access.

title: Handle Family Seating
description: A family with young children is booking a flight and wants to ensure they can sit together.

title: Handle Disruption on a Partner Airline
description: A passenger booked through Airline A is affected by a cancellation on a connecting flight operated by partner Airline B. Airline A's agent must assist.

title: Check Lounge Access Rules
description: A frequent flyer with elite status wants to bring two guests into the airport lounge. The lounge agent must check the rules.

title: Handle a Group Travel Disruption
description: A flight carrying a school group has been cancelled. An agent must rebook the entire group together on a new flight.

title: Request a Status Match
description: A frequent flyer who has elite status with a competing airline wants to request a status match with this airline.

title: Purchase a Carbon Offset
description: During the booking process, a customer wants to purchase a carbon offset to mitigate the environmental impact of their flight.

title: Pool Miles with Family Members
description: A frequent flyer program allows family members to pool their miles. A member wants to link their spouse's account to create a family pool.

title: Book a One-Way Flight
description: A customer wants to book a one-way flight from New York (JFK) to Los Angeles (LAX) for next Friday.

title: Handle a Flight Cancellation
description: Due to a maintenance issue, a flight has been cancelled. An agent must contact affected passengers and rebook them.

title: Change a Flight Date
description: A customer needs to change the date of their existing flight booking.

title: Request Wheelchair Assistance
description: An elderly passenger calls to add a wheelchair assistance request to their existing booking.

title: Process a Refund for a Cancelled Flight
description: A customer whose flight was cancelled by the airline is entitled to a full refund and has called to request it.

title: Handle a Flight Delay Notification
description: The operations team has announced a 2-hour delay for an upcoming flight. A customer service agent must inform the passengers.

title: Book a Flight with an Infant-in-Lap
description: A customer wants to book a flight for two adults and an infant who will travel on an adult's lap.

title: Correct a Name on a Booking
description: A customer made a booking online but misspelled their last name. They need to correct it to match their passport.

title: Handle a Customer Complaint
description: A customer is calling to complain about a rude gate agent during their last trip.

title: Book a Multi-City Trip
description: A customer wants to book a trip with three legs: Dallas to Denver, then Denver to Seattle, then Seattle back to Dallas.

title: Request a Special Meal
description: A passenger with dietary restrictions needs to request a vegetarian meal for their long-haul flight.

title: Cancel a Booking
description: A customer needs to cancel their non-refundable flight booking.

title: Book Group Travel
description: A school group of 20 students and 2 teachers wants to book travel for a field trip.

title: Handle an Airline Schedule Change
description: An airline has changed its schedule, and a customer's flight now departs 3 hours earlier. An agent must notify the customer and handle their request.

title: Add a Pet in Cabin to a Booking
description: A customer wants to add their small dog, which will travel in a carrier under the seat, to their booking.

title: Split a Booking (PNR)
description: Two passengers are on the same booking, but one needs to change their return date while the other does not. The agent must split the booking.

title: Handle a Duplicate Booking
description: The system has flagged that a passenger appears to have two identical bookings. An agent must investigate and resolve the issue.

title: Provide Travel Document Information
description: A customer is unsure what travel documents they need for an international trip. An agent must provide the correct information.

title: Add Frequent Flyer Number to Booking
description: A customer made a booking but forgot to add their frequent flyer number. They call to have it added.

title: Provide a Fare Quote
description: A customer calls to ask for the price of a round-trip flight without wanting to book it yet.

title: Use a Future Travel Credit
description: A customer who previously cancelled a flight has a travel credit and wants to use it to book a new flight.

title: Provide Proof of Travel Letter
description: A customer needs an official letter from the airline confirming they took a specific flight for insurance or immigration purposes.

title: Book an Open-Jaw Itinerary
description: A customer wants to book a flight from New York to London, and then return from Paris back to New York.

title: Explain Fare Rules
description: A customer wants to know the rules for the 'Basic Economy' fare they are about to purchase.

title: Provide Unaccompanied Minor (UM) Rules
description: A parent is asking about the rules and fees for their child to fly alone as an unaccompanied minor.

title: Find a Lost Item
description: A passenger who deplaned an hour ago calls to report they left their tablet on the aircraft.

title: Pest Identification in Corn
description: A farmer submits a drone image of a cornfield showing signs of pest damage. The agent must identify the pest and recommend a treatment.

title: Irrigation Scheduling for Almonds
description: A farmer needs to determine the optimal irrigation schedule for their almond orchard based on soil moisture data and weather forecasts.

title: Disease Risk Forecast for Wheat
description: A farmer wants to know the risk of fusarium head blight developing in their wheat field based on weather conditions.

title: Diagnose Nutrient Deficiency from Leaf Image
description: A farmer uploads a picture of a soybean leaf that is yellowing. The agent must diagnose the nutrient deficiency.

title: Predict Optimal Harvest Time for Wine Grapes
description: A vineyard manager needs to decide the optimal day to harvest their Cabernet Sauvignon grapes based on sugar levels and weather.

title: Optimize Corn Planting Depth
description: A farmer wants to know the optimal planting depth for their corn based on soil moisture and temperature.

title: Variable Rate Nitrogen Prescription for Corn
description: Based on satellite imagery showing crop health, a farmer wants to create a variable rate prescription for a top-dress nitrogen application.

title: Check for Fungicide Resistance
description: A farmer plans to spray a fungicide and wants to check if there is known resistance to that chemical group in their region.

title: Replant Decision Support
description: After a flood, a farmer needs to decide if the remaining plant stand in their soybean field is sufficient, or if they should replant.

title: Check Herbicide Carryover Risk
description: A farmer wants to plant soybeans in a field where they applied a corn herbicide last year and needs to check for carryover risk.

title: Select a Cover Crop Mix
description: A farmer wants to plant a cover crop after corn harvest to improve soil health and reduce erosion. They need a recommendation for a suitable mix.

title: Frost Alert and Mitigation for an Orchard
description: The weather forecast indicates temperatures will drop below freezing, threatening an apple orchard that is in bloom.

title: Assess Hail Damage Using Drone Imagery
description: After a hailstorm, an insurance adjuster uses a drone to assess the percentage of crop damage in a field.

title: Plan a Multi-Year Crop Rotation
description: A farmer wants to create a 4-year crop rotation plan for their fields to improve soil health and break pest cycles.

title: Scout for Soybean Aphids
description: An agronomist needs to scout a soybean field to determine if the aphid population has reached the economic threshold for treatment.

title: Check Pesticide Tank Mix Compatibility
description: A farmer wants to mix a herbicide and a fungicide in their sprayer tank to save a trip across the field, but needs to check if they are compatible.

title: Pre-Season Irrigation System Check
description: Before the growing season starts, a farmer wants to run a diagnostic on their drip irrigation system to check for leaks or blockages.

title: Interpret Soil Test Results
description: A farmer has received a soil test report and needs help interpreting the results and generating fertilizer recommendations.

title: Monitor Beehive Health
description: A beekeeper who provides pollination services receives an alert from a smart hive sensor indicating a sudden drop in hive weight and bee activity.

title: Analyze Insect Trap Data
description: An automated insect trap has taken a picture of its contents. The agent needs to identify and count the target pest.

title: Specialty Crop Harvest Logistics
description: A lettuce grower needs to coordinate the harvest and cooling of their crop to meet a grocery store's delivery window.

title: Detect Crop Water Stress from Thermal Imagery
description: A farmer uses a thermal camera on a drone to detect water stress in a potato field before it's visible to the naked eye.

title: Assess Spray Drift Risk
description: A farmer is about to spray a field and needs to assess the risk of spray drift to a neighboring sensitive crop.

title: Check Vernalization Requirement Fulfillment
description: A fruit grower needs to know if their cherry orchard has received enough 'chill hours' over the winter to ensure a good bloom.

title: Coordinate Harvest Crew Logistics
description: A manager of a large hand-harvested fruit operation needs to coordinate crews, equipment, and transport across multiple ranches.

title: Manage a Commercial Apiary
description: A commercial beekeeper needs to manage inspection records and honey production for hundreds of hives.

title: Plan Post-Harvest Residue Management
description: After corn harvest, a farmer needs to decide how to manage the crop residue (stalks).

title: Combine Harvester Maintenance Alert
description: A telematics system on a combine harvester reports that it is due for its 200-hour service.

title: File a Crop Insurance Claim for Hail Damage
description: A farmer needs to file a crop insurance claim after a severe hailstorm damaged their corn crop.

title: Grain Marketing Decision Support
description: A farmer has harvested their wheat and needs to decide whether to sell it now or store it based on market prices and storage costs.

title: Farm Operating Loan Application Support
description: A farmer needs to compile financial documents to apply for an annual operating loan.

title: Farm Input Inventory Check
description: A farmer is preparing for planting and needs to know if they have enough seed and fertilizer on hand.

title: Farm Labor Scheduling for Harvest
description: A vegetable farm manager needs to create a weekly schedule for their harvest crew, ensuring all tasks are covered.

title: Calculate Carbon Credits from No-Till Farming
description: A farmer who has switched to no-till farming wants to estimate the amount of carbon credits they may be eligible for.

title: Analyze Machinery Ownership vs. Custom Hire
description: A farmer is considering buying a new sprayer and wants to know if it's more cost-effective than continuing to use a custom application service.

title: Check Compliance with Water Quality Regulations
description: A farmer needs to ensure their nutrient management plan complies with local water quality regulations to prevent runoff.

title: Manage Stored Grain Condition
description: Sensors in a grain bin report a rise in temperature and CO2 levels, indicating potential spoilage.

title: Analyze Equipment Fuel Consumption
description: A farm manager wants to analyze the fuel consumption of their tractors to identify inefficient machines or operators.

title: Ensure Water Rights Compliance
description: A farmer in a regulated water basin needs to track their water usage to ensure they do not exceed their annual allocation.

title: Compare On-Farm Seed Variety Trial Performance
description: A farmer planted several different corn hybrids in trial strips across a field and wants to analyze the yield data to see which performed best.

title: Create a Purchase Order for Parts
description: A mechanic needs to order spare parts to repair a tractor.

title: Execute a Grain Sales Contract
description: A farmer has decided to sell 5,000 bushels of corn to a local ethanol plant.

title: Analyze Field-Level Profitability
description: At the end of the year, a farm manager wants to analyze the profitability of each individual field.

title: Plan Equipment Transport Logistics
description: A farmer needs to move a large combine harvester between two farms and must check the route for any restrictions.

title: Generate a Farm Land Lease Agreement
description: A landowner and a farmer need to generate a simple cash rent lease agreement for a parcel of land.

title: Resolve a Supplier Invoice Discrepancy
description: A farmer has received an invoice from a chemical supplier that does not match their own records.

title: Pesticide Application Record Keeping
description: After spraying a field, a farmer needs to create a legally compliant record of the application.

title: Track Employee Safety Training
description: A farm manager needs to ensure all employees have completed their annual safety training.

title: Generate Equipment Utilization Report
description: A large farm wants to analyze how its equipment was utilized during the planting season to identify inefficiencies.

title: Monthly Cash Flow Analysis
description: A farm's bookkeeper needs to generate a monthly cash flow statement to ensure the farm has enough liquidity to meet its obligations.

title: Generate a Farm Sustainability Report
description: A farm that supplies a major food brand needs to generate an annual sustainability report covering its water usage, carbon footprint, and biodiversity practices.

title: Calculate Asset Depreciation Schedule
description: An accountant for a farm needs to calculate the annual depreciation for a new tractor for tax purposes.

title: Food Traceability Lookup
description: A food processor has a product recall and needs to trace a batch of spinach back to the field it was harvested from.

title: Dairy Cow Health Alert
description: A wearable sensor on a dairy cow triggers an alert for reduced rumination and activity, indicating a potential health issue.

title: Feed Formulation for Beef Cattle
description: A cattle rancher needs to formulate a cost-effective feed ration that meets the nutritional requirements for their finisher cattle.

title: Livestock Geofence Alert
description: A GPS ear tag on a beef steer sends an alert that it has breached a virtual geofence, indicating it has escaped its pasture.

title: Breeding Recommendation for Swine
description: A swine farmer wants to select the best boar to breed with a specific sow to improve litter size.

title: Analyze Milking Parlor Efficiency
description: A dairy farmer wants to analyze data from their milking parlor to identify bottlenecks and improve efficiency.

title: Cattle Water Intake Monitoring Alert
description: A smart water trough reports a significant drop in water consumption for a herd of cattle, suggesting a potential problem.

title: Develop a Pasture Rotation Plan
description: A sheep farmer wants to develop a rotational grazing plan to improve pasture health and animal nutrition.

title: Poultry House Environmental Control
description: Sensors in a poultry house show that the temperature and ammonia levels are rising above the acceptable thresholds.

title: Estrus (Heat) Detection Alert
description: A sensor on a dairy cow detects a significant increase in activity, indicating she is in heat and ready for insemination.

title: Calving Assistance Alert
description: A sensor monitoring a pregnant cow's behavior indicates she has been in labor for an extended period, suggesting a difficult birth.

title: Analyze Bulk Tank Milk Quality
description: A dairy co-op has flagged a farmer's milk shipment for a high somatic cell count (SCC), indicating a potential herd health issue.

title: Record Animal Medication Treatment
description: A veterinarian has treated a sick animal and needs to record the medication administered to maintain compliance and track withdrawal times.

title: Analyze Average Daily Gain in Feedlot Cattle
description: A feedlot manager wants to analyze the performance of a pen of cattle by calculating their average daily gain (ADG).

title: Submit Sample for Genetic Testing
description: A cattle breeder has taken a tissue sample from a prize bull and needs to submit it to a lab for genetic testing.

title: Monitor Hatchery Incubation Conditions
description: A hatchery manager needs to ensure the incubators are maintaining the correct temperature and humidity for optimal chick hatching.

title: Monitor Aquaculture Water Quality
description: A fish farm manager gets an alert from a water quality sensor in a shrimp pond indicating low dissolved oxygen levels.

title: Set Up a Virtual Fence
description: A rancher wants to create a new virtual fence to confine cattle to a specific area of a large pasture without using physical fences.

title: Sort Cattle for Market
description: A feedlot manager needs to sort a pen of cattle, sending all animals over a certain weight to market.

title: Manage New Livestock Quarantine Protocol
description: A farm has just received a new batch of animals. The manager needs to follow the standard quarantine protocol to prevent introducing diseases.

title: Automated Feed Inventory Reorder
description: A sensor in a feed bin reports that the level of a specific feed ingredient is below the reorder point.

title: Sort Heifers by Genetic Merit
description: A dairy farmer wants to sort a group of replacement heifers, keeping the ones with the highest genetic merit for milk production.

title: Prepare for an Animal Welfare Audit
description: A pork producer is preparing for a third-party animal welfare audit and needs to ensure all documentation is in order.

title: Schedule a Robotic Feed Pusher
description: A dairy farmer wants to schedule their robotic feed pusher to run more frequently during the day to encourage cow feed intake.

title: Analyze Smart Feeder Data
description: A hog farmer uses smart feeders that record how much each individual pig eats. They want to identify pigs that are not eating enough.

title: Variable Rate Seeding Prescription for Soybeans
description: A farmer wants to create a variable rate seeding prescription for a soybean field based on historical yield data and soil type zones.

title: Autonomous Weed Detection and Spot Spraying
description: An autonomous drone identifies weeds in a cotton field and needs to generate a spot spraying mission.

title: Analyze Post-Harvest Yield Map
description: After harvest, a farmer uploads a yield map from their combine. The agent needs to identify and explain areas of low yield.

title: Plan a Drone Scouting Mission
description: A farmer wants to create a flight plan for a drone to scout a 160-acre field for signs of nitrogen stress.

title: Create a Grid Soil Sampling Plan
description: A farmer wants to create a plan for soil sampling a field on a 2.5-acre grid pattern.

title: Analyze Multispectral Drone Imagery
description: An agronomist has flown a field with a multispectral drone and needs the agent to process the data and identify areas of crop stress.

title: Mid-Season Corn Yield Forecast
description: An agronomist wants a yield forecast for a corn field based on current crop health imagery and weather data.

title: Automated Irrigation System Fault Detection
description: A center pivot irrigation system reports a pressure drop in one of its spans, indicating a leak or broken sprinkler.

title: Analyze Field Topography for Drainage
description: A farmer wants to analyze a high-resolution elevation map of a field to identify areas where water ponds and plan for drainage tile installation.

title: Count Livestock with a Drone
description: A rancher has used a drone to take aerial photos of a large pasture and needs the agent to count the number of cattle.

title: Create a Variable Depth Tillage Prescription
description: A farmer wants to use variable depth tillage to break up compaction layers, but only till as deep as necessary in different parts of the field.

title: Analyze Soil Electrical Conductivity (EC) Map
description: A farmer has an EC map of their field and wants to use it to understand variations in soil texture.

title: Create a Field Boundary from Drone Imagery
description: A farmer has a new field and has flown a drone over it. They need the agent to create an accurate field boundary from the image.

title: Autonomous Robotic Weeder Mission
description: A vegetable grower wants to dispatch an autonomous robotic weeder to a field.

title: Analyze On-Farm Weather Station Data
description: A farmer wants to analyze data from their on-farm weather station to calculate growing degree days (GDD) for their corn crop.

title: Analyze As-Applied Data
description: After planting, a farmer wants to verify that their planter correctly executed the variable rate seeding prescription.

title: Plan a Crop Dusting Mission for a Drone
description: A farmer needs to apply a fungicide to a specific, hard-to-reach part of a field using a large spraying drone.

title: Analyze Plant Stand Count from Drone Imagery
description: Shortly after emergence, a farmer flies a drone over a corn field and needs the agent to count the plants to assess germination success.

title: Validate Soil Moisture Sensor Data
description: A soil moisture sensor is giving erratic readings. The agent needs to diagnose if the sensor is faulty.

title: AI-Powered Crop Diagnosis from Photo
description: A farmer takes a photo of a diseased leaf with their phone and asks the agent 'What's wrong with my plant?'.

title: Plan a Drone Pollination Mission
description: A greenhouse operator wants to use a small drone to pollinate their tomato plants.

title: Plan an Interseeding Mission for Cover Crops
description: A farmer wants to use a high-clearance robot to seed a cover crop into their standing corn crop.

title: Detect Field Change Using Satellite Imagery
description: An agronomist wants to compare satellite imagery from two different dates to see where a field has been tilled.

title: Design a New Wing Structure
description: An engineer needs to design a new composite wing structure for a next-generation aircraft, focusing on weight reduction and strength.

title: Source Titanium Forgings for Landing Gear
description: A procurement manager needs to source certified titanium forgings for a new landing gear assembly from an approved supplier.

title: Manage Fuselage Assembly Work Order
description: A production supervisor needs to manage a work order for joining two fuselage sections on the assembly line.

title: Conduct a Flight Test
description: A flight test engineer needs to execute a test plan to evaluate the stall characteristics of a new aircraft.

title: Manage a Supplier Quality Issue
description: A batch of fasteners from a supplier has failed incoming quality inspection. A quality engineer must manage the non-conformance.

title: Generate a Certification Document
description: An engineer needs to prepare a document for the FAA demonstrating that a new avionics system complies with DO-178C standards.

title: Perform Non-Destructive Testing (NDT)
description: An NDT technician must inspect a critical composite fuselage panel for internal defects using ultrasonic equipment.

title: Analyze Flight Test Data
description: After a flight test, an engineer must analyze the collected data to verify the aircraft's performance against its design model.

title: Simulate a Bird Strike on an Engine
description: A safety engineer needs to run a computer simulation to model the structural impact of a bird strike on a new jet engine design.

title: Track Part Traceability
description: A quality inspector needs to verify the full traceability of a critical turbine blade, from raw material to final installation.

title: Conduct a Wind Tunnel Test
description: An aerodynamics engineer needs to test a scale model of a new aircraft design in a wind tunnel to measure lift and drag.

title: Manage Tool Calibration
description: A metrology technician needs to manage the calibration schedule for torque wrenches used on the assembly line.

title: Manage an Engineering Change Request (ECR)
description: A design engineer has submitted an ECR to change the material of a bracket to a lighter alloy. This must be reviewed and approved.

title: Manage Hazardous Materials
description: A supply chain manager needs to arrange the transportation of hazardous materials (e.g., primers, sealants) to the assembly line.

title: Perform Final Assembly Quality Check
description: Before an aircraft rolls out of the factory, a quality inspector must perform a final walk-around inspection to check for any defects.

title: Manage Certification Paperwork
description: A certification manager must compile and submit the final package of documents to a regulatory agency to receive a Type Certificate for a new aircraft.

title: Design an Avionics System Architecture
description: A systems engineer is designing the architecture for a new integrated avionics suite, including flight displays, flight management systems, and communication radios.

title: Manage the Master Production Schedule
description: A production planner must adjust the master production schedule due to a supplier delay for a critical component.

title: Install an Avionics Suite
description: An avionics technician needs to install and connect all the components of an avionics suite in an aircraft cockpit.

title: Perform a Ground Vibration Test (GVT)
description: Test engineers need to perform a GVT on a new aircraft to identify its natural frequencies and validate structural models.

title: Perform Aircraft Systems Integration
description: An integration engineer must test the interaction between the hydraulic system and the flight control system on a new aircraft.

title: Negotiate a Supplier Contract
description: A procurement manager is negotiating a long-term agreement with a supplier for landing gear assemblies.

title: Manage Aircraft Weight and Balance
description: An engineer must track the weight of every component added to an aircraft during assembly to ensure the final weight and center of gravity are within limits.

title: Perform a Lightning Strike Test
description: Engineers must test a composite fuselage section to ensure it can safely dissipate the energy from a lightning strike without damaging critical systems.

title: Perform a CFD Analysis
description: An aerodynamicist needs to run a Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) simulation to analyze airflow over a new winglet design.

title: Resolve an Assembly Clash
description: During digital mock-up, a clash is detected between a hydraulic line and an electrical wire bundle. An engineer must resolve it.

title: Paint an Aircraft
description: A team in a paint hangar must paint a newly assembled aircraft according to the customer's livery specifications.

title: Conduct a Water Ingress Test
description: After an aircraft is fully assembled, it must be tested to ensure the fuselage, windows, and doors are properly sealed against rain.

title: Design a Landing Gear System
description: An engineering team is designing the landing gear for a new aircraft, including the retraction mechanism and shock absorbers.

title: Audit a Supplier's Facility
description: A quality manager needs to audit a new supplier's manufacturing facility to ensure it meets quality standards before they can be approved.

title: Manage Production Tooling
description: A large jig used to assemble wings needs to be taken out of service for its scheduled maintenance.

title: Perform a Fuel System Test
description: On a newly built aircraft, engineers must test the entire fuel system, including pumps, valves, and gauges.

title: Develop a Manufacturing Process
description: A manufacturing engineer needs to develop the step-by-step process for assembling a new component.

title: Manage a Material Review Board (MRB) Action
description: A part has been manufactured with a minor deviation from the blueprint. An MRB (a team of engineers) must decide if the part is usable 'as-is', needs repair, or must be scrapped.

title: Rivet a Wing Skin
description: An automated riveting machine must install thousands of rivets to attach the skin to the underlying wing structure.

title: Conduct an EMI Test
description: Engineers must test an aircraft in an anechoic chamber to ensure its electronic systems do not interfere with each other and are not susceptible to external radio frequencies.

title: Perform a First Article Inspection (FAI)
description: When a supplier produces a part for the first time, a quality engineer must perform an FAI to verify that their production process creates a part that conforms to the drawing.

title: Manage Export Control Compliance

title: Perform a Cabin Pressurization Test
description: On the ground, engineers must test the aircraft's pressurization system to ensure it can hold pressure and has no leaks.

title: Manage Airplane Flight Manual (AFM) Revisions
description: After a change in aircraft performance or limitations, a technical writer must revise the official AFM and submit it for regulatory approval.

title: Schedule an Engine Overhaul
description: An MRO planner needs to schedule an engine for a complete overhaul based on its accumulated flight hours.

title: Handle an Aircraft on Ground (AOG) Situation
description: An aircraft is grounded at a remote airport due to a critical component failure. An MRO logistics agent must urgently ship a replacement part.

title: Document a Component Repair
description: A technician has repaired a hydraulic pump. They must document the work performed and the parts used for compliance.

title: Update an Aircraft Maintenance Manual (AMM)
description: A manufacturer has issued a revision to a maintenance procedure. A technical writer must update the company's AMM.

title: Forecast Spare Parts Demand
description: A logistics planner needs to forecast the demand for a specific type of landing gear brake assembly for the next year.

title: Check Airworthiness Directive (AD) Compliance
description: An auditor needs to verify that a specific aircraft is in compliance with a new FAA airworthiness directive.

title: Disassemble Landing Gear for Overhaul
description: A team of MRO technicians needs to disassemble a landing gear assembly for a major overhaul.

title: Inspect Fuselage for Fatigue Cracks
description: As part of a heavy maintenance check, a technician must perform an eddy current inspection on a specific section of the fuselage known for potential fatigue cracks.

title: Create a Maintenance Logbook Entry
description: After replacing a tire on an aircraft, a mechanic must create a formal entry in the aircraft's official logbook.

title: Plan a C-Check (Heavy Maintenance)
description: A maintenance planner is creating the work package for an upcoming C-check on a commercial airliner.

title: Manage a Component Warranty Claim
description: A component has failed prematurely while still under the manufacturer's warranty. An MRO administrator must file a warranty claim.

title: Comply with a New Airworthiness Directive (AD)
description: The FAA has issued a mandatory AD that requires an inspection of the horizontal stabilizer on a specific aircraft model. A maintenance planner must ensure compliance.

title: Overhaul an Engine Turbine Section
description: A specialized MRO technician must inspect and repair the high-pressure turbine section of a jet engine.

title: Perform a Borescope Inspection of an Engine
description: A technician must use a borescope to inspect the internal components of a jet engine for damage without disassembling it.

title: Manage Aircraft Airworthiness Records
description: A records administrator is responsible for maintaining the complete and compliant set of maintenance and airworthiness records for an aircraft.

title: Replace a Cockpit Windshield
description: A maintenance crew needs to replace a cockpit windshield that was damaged by a bird strike.

title: Manage Tool Inventory
description: A tool crib attendant must manage the checkout and return of tools to maintenance technicians.

title: Author a Repair Specification
description: An aircraft has damage that is not covered by the Structural Repair Manual. A stress engineer must analyze the damage and write a custom repair specification.

title: Balance a Flight Control Surface
description: After being repainted, an aileron must be re-balanced to prevent aerodynamic flutter.

title: Manage Life-Limited Parts (LLPs)
description: A records administrator must track the flight cycles of an LLP (like a turbine disk) and ensure it is replaced before it expires.

title: Perform an Aircraft Records Audit
description: An airline is leasing a used aircraft. An auditor must perform a complete records audit to ensure the aircraft is airworthy and compliant before the airline accepts it.

title: Strip and Repaint an Aircraft
description: An aircraft is being rebranded with a new livery. An MRO facility must strip the old paint and apply the new one.

title: Author a Service Bulletin (SB)
description: An aircraft manufacturer has identified a potential issue and needs to issue a non-mandatory Service Bulletin to operators recommending an inspection or modification.

title: Manage Rotable Parts Inventory
description: An MRO facility manages a pool of rotable parts (repairable components). An agent must track a part through its entire repair and reuse cycle.

title: Perform a Landing Gear Swing Test
description: After a landing gear overhaul, technicians must perform a gear swing test to ensure it retracts and deploys correctly.

title: Troubleshoot an Avionics Fault
description: A pilot has reported an intermittent fault with the autopilot system. An avionics technician must diagnose the cause.

title: Update Aircraft Weight and Balance after Modification
description: After a major modification (like adding a new satellite antenna), an engineer must update the aircraft's official weight and balance records.

title: Repair Composite Delamination
description: A technician has found a delamination (a separation of layers) in a composite control surface. It must be repaired.

title: Manage an Engine Test Cell
description: After an engine overhaul, it must be run in a test cell to verify its performance before it can be returned to service.

title: Create an Aircraft Modification Plan
description: An airline wants to add a new satellite internet system to its fleet. An MRO engineer must create the plan to perform this modification.

title: Plan a Satellite's Orbit
description: A mission planner needs to design a stable orbit for a new Earth observation satellite that provides coverage of specific regions.

title: Monitor Satellite Health Telemetry
description: A satellite operator must monitor real-time telemetry data to ensure the spacecraft is operating within normal parameters.

title: Integrate Payload on Satellite
description: Engineers in a cleanroom must integrate a high-resolution camera payload onto a satellite bus.

title: Resolve a Satellite Anomaly
description: A satellite's telemetry shows it has unexpectedly entered safe mode. An operator must diagnose the cause and attempt to restore normal operations.

title: Manage Launch Countdown
description: A launch director is managing the final countdown for a rocket launch. They must monitor all systems and give the final 'go' for launch.

title: Plan a Satellite De-orbit Maneuver
description: A satellite is at the end of its life. A mission controller must plan a final series of thruster burns to safely de-orbit it over the Pacific Ocean.

title: Integrate a Satellite with a Launch Vehicle
description: Engineers at a launch site must physically mount a satellite onto the launch vehicle's payload adapter.

title: Perform a Ground Station Pass
description: A satellite operator needs to upload a new command file and download scientific data during a scheduled pass over a ground station.

title: Design a Satellite Power System
description: An engineer is designing the electrical power system for a new satellite, including solar panels and batteries.

title: Analyze Mission Risk
description: A systems engineer needs to conduct a failure modes and effects analysis (FMEA) for a new interplanetary probe's communication system.

title: Handle a Launch Hold
description: During a countdown, a sensor on the rocket's second stage reports an anomalous reading, forcing a launch hold. The director must manage the situation.

title: Build a Satellite Wiring Harness
description: A technician needs to build a complex wiring harness that connects the satellite's main computer to its various subsystems.

title: Plan a Lunar Mission Trajectory
description: A mission designer needs to plot a fuel-efficient trajectory for a robotic lander traveling from Earth orbit to a specific landing site on the Moon.

title: Troubleshoot a Ground Station Link
description: A ground station is unable to establish a command link with a satellite. An operator must troubleshoot the issue.

title: Perform a Thermal Vacuum (TVAC) Test
description: A satellite must undergo TVAC testing to ensure it can operate in the vacuum and extreme temperatures of space.

title: Develop Flight Software for a Satellite
description: A software engineer is developing the flight software that controls a satellite's attitude determination and control system (ADCS).

title: Deploy Satellite Solar Arrays
description: After a satellite reaches its final orbit, a ground controller must send the command to deploy its stowed solar arrays.

title: Assemble Multi-Layer Insulation (MLI)
description: A technician is assembling MLI blankets to provide thermal protection for a satellite.

title: Select a Launch Provider
description: A satellite program manager needs to select a launch provider to get their new satellite into orbit.

title: Manage Deep Space Network (DSN) Time
description: A mission planner needs to request and schedule time on the DSN to communicate with an interplanetary probe.

title: Maintain Cleanroom Environment
description: A cleanroom technician must monitor and maintain the environment where a satellite is being assembled to prevent contamination.

title: Plan Payload Operations
description: A scientist needs to plan the weekly operations for a science instrument on an orbiting satellite.

title: Handle a Space Debris Conjunction Alert
description: A satellite operator receives an alert that their satellite has a high probability of colliding with a piece of space debris. They must decide whether to perform a collision avoidance maneuver.

title: Conduct a Satellite Vibration Test
description: A satellite must be subjected to intense vibrations on a shaker table to ensure it can survive the violent forces of a rocket launch.

title: Analyze Scientific Payload Data
description: After downloading data from a space telescope, a scientist needs to process and analyze it to search for exoplanets.

title: Plan a Mars Rover Traverse
description: A rover planner on Earth needs to plan the next day's drive for a Mars rover to a new scientific target.

title: Procure Radiation-Hardened Electronics
description: A procurement manager needs to buy radiation-hardened microprocessors for a satellite's flight computer.

title: Manage Payload Data Rights
description: A university has an instrument on a NASA satellite. A mission manager must ensure the university gets their data while protecting the data rights of other instruments.

title: Operate a Robotic Arm in Space
description: An operator on the ground needs to command a robotic arm on a satellite to grab and reposition a payload.

title: Perform Propellant Loading
description: At the launch pad, a team must safely load highly volatile propellants (e.g., liquid hydrogen, liquid oxygen) into a rocket.

title: Process a Purchase Order-Backed Invoice
description: An accountant receives a standard invoice from a supplier that has a corresponding purchase order and goods receipt note.

title: Process a Non-PO Invoice
description: An invoice for a utility bill (e.g., electricity) has been received. These invoices do not have purchase orders.

title: Process a New Vendor Setup Request
description: A department wants to purchase from a new vendor. AP needs to set up the vendor in the system before a PO can be issued.

title: Process an Employee Expense Report
description: An employee has submitted an expense report for a business trip, including airfare, meals, and lodging, with attached receipts.

title: Handle a Vendor Invoice Dispute
description: A vendor calls to inquire about an unpaid invoice. The system shows the invoice is on hold due to a price discrepancy.

title: Calculate and Post a Goods Received Not Invoiced (GRNI) Accrual
description: For month-end close, an accountant needs to create an accrual for goods that have been received but for which no supplier invoice has been processed yet.

title: Process an Urgent Vendor Payment
description: A critical supplier has put a hold on shipments due to an overdue invoice. The department head has requested an urgent, off-cycle payment be made.

title: Update Vendor Banking Information
description: A vendor has sent a notification that they have changed banks and their payment details need to be updated.

title: Process an Invoice with an Early Payment Discount
description: A vendor offers a 2% discount if their invoice is paid within 10 days. An accountant needs to process the payment to take advantage of the discount.

title: Handle Uncashed Vendor Checks (Escheatment)
description: During a review, an accountant finds several vendor checks that were issued over a year ago but have never been cashed.

title: Handle a Suspected Duplicate Invoice
description: An invoice is entered into the system, which flags it as a potential duplicate of an invoice already processed.

title: Manage a Weekly Payment Run
description: The AP manager needs to create, review, and execute the weekly payment run for all due vendor invoices.

title: Resolve an Invoice GL Coding Error
description: A department manager has rejected a non-PO invoice approval request because it was coded to the wrong GL account.

title: Reconcile a Vendor Statement
description: A key supplier has sent their monthly statement of account. An AP clerk needs to reconcile it with the company's own records to ensure everything is aligned.

title: Void and Reissue a Lost Vendor Check
description: A vendor reports that they never received a check that was mailed to them. The accountant needs to void the original check and reissue a new one.

title: Accrue Monthly Property Taxes
description: Property taxes are paid twice a year, but for accurate monthly financial statements, the expense must be accrued each month.

title: Process an Invoice for a Capital Project
description: An invoice has been received from a contractor for work on a new building. The cost needs to be capitalized, not expensed.

title: Manage Year-End 1099 Reporting
description: At year-end, the AP team needs to identify all vendors who require a Form 1099-NEC for services and prepare the forms for filing.

title: Manage Use Tax Accrual
description: An AP clerk processes an invoice from an out-of-state vendor who did not charge sales tax. The company is required to self-assess and remit use tax.

title: Process a Utility Bill Received via EDI
description: A large utility provider sends its monthly invoices via an EDI 810 transaction. The system needs to process this electronic invoice.

title: Process a Credit Memo from a Vendor
description: A vendor has issued a credit memo for returned goods. The AP clerk needs to apply this credit to the vendor's account.

title: Route an Invoice for Approval Based on Amount
description: An invoice needs to be routed for approval, but the approver depends on the invoice amount according to the company's approval matrix.

title: Handle a Rejected ACH Payment
description: A payment in an ACH payment run has been rejected by the bank due to incorrect vendor banking information.

title: Process a Vendor Down Payment Request
description: A vendor requires a 20% down payment before they will begin work on a large custom order.

title: Resolve a 3-Way Match Quantity Discrepancy
description: An invoice fails the 3-way match because the quantity invoiced is greater than the quantity received on the goods receipt note.

title: Reconcile Virtual Card Payments
description: The company uses virtual credit cards (V-Cards) for some purchases. The AP team needs to reconcile the V-Card statement with the purchase transactions.

title: Apply a Customer Payment with Remittance Advice
description: A payment has been received from a customer via ACH, and the customer has sent a separate email with remittance advice detailing which invoices the payment covers.

title: Handle a Customer Short Payment
description: A customer has paid an invoice but has short-paid by $100, claiming the goods were damaged. Remittance advice is provided.

title: Generate Customer Invoices from Shipping Data
description: The company ships products and needs to generate daily invoices for all goods shipped the previous day.

title: Review a Customer's Credit Limit
description: A customer has requested an increase in their credit limit. The credit manager needs to review their account to make a decision.

title: Process Dunning Notices for Overdue Accounts
description: The collections specialist needs to run the weekly dunning process to send reminders for overdue invoices.

title: Issue a Credit Memo
description: A customer returned damaged goods. After customer service approves the return, accounting needs to issue a credit memo to the customer.

title: Resolve Unapplied Cash
description: A customer made a payment without any remittance advice, and it's sitting in the system as unapplied cash. An AR specialist needs to identify which invoice(s) it should be applied to.

title: Set Up a Recurring Billing Schedule
description: A new customer has signed up for a monthly subscription service. AR needs to set them up on a recurring billing schedule.

title: Onboard a New Customer and Set Credit Limit
description: A salesperson has signed a new customer. The credit team needs to set them up in the system and establish an initial credit limit.

title: Write Off Bad Debt
description: After exhausting all collection efforts, the company has decided to write off an old, unpaid invoice for a customer who has gone out of business.

title: Calculate Allowance for Doubtful Accounts
description: For the month-end close, a controller needs to calculate the required provision for bad debt based on the aging of accounts receivable.

title: Calculate Sales Tax on an Invoice
description: When creating an invoice for a customer, the system needs to calculate the correct sales tax based on the customer's location.

title: Investigate and Resolve a Customer Deduction
description: A collections specialist is investigating a large deduction taken by a major customer for a disputed marketing co-op fee.

title: Handle a Disputed Invoice
description: A customer calls to dispute an invoice, claiming they were billed for services they did not receive.

title: Apply Cash on Account to an Invoice
description: A customer has a credit on their account from a previous overpayment. They have now requested that this credit be applied to a new open invoice.

title: Process a Customer Refund
description: A customer who paid in advance has canceled their order and is due a refund.

title: Process a Customer Refund (Mutated: injection)
description: A customer who paid in advance has canceled their order and is due a refund.

title: Create a Pro Forma Invoice
description: A customer requires a pro forma invoice to arrange for financing before a large order is placed.

title: Update a Customer's Billing Address
description: A customer calls to inform the company that they have moved and need to update their billing address.

title: Process a Customer Credit Card Payment
description: A customer wants to pay their open invoice using a credit card over the phone.

title: Send Monthly Customer Statements
description: At the beginning of the month, the AR department needs to send statements of account to all customers showing their previous balance, new invoices, payments, and ending balance.

title: Apply a Payment Without Remittance Advice
description: A check has been received from a customer with no remittance advice. An AI tool must predict which invoices the payment is likely for.

title: Process Invoice Factoring
description: To improve cash flow, the company has an agreement to sell some of its accounts receivable to a factoring company.

title: Issue a Customer Rebate Payment
description: Based on their annual purchase volume, a customer has earned a rebate. Accounting needs to process this rebate.

title: Handle a Customer Bankruptcy Notice
description: The company receives a notice that a customer with a large outstanding balance has filed for bankruptcy.

title: Reconcile a Bank Lockbox File
description: The company uses a bank lockbox service where customer checks are sent. The bank provides a daily file of all payments received, which needs to be processed.

title: Reconcile a Corporate Bank Account
description: As part of the month-end close, an accountant needs to reconcile the main corporate bank account, matching transactions in the general ledger to the bank statement.

title: Post Monthly Prepaid Amortization
description: As part of the month-end close, an accountant needs to amortize the company's prepaid insurance policy.

title: Prepare a Monthly Income Statement
description: The controller needs a draft of the monthly income statement for management review.

title: Perform Intercompany Reconciliation
description: During consolidation for month-end close, an accountant needs to reconcile intercompany payables and receivables between two subsidiaries.

title: Reconcile AP Sub-Ledger to General Ledger
description: At month-end, an accountant needs to ensure the total of the Accounts Payable aging report ties to the AP account balance in the general ledger.

title: Perform Variance Analysis for Management Reporting
description: A financial analyst needs to investigate a significant variance in the 'Travel Expense' account on the income statement.

title: Prepare a Monthly Balance Sheet
description: The controller needs a draft of the monthly balance sheet for the board package.

title: Reconcile the Prepaid Expenses Account
description: An accountant needs to reconcile the prepaid expenses general ledger account to its supporting sub-ledger or schedule.

title: Post a Reversing Journal Entry
description: An accountant needs to reverse the prior month's AP accrual at the beginning of the new month.

title: Consolidate a Subsidiary's Financials
description: A parent company needs to consolidate the financial results of a wholly-owned subsidiary into its own financial statements.

title: Review and Post a Manual Journal Entry
description: A staff accountant has prepared a manual journal entry. A senior accountant needs to review it for accuracy and post it.

title: Prepare the Statement of Cash Flows
description: Using the indirect method, an accountant needs to prepare the statement of cash flows for the quarter.

title: Reconcile Fixed Asset Sub-Ledger to General Ledger
description: An accountant needs to ensure the total cost and accumulated depreciation in the fixed asset sub-ledger agree with the balances in the corresponding GL accounts.

title: Add a New General Ledger Account
description: The controller has requested a new expense account be added to the chart of accounts to track software subscription costs more accurately.

title: Reconcile AR Sub-Ledger to General Ledger
description: As part of the month-end close, an accountant must verify that the AR aging report total matches the AR account in the general ledger.

title: Translate Foreign Subsidiary Financials
description: For consolidation, the financial statements of a European subsidiary (in EUR) need to be translated into the parent company's reporting currency (USD).

title: Prepare Segment Reporting
description: For external financial reporting, a public company needs to prepare segment information, breaking down its revenue and profit by business segment.

title: Reconcile Unbilled Receivables Account
description: A professional services firm needs to reconcile its 'Unbilled Receivables' or 'Work in Progress' (WIP) account at month-end.

title: Accrue for Employee Bonuses
description: The company has a bonus plan tied to profitability. At year-end, the accountant must accrue for the estimated bonus payout.

title: Prepare a Statement of Retained Earnings
description: An accountant needs to prepare the statement of retained earnings for the annual report.

title: Reconcile a GR/IR Clearing Account
description: An accountant needs to reconcile the Goods Receipt / Invoice Receipt (GR/IR) clearing account, which should theoretically have a zero balance.

title: Prepare an Ad-Hoc Financial Report
description: A department manager wants a report showing their department's expenses for the last quarter, broken down by GL account.

title: Create an Accrual for a Legal Settlement
description: The legal department has informed accounting that a lawsuit is likely to be settled for an estimated amount. An accrual must be recorded.

title: Reconcile an Intercompany Loan
description: Subsidiary A has an 'Intercompany Loan Receivable' from Subsidiary B. This must be reconciled with Subsidiary B's 'Intercompany Loan Payable' to A.

title: Manage the Month-End Close Checklist
description: The accounting manager needs to track the progress of all tasks in the month-end close process.

title: Process Bi-Weekly Payroll
description: A payroll specialist needs to process the bi-weekly payroll for 500 employees.

title: Record a Fixed Asset Acquisition
description: The company has purchased a new piece of machinery and the accountant needs to add it to the fixed asset register.

title: Manage Daily Cash Position
description: A treasury analyst needs to determine the company's daily cash position to decide if funds need to be moved from a money market account to the operating account.

title: Record the Disposal of a Fixed Asset
description: The company has sold an old piece of equipment and the accountant needs to remove it from the books.

title: Update Employee Bank Details for Payroll
description: An employee has requested to change the bank account where their pay is deposited.

title: Conduct a Physical Fixed Asset Inventory
description: As part of an annual audit, the company needs to perform a physical count of its fixed assets (e.g., laptops, machinery) and compare it to the asset register.

title: Process an Off-Cycle Payroll for a Terminated Employee
description: A terminated employee must be paid their final wages. This requires an off-cycle payroll run.

title: Allocate Corporate Overheads
description: At month-end, an accountant needs to allocate shared corporate costs (e.g., rent, IT) to the different business units based on headcount.

title: Prepare a 13-Week Cash Flow Forecast
description: The treasurer needs a 13-week direct cash flow forecast to manage liquidity and plan for potential borrowing needs.

title: Perform Standard Cost Update for Inventory
description: At the beginning of the year, a cost accountant needs to update the standard costs for all manufactured products based on new raw material prices and labor rates.

title: Process Payroll Tax Payments
description: After a payroll run, the specialist must remit the withheld federal and state taxes to the appropriate government agencies.

title: Run Monthly Fixed Asset Depreciation
description: For the month-end close, the accountant needs to run the process that calculates and posts depreciation for all fixed assets.

title: Process a Payroll Garnishment
description: The company has received a legal order to garnish an employee's wages for child support.

title: Perform Inventory Valuation
description: For month-end reporting, the cost accountant must value the ending inventory.

title: Process 401(k) Contributions
description: After a payroll run, the accountant must remit the employee 401(k) contributions and the company match to the plan administrator.

title: Post an Inventory Cycle Count Adjustment
description: The warehouse performed a cycle count and found a discrepancy for a specific item. An accountant needs to post an adjustment.

title: Analyze Bank Account Analysis Statement
description: The treasurer receives the monthly account analysis statement from the bank and needs to verify the fees charged for services like wires, ACH, and lockbox processing.

title: Perform Job Costing Analysis
description: A construction company needs to analyze the costs for a completed project to determine its profitability.

title: Run a Fixed Asset Roll-Forward Report
description: For audit purposes, an accountant needs to prepare a fixed asset roll-forward, which shows the movement in the asset accounts from the beginning to the end of the year.

title: Analyze Inventory Turnover
description: A financial analyst wants to calculate the inventory turnover ratio to assess how efficiently the company is managing its inventory.

title: Set Up a New Employee in the Payroll System
description: A new employee has been hired. The payroll specialist needs to add them to the payroll system before the next pay run.

title: Manage a Petty Cash Fund
description: An office manager needs to be reimbursed for the petty cash they spent during the month.

title: Perform Full Physical Inventory Reconciliation
description: After the annual full physical inventory count, the cost accountant needs to reconcile the count to the book inventory and post the overall adjustment.

title: Process Executive Deferred Compensation
description: An executive has elected to defer a portion of their bonus into a non-qualified deferred compensation plan.

title: Analyze Production Cost Variances
description: A manufacturing company's results show a significant unfavorable material variance. A cost accountant needs to investigate.
